properties.blurb: You think Pub Pass would sleep on classy steakhouses? Have some faith, friendo. The 107 Steak and Bar is just that, which means we’ve got you covered when you need a night out dressed up, looking sharp as a damn tack, and needing to show your swagger to Doral’s stylish and sophisticated. Enjoy a draft beer at the bar, paired up with their Osso Bucco Ravioli or the Lobster Mac & Cheese. Happen to swing by Wednesday through Saturday and you’ll get live music. So put that suit you bought for your brother-in-law’s wedding to a second use and savor the good life.
properties.name: 107 Steak & Bar

properties.address: 2332 La Mirada Dr # 800, Vista, CA 92081, USA
properties.name: 117⁰ West Spirits Tasting Room

properties.blurb: There’s nothing we love more than listening to live music with pals on the patio, with a round of West Coast Style IPAs for the table. This tucked away joint is totally worth the pursuit. Best case scenario, you find 12 Gates on the first try and get to the bar sooner. Worst case scenario, you make a wrong turn, but you’re still a winner because you’ll be just a tiny bit thirstier when you’re served an ice cold Buzz the Tower at the bar.
properties.name: 12 Gates Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Right across the Mississippi from Natchez, 1827 Spirits is a craft distillery with serious character. Old-world inspiration meets Southern swagger here, where small-batch spirits are made with intention and poured with pride. The tasting room feels equal parts hidden gem and local hang—perfect for slowing down, sampling something bold, and talking shop with people who truly love what they make. If you’re the kind of explorer who likes discovering spots before everyone else does, this one belongs on your radar.
properties.name: 1827 Spirits

properties.address: Back side of JJ TRacks, 279 Beacon Lite Rd ste. #G, Monument, CO 80132
properties.blurb: Moonshine doesn’t have to be something you choke down. At 3 Hundred Days Distilling, find the “best sippin’ moonshine this side of the continental divide.” The moonshine is available in Apple Pie, Strawberry Lemonade, Peach Cobbler, and more smooth, drinkable flavors infused with natural ingredients. The distillery is a callback to a time when quality, craftsmanship, and tradition mattered: and strives to live up to those qualities with every sip.
properties.name: 3 Hundred Days Distilling

properties.address: 605 N County Hwy 393 Building 15-B, Santa Rosa Beach, FL 32459
properties.blurb: Sunshine, sea breeze, and spirits made the right way—30A Distilling captures the essence of the coast in every bottle. Inspired by childhood trips to the iconic beaches, the owners craft their spirits with local ingredients, fresh flavors, and zero additives. Each sip is naturally spectacular, just like 30A itself. Whether you’re toasting to a perfect beach day or just dreaming of one, their lineup of small-batch, handcrafted spirits brings the taste of the Gulf straight to your glass.
properties.name: 30A Distilling Co

properties.blurb: 3Halves Brewpub is named for a reason and that reason is they don't do anything halfway. Kick off your visit with their flagship Wheelhouse brew, a fan favorite. But don't stop there! Their small-batch, limited-edition beers are where the magic happens. Each batch is a creative, ever-changing experience that keeps you coming back for more. Pair these craft brews with some BBQ that’s as bold as the beers, and you’ll swear they’re giving 150% in everything they do.
properties.name: 3Halves Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Located a hop away from Sequoita Park, 4 By 4 is a nice way to end a day adventure hiking or biking. With nearly sixteen taps (hence the 4 x 4), it’s damn near impossible to not find your favorite style of beer like the Icebreaker Golden or the O.G. Hefeweizen. Growlers to go if you’ve narrowed down the search for your perfect beer, ingredients for sale to make your own, indoor and outdoor seating, and even freshly popped popcorn to snack on, what more could you want? No, seriously, tell me. There's nothing more you could want.
properties.name: 4 By 4 Brewing Co

properties.blurb: 4 Hands Brewing Co. is your go-to spot for unwinding with world-class beer, classic arcade games, and a laid-back, friendly neighborhood vibe. It’s the kind of place where you’ll feel like a regular after just one visit—and if you grab a City Wide or State Wide brew, a portion of the proceeds goes to support local organizations. So, while you’re sipping, you’re also giving back. And yeah, we won’t be surprised when you come back for more.
properties.name: 4 Hands Brewing Co

properties.address: 17081 N Outer 40 Rd Suite 17073, Chesterfield, MO 63005, USA
properties.name: 4 Hands Brewing Co (Chesterfield)

properties.address: 150 W Argonne Dr, Kirkwood, MO 63122, USA
properties.name: 4 Hands Brewing Co (Kirkwood)

properties.blurb: Dinner, drinks, and dancing all under one roof—5216 Table & Tap isn’t just a bar, restaurant, or nightclub, it’s all three in one electric, high-energy space. This “gastroclub” takes creative dining to the next level with innovative dishes and expertly crafted cocktails, designed to keep the night going. Whether you’re here for a laid-back meal or ready to turn up the volume, 5216 brings the flavor, the fun, and the perfect vibe for any occasion.
properties.name: 5216 Table & Tap

properties.blurb: Sure, you could slap a slice of rubbery American cheese on a burger and call it fine, or you could come to 5280 Burger Bar, where you’ll find top-notch toppings in mouthwatering combos. The options are so tempting they offer the I Can’t Decide: two burgers done jumbo slider style so you can leave FOMO behind. The thing that makes it even better? The long list of Colorado beers to choose from.
properties.name: 5280 Burger Bar

properties.blurb: Like we would ever NOT include a place that serves top notch truffle fries and a burger called Double Bypass. Nope, we’d never bypass a spot boasting a unique burger lineup and a stacked beer list. 5280 Burger Bar is the perfect spot at Colorado Mills to take a load off after a day of shopping. Or, you know, the perfect place to watch a Broncos game with the guys. Just be sure to have a cold one waiting for the ladies when they get back from their shopping spree, bargain hunting can make a girl thirsty.
properties.name: 5280 Burger Bar (Lakewood)

properties.blurb: When you roll up to a burger joint with such an extensive menu, there’s gonna be at least one person at your table groaning about how there are too many choices and it’s impossible to decide. Well guess what, Little Miss Indecisive, 5280 Burger Bar has solved all your problems with the “I Can’t Decide” – two jumbo sliders of whatever burger variety you want. You’re happy, your friends are happy, and the lovely bartender doesn’t have to swing by every thirty seconds to see if you’ve finally made up your mind.
properties.name: 5280 Burger Bar (Westminster)

properties.address: 3055 NE Columbia Ave Suite 102, Minneapolis, MN 55418, USA
properties.name: 56 Brewing

properties.blurb: Is it a dive bar? A cocktail lounge? Could it be…the perfect marriage of the two? Visiting 5Bar is like hanging out in your friend’s living room while she mixes you drinks from her extensive home bar set-up. The seating is cozy and there’s even a dog running around. (Please don't feed her though.) Every month there’s a new themed menu, and for dive bar diehards, there are always $2 Jell-O shots.
properties.name: 5BAR

properties.blurb: Due west of Des Moines you’ll happen upon the 5th Quarter, a no-nonsense sports bar where pretense is left at the door. Speciality cocktails, cold brews, and a staggeringly delicious array of pub grub including a breaded pork tenderloin and pizza burger with housemade mariana make 5th Quarter a place to spend quarters one through four, and certainly a few overtimes.
properties.name: 5th Quarter

properties.address: 3015 Lincoln Ave, San Diego, CA 92104, USA
properties.name: 619 Spirits North Park

properties.address: 92 E Main St, Platteville, WI 53818, USA
properties.name: 7 Hills Brewing North

properties.blurb: Beer doesn’t have to be complicated to be good. That’s what the folks at 7 Locks believe, and it’s got us screaming “LOUDER FOR THE FOLKS IN THE BACK.” You’ll see some familiar options on tap, including a west coast IPA and a crowd-pleasing amber lager. But don’t overlook some of their more ambitious brews. Would it be alright if we joined you there for some live music or to watch the sportsball? Cool cool.
properties.name: 7 Locks Brewing

properties.blurb: This bar and grill in Norwalk gives off small town vibes and we’re here for it. Locals dropping by on their lunch breaks for a burger and fries with a side of the latest town gossip? Yep. After work happy hour and eggrolls with coworkers with a side of work gossip? Heck yeah. Nancy in Accounting could never handle the rajun cajun tenderloin sandwich at 804 Main Bar & Grill. But you and your pals navigate the extensive beer menu full of local faves with surprising ease.
properties.name: 804 Main Bar & Grill

properties.blurb: A garden filled with food trucks? You bet we're there! Who knew a garden without flowers could be so darn beautiful? This place might not smell like roses, but it sure smells like a culinary paradise, courtesy of the finest and most beloved food trucks around. But wait, there's more! Inside the canteen, you'll discover a treasure trove of thirst-quenching delights. They've got an extensive selection of draft beers, featuring the best local and national breweries. And if beer isn't your thing, they've got you covered with a rotating lineup of draft wines, cocktails, and ciders.
properties.name: 9 Mile Garden

properties.address: 3095 S Peoria St Unit B, Aurora, CO 80014
properties.blurb: The guys at A Bit Twisted have brought the best part of Texas to Colorado. No, not Nolan Ryan—we’re talking BBQ. While you’re sipping their delectable Strada Wicked NEIPA, you can dig into smoky brisket or pulled pork made with love (and plenty of post and live oak). Their taps rotate often with a mix of house brews and guest favorites, so there’s always something new to pair with that plate of meat.
properties.name: A Bit Twisted Brewpub

properties.blurb: Burgers and beer. That’s it. That’s the hard sell at Abbey Burger Bistro. Come for the extensive beer list and stay for the insane burgers. The Peanut Butter Burger is a fave of ours, but if you’re into something more exotic, go for the Southwest Bison Burger —an honest to goodness flavor explosion on the taste buds. If you’ve got a child’s palette, sip the Cinnamon Toast Milkshake for dessert - it hits harder than a bowl of cereal and Saturday morning cartoons.
properties.name: Abbey Burger Bistro (Fells Point)

properties.blurb: We often find ourselves craving some traditional Bangers & Mash and oh boy did we find some of the best in Colorado here. Pair it with some of the best local brews around and we aren’t leaving. There is something about the relaxing feel, friendly service, and the live music at Abby’s Irish Pub that keeps us coming back time and time again.
properties.name: Abby's Irish Pub

properties.blurb: When you talk Louisiana beer elsewhere in the country, you talk Abita. So of course you talk Abita when you talk it here! These guys have been at it since the mid-eighties but they’re as fresh as ever. Whether you try an O.G. recipe, like Turbodog or Purple Haze, or something new and seasonal, you’ll remember why you first fell in love with beer from here.
properties.name: Abita

properties.address: 2375 Tchoupitoulas St, New Orleans, LA 70130, USA
properties.blurb: Abita’s love for great beer flows beyond its original Covington location. At this second spot, the familiar craftsmanship and dedication meet a lively new space, where each pour tells a story and every visit feels like a small celebration. From the first sip to the last, you can explore the flavors, the atmosphere, and the local spirit that make Abita a true icon now just in another corner of the city, waiting to be discovered.
properties.name: Abita New Orleans

properties.address: 3431 Houma Blvd # A, Metairie, LA 70006, USA
properties.name: After Hours E.R.

properties.address: 14141 Airline Hwy Suite 4J, Baton Rouge, LA 70817
properties.blurb: Agile Brewing might be new to the Baton Rouge craft brew scene, but with a lineup like theirs? You’d never know. With twenty beers on tap, your best bet to enjoy as many as possible is to order a flight. Then get your buddy to order a flight and sneakily steal sips after he’s taken a huge bite of the bleu cheese bacon burger because he has manners and won’t talk with his mouth full to tell you to stop drinking his beer. Pretty soon you’ve sampled half the brews and probably found a new Agile Brewing fave.
properties.name: Agile Brewing

properties.address: 6840 N 27th Ave STE B, Phoenix, AZ 85017
properties.blurb: Don’t let the name fool you, if you are looking for a place where everybody knows your name it actually is at AiNT NICKS. With the best “damn good burgers” you will keep coming back time and time again until you are on a first name basis with the friendly staff. Don’t get us started on their breakfast because we will go on and on and on and on… You should just check it out for yourself. We will see you there.
properties.name: Ain't Nicks

properties.address: N88W16495 Main St, Menomonee Falls, WI 53051
properties.blurb: All right, we'll come clean. The Irish may not be known for their nachos, but trust us, the ones at AJ O'Brady's will make you question everything you thought you knew. Pair those crispy, cheesy delights with your first sip of beer and prepare yourself for a pub experience like no other. But hold on, there's more! Brace yourself for the mouthwatering delights of Cork City Rolls, Claddagh Rings, and some seriously addictive hand-battered Chicken Tenders. And hey, that's just the appetizers we've mentioned. We're not ashamed, we're PubPass. We have the privilege of indulging in this glorious pub grub. So come on over and join us in this delicious adventure!
properties.name: AJ O'Brady's

properties.blurb: Did we just pull into a little town called Leon and look for a nondescript garage next to a house in order to try some craft beer made by a guy who only does this part time? Yes. Yes we did. Was the beer outstanding? Yes. Yes it was. Something tells us Matt's secret is about to get out...
properties.name: Alchemy Brewing

properties.address: 1520 J St, San Diego, CA 92101, USA
properties.name: Ale Tales Taproom and Kitchen

properties.address: 9990 AleSmith Ct, San Diego, CA 92126, USA
properties.name: AleSmith Brewing Company

properties.address: 351 N Ronald Reagan Blvd #1055, Longwood, FL 32750, USA
properties.blurb: In the heart of Historic Downtown Longwood you’ll find Alestone Brewing. Trust us, it’s a delightful haven for folks like us. With a playful and upbeat ambiance, they brew handcrafted ales and lagers that never fail to impress. Looking to start with a classic? The Standard Classic International Lager is a perfect choice. And if adventure calls, don't miss the opportunity to savor their hoppy delight, the Jump Tree West Coast IPA. But it’s not just beer on the menu here. They serve artisan pizzas, mouthwatering sandwiches, and other delectable treats to complement their brews.
properties.name: Alestone Brewing Co

properties.address: 510 E Grand Ave, Des Moines, IA 50309
properties.blurb: Allegedly, there is a Prohibition-style speakeasy in Des Moines. Allegedly, it has custom-made booths and wallpaper. Allegedly, with its dim lighting and artwork, it tells the story of Prohibition-era Iowa. Allegedly, it sells classic cocktails that only accentuate the classic vibe. And allegedly it’s called Alleged Lee’s.
properties.name: Alleged Lee's

properties.blurb: For true ambience, a taproom should have original hardwood floors. Exposed brick. A barn-tin ceiling. Edison lighting. And probably the name “Allerton Brewing” on a sign overhead. Of course, it doesn’t hurt that this brewing company also has a stunning deck overlooking the historic Independence Mill on the Wapsipinicon River.
properties.name: Allerton Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Alpha Brewing Co is brewing beer you can feel proud to sip. Their crisp, balanced ales and inventive seasonal pours hit all the right notes—thanks to hops and a touch of science (hello, alpha acids!). Beyond the beer, they’re keeping things green with sustainability at the core: Green Dining Alliance certified, community compost drop-offs, and partnerships with New Earth Farm. Great flavors, good for the planet, and perfect for raising a glass.
properties.name: Alpha Brewing Co

properties.address: 6631 S Peoria St Suite 100, Centennial, CO 80111
properties.blurb: We recommended getting some more military call signs into the name, but they insisted that Alpha Charlie Foxtrot Tango Tap and Tavern was a bit too much. What we would never call too much is the 28 taps they’re rocking, and even more flatscreens playing the game of the day. Grub like the Muffaletta sandwich or the fittingly named USS Franklin Cheesesteak would bring your tastebuds to attention.
properties.name: Alpha Charlie's Tap & Tavern

properties.blurb: Altitude’s brick and mortar corner shop is about as friendly a place as you’ll find in Denver. With a big brother-looking-out-for-your-best-interests vibe in teaching the craft of brewing, Altitude has everything a prospective homebrewer could ever want or need. Not only that, but while you’re grabbing the goods, sample a draft on tap like their goldeny smooth Favorite Blonde or crisp and citrusy Suffolk IPA and become immediately aware that these guys are walking the walk.
properties.name: Altitude Brewing & Supply

properties.blurb: The name might sound like a lofty goal, but American Icon Brewery knows what they’re doing—and boy, do they deliver. Enter their industrial-chic space, located in the historic Vero Beach diesel power plant, and you can’t help but notice the massive and brightly colored machine behind the bar. What used to be a power generator is now lined with taps, ready to fill your glass with Power Plant Amber Lager or Icon Haze. Mm, mm, ’merica.
properties.name: American Icon Brewery

properties.blurb: We’ve aimed the bar high with this choice y’all. With food selections like brisket nachos, daily paninis that never fail to hit the mark, and a Warrior Dog that’s so loaded with scrumptious toppings that it may truly take a fighter to finish it - how could this not be your new favorite spot? And with a motto of, “Great people deserve good beer,” you’re sure to find a brew that’ll truly delight you.
properties.name: Amery Ale Works

properties.blurb: We didn't pay much attention in science class. Mostly it seemed like a bunch of stuff we'd never use. Lucky for us? The smarty pants team at Amorphic did pay attention. The results of their studies? Delicious. We just love this little powerhouse brewery in Riverwest. Whether you like your suds hoppy, sour, or lagerish? There's a correct answer waiting for you here. Amorphic also boasts a sneaky-great patio for those gorgeous afternoon study sessions.
properties.name: Amorphic Beer

properties.address: 3175 Morgan Ford Rd, St. Louis, MO 63116
properties.blurb: This local watering hole is THE place to be to catch your favorite Premier League soccer games. Sure, it has plenty of other charms - loads of tap beers, cans, and bottles, that “we’re all friends here” vibe, and some of the city’s best burgers and fries delivered right from next door. But what you’re really going to Amsterdam Tavern for is the camaraderie that comes with cheering on your favorite team from across the pond.
properties.name: Amsterdam Tavern

properties.address: 220 E Wall St, Eagle River, WI 54521, USA
properties.name: Andy's Pontoon Saloon

properties.blurb: Nice try, Angry James, but we’ve only ever left this place happy. What do you expect with Adirondack chairs around a fire pit, mountains in the distance, and a cold beer in your hand? The Alpen Weisse is one of our favorites, but they’ve brewed up something for everyone. Come for “angry hour” deals and don’t forget to BYO food so you can stay until trivia night kicks off.
properties.name: Angry James Brewery

properties.blurb: "If you’ve ever wanted to dominate a game of cornhole in a beer garden while sipping a Totally Tubular Turtle and keeping an eye on the game inside… well, that’s oddly specific. But Ankrolab Brewing Co.’s got you. They have indoor TVs, a cozy beer garden, and beers with names like Enough About You, Let’s Talk About Me. They also use reverse osmosis to strip their source water of everything, making it as pure as possible before they use it. Which is attention to detail that goes down smooth.  "
properties.name: Ankrolab Brewing Co

properties.address: 413 SW Glacier Ave, Redmond, OR 97756, USA
properties.name: Annex Sports Bar

properties.blurb: At Apogee, the day starts with craft coffee, fresh pastries, and easy breakfast bites. As the hours roll on, laptops close, smoothies and cappuccinos give way to drafts and cocktails, and pizzas hit the oven with a perfect char. The daily grind fades into the happiest of hours. Located in Olathe, Apogee blends the energy of a coffeehouse, the buzz of a bar, and the comfort of a pizza spot — all with the laid-back feel of your favorite neighborhood hangout.
properties.name: Apogee Coffee & Draft

properties.blurb: ** Deal good for BOGO on well cocktails **
properties.name: Apple Blossom

properties.blurb: Mastery of German-style beers is one thing. Mastery of a beer intended as an homage to a famous German cake? Well that's just a next-level flex (and we're here for it). If you're lucky enough to find Bee Sting Vanilla Honey Cream Ale on tap? You're lucky enough. We recommend starting your stay with a Space Dream (who said a Hazy couldn't be sesssionable?) and cruising around the tap list a bit before finishing your visit to one of the most welcoming taprooms in town with a Sting.
properties.name: Arbeiter Brewing Co

properties.address: 17081 N Outer 40 Rd Suite 208, Chesterfield, MO 63005
properties.blurb: Step into Arch Nemesis Brewing, where every sip is a showdown between bold flavors and your taste buds! Here, heroes and villains alike can throw down with inventive brews and daring kombucha blends. Their lineup isn’t for the faint of heart—you’ll face off against combos that pack a punch. Ready to take on your taste bud arch nemesis? Bring your squad, embrace the sass, and prepare for a flavor battle of epic proportions. Who will win—your favorite brew or that tantalizing new creation? Either way, it’s a victory for your palate!
properties.name: Arch Nemesis Brewing

properties.address: 317 S Division St, Stoughton, WI 53589, USA
properties.blurb: Argo Craft Tavern might be known for their cocktails, but their beer game is just as strong. This cozy Stoughton spot serves up rotating taps in a vintage setting with live music that makes every visit feel like a night out with friends. Stop in for a pint, stay for the vibe, and get ready to make this your new favorite hangout.
properties.name: Argo Craft Tavern

properties.address: 230 Swanson Ave, Lake Havasu City, AZ 86403, USA
properties.name: Arizona Rebel Republic (Havasu)

properties.address: 358 N Park Ave B, Winter Park, FL 32789, USA
properties.blurb: Atlantic Beer and Oyster is your neighborhood seafood shack, bringing you fresh coastal flavors with a modern twist. Two words: crab fondue. Do we even need to say more? From oysters and seafood favorites to juicy burgers, their menu has something for everyone. Oh, and you're probably here for the beer, right? They’ve got you covered with an epic selection of local brews from Florida and beyond. Whether you're there for the seafood or the suds, this spot is a win.
properties.name: Atlantic Beer & Oyster

properties.address: 2052 West Virginia Ave NE #102, Washington, DC 20002
properties.blurb: It’s Earth Day every day at Atlas Brew Works. It is our duty to taste-test a lot of beers as self-proclaimed experts in the name of research and spreading the good word. Rest assured, friends, we recycle all those cans and bottles because we’re super into saving the earth. But Atlas Brew Works is next level! They are 100% solar powered and that is pretty dang cool. Also their beer tastes damn good. Like it was brewed by sun gods or something.
properties.name: Atlas Brew Works

properties.address: 1201 Half St SE Suite 120, Washington, DC 20003
properties.blurb: Oh, Atlas, you had us at “huge outdoor beer garden.” We love when a taproom knows the way to our hearts - award-winning pizza and award-winning beer and award-winning vibes. The Bullpen Pilsner is the perfect complement to a slice of sausage and pepper pizza. This is legit the best spot on the Navy Yard to catch a game and sample some top-notch brews.
properties.name: Atlas Brew Works (Half Street)

properties.blurb: A gastropub in the North end of town? Oh hell yes. This area didn’t know what it was missing until chef Steven Bailey showed up. While you, my dearest PubPasser might be coming in to sample some of the best breweries that Colorado has to offer, you'll find us ordering too many food items off their expansive menu. Try the Crab Pretzel. Trust us, we haven’t steered you wrong yet.
properties.name: Atmosphere Gastropub

properties.blurb: Transport yourself from the heart of the Midwest to the enchanting vineyards of Napa Valley at Aubrey Vineyards. Leave the city lights and sounds behind as you embark on a scenic drive through the picturesque vineyard, feeling the weight of the world lift off your shoulders. Step into the Vineyard Tasting Room, a harmonious blend of warm natural materials and elegant contemporary design, offering sweeping vistas of the sprawling vineyard. Alternatively, you can bask in the beauty of the outdoors, sitting beneath a canopy of twinkling lights that illuminate the night sky. Prepare to immerse yourself in a wine experience that will transport you to a place of serenity and refinement at Aubrey Vineyards.
properties.name: Aubrey Vineyards

properties.address: 6901 S Peoria St, Englewood, CO 80112, USA
properties.name: Avalanche Grill

properties.blurb: When you operate a brewery in a town known for its breweries, you better come correct. Avery Brewing understood the assignment. With over thirty beers on tap, Avery offers one of the widest, most varied selections we’ve ever laid eyes on. And we’ve laid eyes on a lot of menu boards. The pup-friendly patio is the perfect place to enjoy your pint of Hazyish IPA or toss back a White Rascal, a classic Belgian-style ale, paired with literally anything from the food menu. Plenty of beers and good cheer to go around!
properties.name: Avery Brewing Co

properties.address: 830 S College Ave, Fort Collins, CO 80524
properties.blurb: If you didn’t know what “avuncular” meant before this exact second, you’re not an illiterate fool: neither did we. It’s an adjective that translates from its Latin origin to mean one who is a “maternal uncle,” specifically to his nephews. In other words, it’s a best friend/dear family member/chosen brother. And you’ll feel like all three of those things at this beerhouse, with fresh food, trivia every Sundays, and a friendly, maternal uncle-y vibe.
properties.name: Avuncular Bob's Beerhouse

properties.address: 2375 Bison Ranch Rd #113, Overgaard, AZ 85933, USA
properties.blurb: From sunrise to sunset, this place has got you covered with the perfect brews. Start your day with a steaming cup of their top-notch coffee that'll perk you up and fuel your adventures. As the sun sets, the atmosphere transforms, and the taps start flowing with ice-cold beers that will quench your thirst and satisfy your taste buds. With a rotating tap list, you'll always find a new beer to tickle your fancy. But it doesn't stop there! They've got you covered with energy drinks to keep the party going and even a selection of fine wines for those seeking a different kind of buzz. Whether you're in the mood for a caffeine kick or a hoppy delight, AZTEX Coffee and Taproom has everything you need to keep the good times brewing.
properties.name: AZTEX Coffee and Taproom

properties.address: 7922 S Loomis Rd, Wind Lake, WI 53185, USA
properties.blurb: This isn't your ordinary hangout – it's a food and drink haven where good times are cooked up alongside mouthwatering bites and craft beers on tap that'll make your taste buds dance. Step onto the outdoor patio and bar area, where the party comes alive with a breeze of excitement. But that's not all – they’re not just about the eats and drinks. They are about EVENTS! Get your groove on with Music Bingo, unleash your inner rockstar at our Open Mic/Jam nights, soak up the Sunday Funday vibes, and rev up your engines for the epic Car & Bike Cruise Night. At B-Lazy, the fun never stops.
properties.name: B-Lazy Bar & Grill

properties.address: 825 Oak St, Steamboat Springs, CO 80487, USA
properties.name: Back Door Grill

properties.address: 9475 Briar Village Point, Colorado Springs, CO 80920
properties.blurb: We like to think of ourselves as burger aficionados so when we heard that the Davis family has New York roots we knew we were in for a treat. The Davis family opened their first pizza shop back in 1980. Since then not only have they perfected their pizza they have added all kinds of delicious plates to their menu. We will be back time and time again until we tackle everything on their menu. Oh, and we haven’t even started talking about their beer line up. You’ll just have to check it out for yourself.
properties.name: Back East Bar and Grill (Briargate)

properties.blurb: We like to think of ourselves as burger aficionados so when we heard that the Davis family has New York roots we knew we were in for a treat. The Davis family opened their first pizza shop back in 1980. Since then not only have they perfected their pizza they have added all kinds of delicious plates to their menu. We will be back time and time again until we tackle everything on their menu. Oh, and we haven’t even started talking about their beer line up. You’ll just have to check it out for yourself.
properties.name: Back East Bar and Grill (Monument)

properties.blurb: Pizza might come first in their name, but the beer comes first in our hearts. Backcountry boasts the largest selection of draft microbrews in the state, which is exactly the kind of nirvana we’ve always dreamed of. If one day you somehow manage to drink your way through the tap list, they’ve got 300 bottles to choose from next. The number of potential pizza and beer combos in your future just became endless.
properties.name: Backcountry Pizza & Taphouse

properties.address: 323 N Railroad Ave, Loveland, CO 80537, USA
properties.blurb: Backyard Tap is like your family BBQ, but better. With a rotating tap list and top-notch food truck pairings, there's always something new to enjoy. They are all about building community and creating a welcoming space for everyone. Come over, connect with friends, and enjoy the best of NoCo. And hey, no awkward family drama here!
properties.name: Backyard Tap

properties.address: 990 Tony Canadeo Run, Green Bay, WI 54304
properties.blurb: When you find a beer that’s only available in Wisconsin, you might as well get it straight from the source. And when the source is Badger State Brewing? Well buddy, it looks like you’re never leaving Wisconsin again. Creative options like the barrel-aged Whiskey Business pair great with that game of bags you’re going to challenge your friends to out on the lawn.
properties.name: Badger State Brewing Co

properties.blurb: This neighborhood bar and café combo has been gracing Magazine Street in uptown ever since 1995. We recommend snagging a balcony seat overlooking the Garden District and ordering a Balcony Special Burger with a nice, cool local draft. Also on the menu? Chicken wings, Italian-style calzones, gourmet pizza, pasta, apps, and we’ll stop here because if you don’t like one of those things we have concerns. Kitchen open late!
properties.name: Balcony Bar & Cafe Uptown

properties.address: 2215 India St, San Diego, CA 92101, USA
properties.name: Ballast Point Brewing

properties.blurb: At Ballmer Peak Distillery, they've got the magic formula for distilled delights, and it all starts with a sprinkle of nano-distillery charm! Step into their cozy tasting room, where bright colors and warm wood make you feel like you're sipping spirits in a happy fairy tale. Get ready for a global flavor adventure, from pure molasses-based rums with a Norwegian Kveik twist to Australian-style gins. And don't get us started on their versatile and dynamic vodka – When the weather's delightful, enjoy the great outdoors with their fabulous outdoor seating. Whether you're a spirit enthusiast or a newbie, Ballmer Peak Distillery has something delightful for everyone. So why wait you should head over and let the adventure begin! Cheers!
properties.name: Ballmer Peak Distillery

properties.blurb:
"
 Balsam Lake Brewery is all about local goodness. Stocked with fresh produce, meats, cheeses, and more, their Market is a foodie's dream. And don't even get started on the Tap Room! With a variety of pizzas and an array of beers and seltzers on tap, the party never stops.  Planning an event? Balsam Lake has got you covered! From work parties to birthdays,  they will make it unforgettable. So, join Them for good vibes, great brews, and tasty treats! "
properties.name: Balsam Lake Brewery & Market

properties.address: 100 Superior Plaza Way Suite 102, Superior, CO 80027
properties.blurb: It all began with a passion for good beer and a thirst for knowledge about how it's made. Owner Sean, along with his trusty sidekick Paul, embarked on a home brewing adventure that soon turned into Sean's wildest dream of owning his very own brewery. With the support of his amazing family, Sean took the leap and never looked back. At Bambei Brewing, they believe in using only the finest ingredients to create an assortment of different beer styles that will make your taste buds sing. And to top it off, they've got a tasty menu that will satisfy even the hungriest of appetites. So come on over, grab a pint, and let the good times roll at Bambei Brewing!
properties.name: Bambei Brewing

properties.address: 4401 Banks St, New Orleans, LA 70119, USA
properties.name: Banks Street Bar
Bar Louie - The Shops at Northfield

properties.address: 817 NW 1st St, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33311, USA
properties.blurb: Off-leash dog park meets beer and wine paradise. BarkYard N' Brews is where two worlds collide, making it a must-visit spot whether you've got a furry friend or not. With a whopping 10,000 square feet of off-leash play space, your pup is in for a tail-wagging good time. And for the two-legged companions, they've got some of the finest local craft beers and wines on tap, ready to quench your thirst. So, if you're looking for a place where dogs frolic freely, and glasses clink with the finest brews, head to BarkYard N' Brews. It's where happiness is measured in wags and sips!
properties.name: Barkyard n' Brews

properties.address: 3052 El Cajon Blvd Ste 102, San Diego, CA 92104, USA
properties.name: Barley & Sword Brewing Co

properties.address: 246 Main St, Platte City, MO 64079, USA
properties.blurb: A swanky place with an upscale vibe where you can gather, spin tales, and sip on top-notch beverages. That’s what you’ll find at Barley & Vine. From their unique events to the friendly staff, it's an experience that's off the charts. Now, here's the best part – the drinks! They've got a lineup of craft beers brewed right on the premises. It's like a flavor adventure in every glass. But wait, there's more! You can also dive into a fantastic selection of local and imported wines and nibble on some limited, scrumptious bites.
properties.name: Barley & Vine

properties.address: 41493 Margarita Rd Suite G106, Temecula, CA 92591, USA
properties.name: Barrel & Stave Brewing Co (Temecula)

properties.address: 204 N Harbor Blvd, Fullerton, CA 92832, USA
properties.name: Barrel & Stave Pour House

properties.blurb: Walking into Barrel House feels like coming home. It’s warm, fun and always inviting. Their amazing staff are always focused on taking care of anyone that comes through their doors. Add nightly specials Monday-Friday and we will start being here more than our own home. From deals on their mouthwatering burgers and fries to Thursday Pizza Day there is something on this menu for everyone. We’d be doing you a disservice if we didn’t tell you about their beer line up, too. With everything local and made in micro breweries you can travel all around Iowa without leaving your new “home”.
properties.name: Barrel House (Cedar Rapids)

properties.address: 1141 S Rogers Cir #5, Boca Raton, FL 33487
properties.blurb: Whereas traditional monks dedicated their lives to serving a higher power, at Barrel of Monks Brewing, they’re dedicated to serving beer. And who are we to argue with that? Especially when they brew exclusively Belgian-style beers, meaning you get a whole European experience without the jetlag. Come get Belgian in Boca with options ranging from traditional witbier to Abbey Terno, their chocolatey dubbel. Prost!
properties.name: Barrel of Monks Brewing

properties.address: 7965 State Rte 50 A500, Groveland, FL 34736, USA
properties.blurb: Beer and cheese? Say no more, we are likely already halfway through our first board. Barrels and Boards is the kind of spot where charcuterie meets craft beer and nobody judges how many bites (or sips) you take. Unless you take the last bite. Then, yes, we might judge. Sandwiches that wow, trivia that makes you feel smart, and live music that keeps the good times rolling. This is where “just one more” isn’t a suggestion, it’s a way of life.
properties.name: Barrels & Boards

properties.address: 6726 State Rte N, St Charles, MO 63304, USA
properties.name: Barrels Taphouse and Grill

properties.blurb: Barrio Brewing could win any superlative contest. After all, it’s Arizona’s first 100% employee-owned brewery AND the state’s oldest brewery. Oh, and they carry Barrio Blonde, Arizona’s longest continuously brewed beer. We’d also like to add Arizona’s Most Delicious Beer-Infused Food to their accolades, which is not a real award, but feels appropriate given their Reuben sandwich and Spinach Artichoke are both crafted with their unique craft brews. Mmmmm.
properties.name: Barrio Brewing Co

properties.address: 644 S Main St, Lebanon, OR 97355, USA
properties.name: Barsideous Brewing

properties.address: 5859 Palmer Park Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80915
properties.blurb: You like beer but your friend likes cider. Used to be, you’d meet one week at a brewery and the next at a cider place. Say farewell to negotiating because Batch Slapped brews both beer and cider, and gives equal attention to both. Their seasonal flavors are wild in the best way—we’re talking a gummy worm sour beer and mango habanero cider. Yum!
properties.name: Batch Slapped Brewery/Cidery

properties.address: 13407 N La Montana Dr, Fountain Hills, AZ 85268
properties.blurb: Beer & BBQ go together like Mac’n Cheese. Which, lucky for us, we got as a side here at Batchelor’s Pad BBQ. They smoke their locally sourced meat over locally sourced wood so you know it doesn't get much better. The Honey Glazed Ribs with that famous cornbread are more than enough of a reason to come back time and time again, washed down with an ice cold local brew and we’ll be here for dinner every night.
properties.name: Batchelor's Pad BBQ

properties.address: 1007 S Tejon St, Colorado Springs, CO 80903
properties.blurb: We love a good themed brewery, and Battle Mountain Brewing certainly commits. Order a Singing Canary IPA and sip it next to an old miner’s lantern, or try your luck with the weekly Panning for Gold small batch release. Frequent events and rotating food trucks add to the appeal. Plus, it’s one of the few spots in the area that’s dog-friendly inside as well as out.
properties.name: Battle Mountain Brewing

properties.blurb: The Bauhaus School was among the world’s most famous art and design schools in post-WWI Germany. And Bauhaus Brew Labs takes its namesake to heart, celebrating the joy of art and craft every single day. Of course, in their case, it’s all about the art of crafting beer. Bauhaus aims to reinvigorate the spirit of the family brewery with German-inspired beers, food trucks, an expansive patio, and even a vending machine with everything from fidget toys to tarot cards. Now that's some Wonderstuff!
properties.name: Bauhaus Brew Labs

properties.blurb: Willkommen to the Bavarian Bierhaus, where German culture, live music, beer, and delectable food come together for an unforgettable experience! Get ready for a taste of Bavaria with our wide selection of German Bier, Bavarian beer, and fine wines that'll have you raising your stein in delight! Their menu is a culinary journey through Germany, with mouthwatering German cuisine, plenty of sides to complement your meal, and desserts that'll satisfy your sweet tooth. Prost! Come join us at Bavarian Bierhaus for an amazing time filled with great beer, good food, and an unforgettable cultural experience!
properties.name: Bavarian Bierhaus

properties.address: 65 Alhambra Plaza, Coral Gables, FL 33134, USA
properties.blurb: No need to book a flight to Sydney, Bay 13 Brewing brings the Aussie pub vibes straight to Coral Gables. Cold pints, bold flavors, and a “no worries” attitude keep this spot buzzing. The beers? Always fresh, often Southern Hemisphere-inspired, and best enjoyed with mates. Toss in some killer food and friendly service, and you’ve got yourself a true Aussie-style hangout in the heart of Miami. Cheers, mate.
properties.name: Bay 13 Brewery & Kitchen

properties.address: 326 N. Norman C. Francis Parkway, New Orleans, LA 70119
properties.blurb: You like beer. Your partner likes wine. We're no couples coach but you should probably head to a place that boasts both. Welcome to Bayou Beer (and Wine!) Garden. Settle in with some righteous Buffalo wings or their famous DISCO Fries (trust us) before working up enough liquid courage to try some wine while they try a craft beer. Wow. Now that's a delicious compromise!
properties.name: Bayou Beer Garden

properties.blurb: Here the spirits flow and the good times roll! They're not just crafting fantastic libations; they're preserving a family tradition and the extraordinary culture and beauty of the Bayou. Get ready to taste some delightful spirits like the Contraband Gulf Coast Corn Whiskey, Good Earth Bourbon, and the Hard Scrabble Rum. Each sip will transport you to the heart of Louisiana, and trust us, it's a journey you won't want to end. And hey, when you visit, don't forget to join their entertaining distillery tours! You'll learn the secrets behind their craft while having a blast. Louisiana has never been more soulful, so come on down and let Bayou Terrebonne Distillers show you what it's all about! Cheers to unforgettable experiences and the spirit of the Bayou!
properties.name: Bayou Terrebonne Distillers

properties.address: 190 W El Norte Pkwy, Escondido, CA 92026, USA
properties.name: Bear Roots Tavern

properties.address: 1425 S Airport Rd #100, Longmont, CO 80503, USA
properties.blurb: At Bearded Brewing Artisan Ales, the beers are just as bold as the facial hair. Small batch, big flavor, and brewed with a sense of creativity that’s anything but clean-shaven. Whether you’ve got a full lumberjack mane, a five o’clock shadow, or can’t grow one to save your life, you’ll fit right in as long as you’ve got a pint in hand.
properties.name: Bearded Brewer Artisan Ales

properties.blurb: How many beers on tap is too many? According to Beasts & Brews, the answer isn’t 100. The largest self-pour tap house in Colorado also has wine, bourbon, gin, kombucha, and coffee available for those select few who aren’t beer fiends. Settle in with your beverage and something off the locally-sourced scratch menu to gaze at the sweeping views of Pikes Park over a crackling fire.
properties.name: Beasts & Brews

properties.blurb:
Beat Culture
| bēt kul-chər |
noun — A Miami-born craft brewery where “all things fermentable” come to life: beer, honey wine, and whatever else they dream up next.
verb — To pair said creations with food that fuses local flavors into breakfast, lunch, and dinner you’ll actually want to brag about.
adjective — Describes a place where small batches, bold ideas, and good times always beat the ordinary.
properties.name: Beat Culture Brewery & Kitchen

properties.blurb: Crafted with heart from the heart of Minnesota, this hoppy hotspot can be summed up in three words: Dam. Fine. Beer. As a PubPasser, you already know you’re getting a good deal when you belly up at Beaver Island. But their weekly specials are nothing to sneeze at either. Our go-to day of the week? Thursday. Buy a pint and get your second for a penny. If you need us, we’ll be rummaging through our couches—looking for loose change.
properties.name: Beaver Island Brewing

properties.blurb: All the benefits of home cooked meals without all the dishes and clean up? Sign us up! With breakfast, lunch and dinner why would we leave? We start with homemade Biscuits & gravy for breakfast. Then come lunchtime we get ourselves a Pork Tenderloin. THEN dinner is here before we know it and we go south of the border for their Enchiladas. Served with rice and beans, you will thank us later. Wash it all down with some of Iowa's best brews on tap. You thought we were kidding when we said we weren’t leaving…
properties.name: Beaver Tap

properties.blurb: If there’s one thing Bee’s Knees Brewing Co is going to do, it’s commit to the bit. Order a refreshing draft from their menu: you can choose from Hazy Hive, I’ll Bee Bock, Sweat Bee Stout, Electric Nectar, and more buzz-worthy options (see what we did there?) And if you’re hungry, don’t get a bee in your bonnet.  They also have warm calzones, breadsticks, and French dip sandwiches on the menu.
properties.name: Bee's Knees Brewing Co

properties.address: 416 E Walnut St, Des Moines, IA 50309
properties.blurb: At Beechwood Lounge, the smiles are as refreshing as the beers we pour! Our friendly staff is here to make your visit a memorable one, serving up great vibes and even better brews. Whether you're seeking a hoppy IPA, a smooth stout, or something in between, our wide selection of beers has you covered. The inviting atmosphere sets the stage for laughter, conversations, and unforgettable moments shared with friends old and new. So come on in, grab a seat, and let the good times flow at Beechwood Lounge. Cheers to good company, fantastic brews, and creating memories that will leave you buzzing with joy!
properties.name: Beechwood Lounge

properties.address: 318 C, Mid Rivers Mall Dr, St Peters, MO 63376, USA
properties.blurb: Walking into Beer BBQ Shop is kind of like going to a friend’s backyard cookout. That is if that friend had local craft beer on tap, 600 more in the fridge, and 200 sauces and rubs lined up for you to sample. Actually, now that we’re saying it out loud… this doesn’t sound like your friend’s BBQ at all. Maybe leave it to the professionals and let Beer BBQ Shop handle the good stuff.
properties.name: Beer BBQ Shop

properties.blurb: Whether you're from the area or just Ben Bikin' through (see what we did there?) you'll want to pull into this old service shop that became one of the coolest tap & bottle bars we've come across. Beau knows beer. Trust this dude and his staff to find you a new favorite or two!
properties.name: Beer Shop

properties.address: 1543 San Marco Blvd, Jacksonville, FL 32207, USA
properties.blurb: At Beer:30, it’s always beer o’clock and we don’t care what your watch says. With 15 rotating taps, a fresh wine list, and a full lineup of ciders, seltzers, sodas, and NA options, there’s something for every kind of thirst. Come get lost in the joy of choosing your next pour, trade stories over a perfectly chilled glass, or just let the time slip away entirely. Around here, the only thing more reliable than the drinks is the fact that it’s always the right time for one more.
properties.name: Beer:30

properties.address: 2700 Olive St, St. Louis, MO 63103, USA
properties.blurb: Beffa's Bar is the kind of place that we can't help but adore, and there are plenty of fantastic reasons why. Lets start with an inviting atmosphere that feels like a warm hug, scrumptious snacks and sandwiches that'll tantalize your taste buds, and then the service that's nothing short of outstanding, Beffa's is the go-to spot for relaxation and unwinding. This beloved establishment has been a fixture in the community for decades, and they're still going strong because they genuinely love what they do! So why not swing by, mingle with the friendly regulars, and before you know it, you’ll become one yourself.
properties.name: Beffa's Bar & Restaurant

properties.address: n64w23246 Main St, Sussex, WI 53089, USA
properties.blurb: Step into Belfast Station in Sussex, Wisconsin, and get ready for a trip to the "Conductors Cottage," where the vibe is as cozy as a train conductor's favorite stop after a long day. Or, take a seat at the Belfast Bar and feel like you've been whisked away to a lively Irish pub, complete with 14 TVs to keep you up to date on all the sports action—be it soccer, football, or basketball. And let's not forget the star attractions: their Shepherd's Pie and Irish Meatloaf are comfort food at its finest, making every visit a tasty journey! So, whether you're there for the food, the drinks, or just the good times, Belfast Station is the place to be!
properties.name: Belfast Station Northwoods Irish Pub & Grill

properties.address: 114 N Tejon St #100, Colorado Springs, CO 80903
properties.blurb: Say this one five times fast: the Bell Brothers brew beer. Even if you’re no good at tongue twisters, we bet you’ll enjoy the beer. Thanks to their engineering background, the Bell brothers have figured out all the technical details that go into a perfect pint. Treat your inner nerd to an Ohm’s Law-ger and buy your buddy a LEO Hazy Pale Ale. All pints are $5, so even splitting the check is easy.
properties.name: Bell Brothers Brewing

properties.blurb: Step into Belshire Brewing Co, and you'll find more than just a brewery; it's a place where stories are shared, laughter fills the air, and cold beer flows freely. It's a tribute to the enduring spirit of camaraderie, where generations come together to celebrate, reminisce, and create new memories. They invite you on a nostalgic journey back to the 70s and 80s, reminiscent of those cherished Wisconsin neighborhoods. It's a place where memories are made and where the bonds of friendship that were forged decades ago continue to thrive.
properties.name: Belshire Brewing Company

properties.address: 251 E Main St, Reedsburg, WI 53959, USA
properties.name: Bender's Tap Inn

properties.blurb: Bengal Tap Room has got everything you need for a good time – beer, food, and sports. Mondays are pitcher-perfection day with $5.00 pitchers of domestic beers – cheers to starting the week off right! And when thirsty Thursdays roll around, they have got your back with $3 glasses of house wine – a toast to making it through the week! Oh, and dont forget sports they have got 'em all, all the time. Cheer on your favorite teams while sipping on your favorite brews. But wait, there's more! Their menu is a treasure trove of delectable choices, and don't miss out on their burger of the week – always a mouthwatering surprise. Whether you're into cocktails, martinis, wine, or non-alcoholic drinks, they have got you covered. So why wait? Come on down to Bengal Tap Room for a night filled with chill vibes and good times. See you there!
properties.name: Bengal Tap Room

properties.address: 4839 E Colfax Ave, Denver, CO 80220, USA
properties.name: Benzina

properties.blurb: Berkeley Alley Beer Co. packs big flavors into their beers. Offerings run the gamut from Strawberry Rhubarb Sour (basically summer in a glass) to Vanilla in Your Rye, with its hefty punch of barrel-aged goodness. Enjoy your beer on the patio or check the events calendar and mix up your week with everything from board game night to a chili cook-off.
properties.name: Berkeley Alley Beer Co

properties.blurb:
BOGO DEAL GOOD ON BEERS UP TO $10 VALUE

My goodness, some of the cocktails we tried could be considered art in their own right. The Sazerac with rye, peychauds, sugar, and absinthe eased the woes of the world for a bit and the Berkeley Burro made of bourbon, ginger liqueur, lime and soda made us wish every city had a place like this one. Taps on hand showcase some of Colorado and the West’s finest, like the Coffee Lager from Wibby. Occasional live music and a boozy 5k spice up their events calendar, and the sidewalk seating is great for chatting with those ambling by.
properties.name: Berkeley Untapped

properties.blurb: The folks at Berthoud Brewing offer up simple, classic beers in a cozy atmosphere. Their commitment to crafting highly drinkable beers with quality ingredients is why they are one of our favorite small town breweries. If you find yourself at the brewery when a local food truck is visiting, count yourself lucky. You can’t go wrong with a little BBQ & Fireside Scottish pairing.
properties.name: Berthoud Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Berthoud Brewing is our favorite spot for an afternoon beer and pizza after a long day exploring Estes Park. Nothing helps satisfy those post-hike cravings quite like a Lowrider Light, a super crushable and refreshing brew. Pair that with a Colorado Supreme pizza piping hot from the woodfire oven and it’s just *chef’s kiss*! You’ll love the patio, you’ll love the friendly faces, did we mention you’ll love the tap lineup
properties.name: Berthoud Brewing Co

properties.address: 4840 NW Bethany Blvd, Portland, OR 97229, USA
properties.name: Bethany Public House

properties.blurb: This is the place where sports fanatics and beer enthusiasts collide in the most epic way! With a jaw-dropping lineup of 30+ TVs and a whopping 25 beers on tap, this Nashville gem has got it going on. Get ready to taste the magic of local, craft, and seasonal beers, alongside your trusty favorite domestics.  Whether you're cheering on your team or just chilling with pals, this sports bar has stepped up its game, and you won't be able to resist the fantastic brews they have in store. Oh, and did we mention they broadcast all major league sporting events? Say goodbye to missing those epic game-winning moments because at Beyond the Edge, you'll be right in the heart of the action.
properties.name: Beyond the Edge

properties.address: 1213 Liberty Rd B-4, Sykesville, MD 21784, USA
properties.name: BierBath

properties.blurb: Biere Bar is the ultimate beer lover's paradise, nestled along the scenic Westbank of the Mississippi River in Marrero, New Orleans. And let me tell you, it's the Westbank's hidden gem for all things brew-tastic! Locally owned and operated, Biere Bar boasts the most extensive beer selection on the Westbank, featuring over 200 incredible beers with the seasonal lineup constantly changing. And the best part? Thirty of those beauties are on tap, just waiting to tantalize your taste buds! Just when you thought it couldn’t get better, there is more! Picture this: a colossal projector for epic sporting events, eight massive big-screen TVs, live music to get your groove on, and even video Poker for the daring souls!  Whether you're a sports fanatic, a music lover, or just here for the good times, this place has got you covered!
properties.name: Biere Bar

properties.blurb: This place takes sustainability and quality to a whole new level as one of Iowa's three Platinum-Certified Iowa Green Breweries. It's like they're brewing happiness for the planet and your taste buds at the same time! Now, let's talk about the star of the show—the award-winning Easy Eddy hazy IPA. It's not just any IPA; it's THE best-selling IPA in all of Iowa! And trust me, one sip of this hazy goodness, and you'll know exactly why it's such a hit! The secret to their success lies in the art of hand-selecting the finest hops and grains for each brew. It's like they've got a magic touch when it comes to crafting these liquid masterpieces. And with their seasoned and skilled brewers working their magic, you can bet every pint is a winner!
properties.name: Big Grove Brewpub-Solon

properties.blurb: Are we rule breakers? Not really. But rule benders? Well, let’s just say we’ve been known to flex a little, which is why we vibe so well with Big Rack Brew Haus. Owner and brewer Aaron Oviatt gets it! he’s all about crafting beers that push boundaries, even if that means bending a rule or two. With a passion for both beers and big bucks (the deer kind, of course), it’s no wonder we’ve got a soft spot for the 12 Pointer Porter. Sure, you can find these brews all over Iowa, but trust us, the taproom at the Brew Haus is where the magic happens. It’s the perfect place to feel like you’re one with nature without having to leave the comfort of your barstool.
properties.name: Big Rack Brew Haus

properties.blurb: Honestly, it’s hard to say what’s better - the food or the names they’ve given the food. Wakey, Wakey, Eggs & Bakey Burger? Love Me Tenders? Ain’t Nothin’ but a Chicken Wing? What in Tarnation Sriracha Crispy Chicken Wrap? Shoot dang y’all…we’re more than halfway in love with this place. And we promise, the food hits just as hard as the names do. And they’ve got a thorough selection of libations to choose from, so the question is…why aren’t you there already?
properties.name: Big Sky Country

properties.blurb: "When co-owner Tom asked his 2-year-old daughter what she thought of the name “Trout Brewery,” she wasn’t having it. “No daddy, BIG Trout Brewery,” she corrected, settling the matter once and for all. This local brewpub does, in fact, have trout on its menu. It also has a wide selection of craft beers, tasty bites, and a state-of-the-art brewhouse that reduces water waste and increases extraction rate to help the environment.  "
properties.name: Big Trout Brewing

properties.blurb: Big Wood has all the charm of a northern Minnesotan cabin bar without the long haul to get there. The folks running this cozy joint do things their way. Deviating from the norm is their norm. They’re not interested in brewing what’s trendy—they brew what they like to drink. Good thing they’ve got good taste. Knock back a Cabin Daze Hazy IPA and escape to God’s country right from the comforts of your barstool.
properties.name: Big Wood Brewery

properties.blurb: What’s your go-to order at a BBQ joint and why is burnt ends? There are plenty of other things to admire on the Big’s BBQ & Brew Pub menu, but for realsies, you had me at burnt ends. It’s not like there won’t be an order of pulled pork sammies or smoked mac and cheese “for the table” because there definitely will be. And of course those burnt ends are getting washed down with an ice cold brewski, fresh from the tap.
properties.name: Big's BBQ and Brew Pub

properties.blurb: First things first, their smoked BBQ platter is an absolute must-try. The aroma alone will make your taste buds dance with joy! And speaking of dancing, wait until you sink your teeth into their homemade pizzas! It's like a flavor fiesta in every bite! But wait, there's more. Their crab cakes are out-of-this-world good—so good that even the crabs themselves would approve! And here's the best part: they've got an incredible selection of beers on tap. Once you find your new favorite brew you can even take it home in their awesome Growlers! So whether you're lounging indoors, basking in the sun outdoors, or grabbing some scrumptious bites to-go, Bilda's Friess Lake Pub has got you covered with fantastic food and a fantastic time!
properties.name: Bilda's Friess Lake Pub

properties.blurb: A former gas station turned bar, Billy’s is approaching it’s hundredth birthday. So there’s a certain charm impossible to buy that comes with a place of that age. From the heavy wood bar and counter, to the perfect margarita and fellow cocktail standout the Jalapeñorita, to the ten plus taps and lively outdoor patio, Billy’s has earned its reputation with locals. Oh, and some of the best damn Mexican food in Denver.
properties.name: Billy's Inn

properties.address: 12345 SW Broadway St, Beaverton, OR 97005, USA
properties.name: BinaryBrewing.co

properties.address: 1310 Wayzata Blvd, Long Lake, MN 55356, USA
properties.blurb: You’ll find the cozy vibes of a Wisconsin-Style supperclub and the hop-tastic excitement of an experimental American brewery collide at Birch’s on the Lake! Get ready to feast your eyes on the stunning waterfront view of Long Lake while you dive headfirst into a culinary adventure that will tickle your taste buds. Birch's on the Lake proudly sources local ingredients, making each dish a flavorful masterpiece that celebrates the changing seasons. So grab a seat, raise your glass, and let the good times roll as you savor the delicious fusion of comfort and innovation at Birch's on the Lake.
properties.name: Birch's on the Lake

properties.address: 100 NE 1st Ave Third Floor, Miami, FL 33132, USA
properties.blurb: Biscayne Bay Brewing Co is the official craft beer of the Miami Marlins so yes, you can sip like a champ while cheering on your team at LoanDepot Park. But even if you’re not at the ballgame, the historic Old Post Office building is the perfect spot to enjoy Biscayne Bay’s bold, local brews. Hit a home run with a pint, soak in the crafted space, and drink like every day’s game day.
properties.name: Biscayne Bay Brewing Co

properties.blurb: We love finding small town gems, and BIT Brewery is just one more to add to our must-stop list. If we’ve said it once, we’ve said it a thousand times - no better pairing than pizza and beer. We might add in friendly bartenders and a welcoming environment, but those are just spicy toppings on top of the mouthwatering taco pizza in this metaphor. This brewery in Central City has a solid lineup of tap beers, with interesting flavor combos, which is obviously a running theme since their pizza lineup is just as solid and equally as interesting.
properties.name: BIT Brewery

properties.blurb: Beer has become so omnipresent in our consumer culture, it’s easy to forget that brewing the stuff was originally a holy endeavor, carried out by secluded monks centuries before it was hip to make craft brews. Thankfully, no grueling pilgrimage to a mountaintop monastery is required to enjoy the divine qualities of Black Abbey’s many fine products—simply belly up at a farmhouse table in the Fellowship Hall and treat your palate to a variety of excellent European-influenced ales. The Rose Belgian Blonde is their best seller for a reason—boasting the complexity of Belgian yeast and hints of banana and clove, it’s also quite light, clean and eminently sessionable, perfect for a Smashville summer afternoon. The Special Belgian-Style Abbey Ale is deeper in color and flavor profile, with notes of orange and chocolate to delight the nose and taste buds. There’s also a wide variety of non-Belgian type suds, including IPAs, Porters, and all manner of German-style brews. We see a flight (or two) in your future.
properties.name: Black Abbey Brewing Co

properties.address: 423 N Cleveland Ave, Loveland, CO 80537, USA
properties.blurb: Guitar and beer enthusiasts have discovered their ultimate destination at Black and Blues Music and Blues. This unique establishment offers a wide array of guitars, amps, and homebrew supplies for sale, satisfying the needs of both musicians and craft beer enthusiasts alike. The cozy listening room provides a relaxed setting where patrons can enjoy handcrafted cocktails and an impressive selection of craft beers while immersing themselves in the captivating sounds of live music. With a lineup of talented artists performing every Friday through Sunday, Black and Blues showcases a diverse range of local, regional, and international acts spanning various genres. Prepare to be mesmerized by the harmonious fusion of guitar expertise and exceptional brews at Black and Blues Music and Blues.
properties.name: Black and Blues Music and Brews

properties.address: 9315 Snowden River Pkwy, Columbia, MD 21046, USA
properties.blurb: At Black Flag Brewing, the fun never stops! Whether you're into crafty nights, trivia, or even joining a run club, there's always something exciting on the calendar. Their expansive beer list is a dream come true for enthusiasts who want to explore a variety of flavors. And if your tummy start rumbling while you’re sampling all those brews, don’t worry—there’s always a top-notch food truck parked outside ready to satisfy your cravings.
properties.name: Black Flag Brewing Company

properties.blurb: Black Flamingo captures the vibrancy of South Florida in its unique lineup of craft beers. We love a sour that packs a punch and our fave to sip in that endless sunshine is Flamango. (We also love a play on words, obviously.) There’s something for everyone, including a hoppy pale ale and a layered dark lager. This Oakland Park spot offers live music and cold beer and there is honestly nothing we love more than jamming with friends while sipping a cold one.
properties.name: Black Flamingo Brewing (Oakland Park)

properties.address: 3448 Marinatown Ln STE C, North Fort Myers, FL 33903, USA
properties.name: Blackbeards Tavern

properties.blurb: We like a place with a little bit of everything, which is another way of saying: we like Blackbird Public House. Order fresh-shucked oysters and a Cranberry Manhattan if you’re feeling fancy, or opt for a local beer and BBQ Chicken pizza if today’s been a long one. Whatever you’re craving, Blackbird has options, plus daily specials to top it all off.
properties.name: Blackbird Public House

properties.address: 3104 N Nevada Ave Ste A, Colorado Springs, CO 80907, USA
properties.name: Blackhat Distillery

properties.address: 2312 Clifton Ave Suite B, Nashville, TN 37209
properties.blurb: Step right into the vibrant world of Blackstone Brewing Co., where the magic of craft beer comes to life. As Nashville's oldest and most celebrated brewery, they offer an impressive lineup of award-winning beers that make taste buds sing with delight. With 16 taps pouring liquid perfection, each sip is an adventure in itself. And when it comes to satisfying cravings, their Food Bus delivers mouthwatering burgers, fries, and daily specials that keep patrons coming back for more. Guests can indulge in a beer-filled extravaganza that combines great brews, incredible food, and a whole lot of fun. At Blackstone Brewing Co., the good times flow and the flavors soar.
properties.name: Blackstone Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Rumor has it that after one visit to Blake’s Taphouse, you’ll be humming the “Cheers” theme song all the way home. We can sure see why. Blake’s has the kind of atmosphere that’d make anyone into a regular. With a huge selection of craft beers on tap, a mouthwatering menu of bar food, and frequent live music events, it’s the perfect spot for happy hour, family dinner, or date night.
properties.name: Blake's Taphouse

properties.address: 234 N College Ave a3, Fort Collins, CO 80524, USA
properties.name: Blanchard Family Wines - Fort Collins

properties.address: 94 Washington Dr Unit B, Centerport, NY 11721, USA
properties.name: Blind Bat Brewery Bistro

properties.blurb: “Blind Butcher” isn’t just a name. Co-owner Rob Hage started the craft brewery after he was declared legally blind and became a patient at the University of Iowa Institute for Vision Research (IVR). He then partnered with IVR with the joint mission of raising awareness and funds for a preventative treatment for many causes of blindness. Including his own. That's a pretty great reason to buy another beer.
properties.name: Blind Butcher Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Bloomer Brewing Co. boasts a combined 40+ years of brewing experience, a spacious tap room, and homemade craft root beer for the underage (or abstaining). It also has craft cocktails like the appropriately-named Uff-Da, and beers with delightful names like Barrel Aged Hog Breath (it has hints of maple syrup and bacon) and Fa-La-La Lager (it has a touch of dark chocolate and peppermint!) Wisconsin should be proud.
properties.name: Bloomer Brewing Co

properties.address: 2710 Locust St, St. Louis, MO 63103, USA
properties.blurb: Blue Jay Brewing is a place so good you'll be singing its praises—just like a Blue Jay after a pint or two. But it gets even better. They're partnering with Farm Spirit to bring you farm-fresh food in the taproom Wednesday through Sunday! So, whether you're a fan of fresh brews or fresh bites, they’ve got both covered. Trust us, after your first sip, you won’t just chirp about it—you’ll shout it from the rooftops!
properties.name: Blue Jay Brewing Co

properties.address: 4151 E County Line Rd G, Centennial, CO 80122
properties.blurb: This locally owned brewpub is like a wonderland of craft beers and good times! First things first, let's talk about their brews. They've got their own custom craft beers that are like little drops of liquid gold. And as if that's not enough, they've also got a lineup of Colorado's finest brews from other awesome breweries. Talk about a beertastic paradise! Now, let's move on to the food, shall we? Prepare your taste buds for an epic adventure! Blue Spruce is not messing around when it comes to satisfying your hunger. They've got burgers that are so juicy you'll need a bib, sandwiches that are stacked to the sky, and street tacos that will make your taste buds salsa dance! Oh, and don't even get me started on their fish n' chips... it's like a seaside vacation on a plate!
properties.name: Blue Spruce Brewing Co (Centennial)

properties.blurb: If you're looking for a unique brewery experience that's got it all - great beer, delicious food from their own custom kitchen, and plenty of games and entertainment - head on over to Blue Spruce Brewing Co. You won't be disappointed. With 40 taps at their bar, you'll have plenty of options to choose from. If you're looking for something light and refreshing, their Oar Loko Mexican Lager is the perfect choice. It's a light-bodied, clean lager that's easy to drink and perfect for any occasion. For those who like something with a little more complexity, the Kwana Porter is a smooth, sweet brew with a roasty chocolate malt profile. Blue Spruce Brewing Co isn't just about the beer - they've also got a game room with dart lanes, pool tables, pinball, video games, foosball, and 6 TVs. It's the perfect spot to hang out with friends and enjoy some great beer and good times.
properties.name: Blue Spruce Brewing Co (Littleton)

properties.blurb: The crackling of a fire, the comforting atmosphere of a well-crafted recycled wood interior, an endless supply of wines, beers, and dazzling cocktails, and food that is bound to have you coming back again and again. Have we just described nirvana itself? Perhaps. We were certainly close to that after sampling their Saloon Ramen (bless the crispy pork belly gods) alongside a glass of Riesling. No matter what you order it’s sure to soothe any slope or trail soreness. Or you know, a particularly rough Wednesday.
properties.name: Blue Stag Saloon

properties.address: 16211 Main Ave SE, Prior Lake, MN 55372
properties.blurb: Prior Lake’s first taproom is quite the cause for celebration. Whether it’s enjoying a Candy Cove Kolsch out on the water, a Cobertizzo Mexican Lager by the beach, an Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Stout by the campfire, or a General Quarters IPA out on the ice, Boathouse Brothers Brewing’s beers are made to cheers lake life.
properties.name: Boathouse Brothers Brewing

properties.blurb: Bodihow Brewing Co is a biker’s dream come true, serving up fresh Mesoamerican flavors alongside craft beers that hit the spot. In the same space is Oregon Bicycle Company, a full-service bike shop ready to keep your wheels rolling with everything from tune-ups to gear upgrades. If your idea of biking is cruising from brewery to brewery, this place is made for you. And if you’d rather drive? No worries. Just come hungry, thirsty, and ready to enjoy.
properties.name: Bodihow Brewing Co

properties.address: 15425 Old Town Dr Suite 118, Parkville, MO 64152
properties.blurb: With Boho Brewing specializing in Bohemian and German Lagers we knew we had to try the Boho Czech Style Lager followed by the Boho Creekside Cream Ale and might we say, they were both fantastic. We were impressed by the fun vibe and lighting inside and a stellar patio outside. You’ll find us challenging everyone to a game of corn hole while we drink our way down their incredible tap list.
properties.name: Boho Brewing

properties.address: 1971 India St, San Diego, CA 92101, USA
properties.name: Bolt Brewery

properties.address: 14825 E Shea Blvd #101, Fountain Hills, AZ 85268
properties.blurb: Have you ever been served your beer flight in a coffin? No? If you’re down for something whimsical and macabre, lean into the unique vibe at Bone Haus. This brewery prides itself on its creative and inspired brews. There’s nothing cooler than an outrageous origin story and beer that lives up to the hype. Bone Haus offers a steady rotation of limited editions and seasonals, as well some signature beers. Try them all, trust us. They are well worth it.
properties.name: Bone Haus Brewing

properties.blurb: "If you’re from Southwest Florida and don’t like Bone Hook Brewing, you’re out of luck: the closest similar brewpub is 242 miles away! Thankfully, Bone Hook has it all, with the largest selection of freshly made beer in the state. They always have at least 20 selections on tap, and are both a family-run business and the largest brewpub in Southwest Florida.  "
properties.name: Bone Hook Brewing Co

properties.blurb: When it comes to margaritas, they've got the magic touch that will leave you wanting more, more, and yes, you guessed it, more !Let's talk about their margs, shall we? From the classic Bonez Margarita that's pure tequila magic with a twist of tangy goodness, to the Scorpion that'll give your taste buds a spicy surprise! Oh, and the Watermelon Marg... oh, yes, it's like a refreshing slice of paradise in a glass!  Now, let's move on to the food, because trust me, you're gonna want to eat your way through this menu! Whether it's the mouthwatering enchiladas that'll make your heart sing, the flavor-packed bowls that are an explosion of yum, or the tacos that'll take you straight to taco heaven, Bonez Tequila Bar and Grill has got you covered.
properties.name: Bonez Tequila Bar and Grill

properties.address: 777 N Arizona Ave UNIT 3, Chandler, AZ 85225, USA
properties.name: Bonnie's Bread & Butter Co.

properties.blurb: Boone needs no introduction. But we're gonna rep them anyway. Fantastic cocktails. Genuine staff. Approachable surroundings. Attention to detail without pretense. Whether across town or across the country? This bar is one we always measure others against. Stop by, have one of their legendary old fashioneds, and you'll get the idea in a hurry...
properties.name: Boone & Crockett

properties.address: 2545 Progress St STE D, Vista, CA 92081, USA
properties.name: Booze Brothers Brewing Co.

properties.address: 444 S Park St, Madison, WI 53715, USA
properties.blurb: The Borough is the neighborhood hangout we all wish was right around the corner. This cozy spot is perfect for grabbing a booth or settling in at the bar to savor comfort food with a homemade twist. Enjoy a freshly tapped beer or explore their rotating guest brews while watching the game on the big screens. With specialty cocktails and inventive Old Fashioneds, there’s something for everyone. Especially during Happy Hour with cocktails at half off. Weekends are a blast with Friday Fish Fry, brunch, and those legendary Bloody Marys.
properties.name: Borough Beer Co

properties.blurb: We love a good neighborhood joint. The warmth, the homeyness, and the welcoming nature just seeps out of Borough Beer Co. Grab a local pint and a spot on the patio, or something a little less local and a table inside to listen to some live music. With a brunch, lunch and dinner food menu you could honestly hang out here all day. We can never pass on a Nashville Hot Chicken Club, topped with their spicy oil, cheese, AND bacon we were in heaven. Washed down with Roly Soli Hazy IPA brewed locally. Our day couldn’t have gotten any better.
properties.name: Borough Beer Co & Kitchen

properties.blurb: This place “nose” a thing or two about good beer (sorry, we’ll see ourselves out). With dozens of house brews pouring at any given time, there’s something here for every taste. From the classics you know and love to a few creations that might just surprise you. And while the beer is the star, the food menu more than holds its own, serving up the kind of eats that make you wonder if you came for the pint or the plate. Either way, you’re in the right spot.
properties.name: Bottlenose Brewing

properties.blurb: At Bottles and Taps, it's a haven where great people come together for great beer and even greater times! With an impressive selection of brews on tap, in bottles, and cans, you're in for a treat every time you step through those doors.But hold on tight because the real magic happens when you dive into their mouthwatering menu! Beer Cheese Nachos, Spicy Mac & Cheese Bites, Egg Rolls, and Bavarian Pretzel sticks dripping with beer cheese—your taste buds will be in absolute bliss! Trust us, anything you order here will bring you joy and leave you craving for more.
properties.name: Bottles and Taps

properties.blurb: Bottleshop 48 carries everything you didn’t know you wanted. But we have faith in you, loyal PubPassers, to make smart choices when it comes to sampling and sipping beer. The bartenders are crazy smart and have seen many of you walk in with deer-in-the-headlights energy. If too many options overwhelm you, well, we can’t help you with that other than to encourage you to just lean in and try ‘em all. Not at once, obviously. But grab a pint to sip while you shop. It’s a genius business model.
properties.name: Bottleshop 48

properties.blurb: Boulder Social takes the “social” in its name seriously. It’s the kind of place built for gathering, sharing, and staying awhile. With a 10-barrel brew house, a lineup of drinks that go well beyond just beer, and a menu stacked with shareable apps, pizzas, burgers, and entrées, there’s something for every craving. Add in a dog-friendly covered patio and a calendar full of reasons to stop by. From seasonal tappings to watch parties. You’ve got the perfect excuse to be social any day of the week.
properties.name: Boulder Social

properties.blurb:
Arguably KC’s most iconic craft brewery, Boulevard Brewing Company has been around since 1989, combining old and new brewing techniques to craft the perfect pours. In 2016 they opened their Tours & Rec Center next door, which boasts a sprawling Beer Hall, Test Bar with the latest and greatest straight from the brewery, and gift shop featuring beer swag and exclusive releases.

**Deal good for any Boulevard Beverage excluding Brewhouse One releases**
properties.name: Boulevard Beer Hall

properties.address: 15353 E Hinsdale Cir STE C, Centennial, CO 80112, USA
