properties.blurb: This isn’t just whiskey. It’s Colorado in a bottle. Branch & Barrel Distilling builds their award-winning bourbon on Colorado prairie corn from a dairy co-op in Wiggins, with a little barley for richness and water pulled straight from the Arapahoe Aquifer via wells on the owner's property. The result? Smooth, sweet, and proudly local. 17 awards and counting. Call it corny if you want, but every sip tastes like Colorado done right.
properties.name: Branch & Barrel Distilling

properties.address: 132 S Main St, Lime Ridge, WI 53942
properties.blurb: Step into the warm embrace of farm-to-fork goodness at Branding Iron Roadhouse Farm-to-Fork Eatery. This unique country roadhouse has been delighting taste buds with mouthwatering food made from locally-grown Fearing Angus Beef and other top-notch local products. Your Friday nights just got better with the traditional Wisconsin Friday Night Fish Fry, served straight from the fryer to your plate. And when it comes to burgers, just let them know your preference—whether rare or well-done, they've got you covered! But it's not just the food that shines here. Wisconsin and Regional Micro-brews grace the taps, with a tempting selection of Wisconsin brewed beers available by the bottle. Go ahead, explore their beer list, and you'll surely discover something that tickles your taste buds!
properties.name: Branding Iron Roadhouse Farm-to-Fork Eatery

properties.address: 1205 W Mt Royal Ave, Baltimore, MD 21217
properties.blurb: We’ve got two words for you: Taco. Tuesday. Probably the two best words ever strung together in this modern age if we’re being honest. Except maybe Jazz Brunch. Or Whiskey Wednesday. Of course, then there’s tap list…shoot, what was the question again? Oh, that’s right – when are you going to be here? The folks here at Brass Tap knew exactly what they were doing to make the people happy. Did we mention they’re serving up donut holes as a side during brunch? That did it right? Yeah we thought so.
properties.name: Brass Tap (Baltimore)

properties.blurb: It’s a magical feeling to drink a cold beer while looking up at the mountains. Whether you’re in town for a ski trip or just want a place to drink great beer, Breckenridge Brewery is a must. Their rotating beer menu includes seasonal options and longstanding favorites like the Avalanche Amber Ale. Food options include burgers, wings, and other satisfying pub specialties.
properties.name: Breckenridge Brewery

properties.address: 1020 E Lincoln Ave, Fort Collins, CO 80524, USA
properties.name: Breckenridge Brewery (Fort Collins)

properties.blurb: Think of Breckenridge Brewery’s Littleton location as grown-up summer camp. You know, the kind of camp where you can take a brewery tour, and then play bags, and then catch some live music while you drink a Juice Drop Hazy IPA. The grounds are massive, so bring your besties and plan to make a day of it. And don’t be surprised if you end up singing camp songs around the fire pit by the end.
properties.name: Breckenridge Brewery (Littleton)

properties.blurb: Oh Breckenridge Taphouse, where do we begin? Is it with your buffalo tacos or your smoked elk sausage? Do we point to the generous selection of beers on tap or the ultra cozy vibes of your outdoor patio? OK, you get it: we’re fans. We could say more, but why not stop in for a drink and see for yourself.
properties.name: Breckenridge Taphouse

properties.blurb: Located in a gorgeously renovated space, Bremer Brewing Company opened in the fall of 2021 and has been attracting local fans ever since. And no wonder! Their beers are some of the best around, and they bring in a rotating cast of food trucks to satisfy your other cravings. Order a flight that includes the C33 Creamery and the Harvester to see what all the fuss is about.
properties.name: Bremer Brewing Co

properties.address: 5856 Grand Oro Ln, Unit 104, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544
properties.blurb: Brew Bar offers a totally unique beer drinking experience. Their self pour model is genius for our loyal PubPassers, those of you who like to try a little bit of everything. At Brew Bar, you pay buy the ounce so you can sample ALL the beers. Or you can just pour one of your favorites and let your friends have all the fun. With a changing lineup of local craft beers, wine, seltzers, and cocktails, you are guaranteed to find something that pleases your palate.
properties.name: Brew Bar (Wesley Chapel)

properties.blurb: Brew Hub has a lot of plans when it comes to helping craft brewers expand their distribution. Thankfully for the rest of us, they also have a lot of beers on tap at their brewery and tasting room. Stop by this Lakeland-area brewery for a drinking menu including Cherry Lime Guava Seltzer, fruit beers, an Orange & Vanilla Stronger Lager, and a Key Lime Pie Berliner.
properties.name: Brew Hub

properties.blurb: An accountant, an industrial real estate broker, an IT entrepreneur, and a college professor walked into a bar… and decided to open a brewery together. That last part isn’t just a bad punchline: Brew Lab is now a thriving brewery, taproom, and American/Tex-Mex kitchen, along with being Kansas City’s only YouBrew (where you can become brewmaster for a day). After all, they call themselves “a craft beer lover’s theme park” for a reason.
properties.name: Brew Lab Brewery & Taproom

properties.blurb: BrewDog Denver is an absolute gem, especially for those taco lovers out there. Their menu boasts everything from stacked burgers and sharable plates to salads and a kids menu. The standout? Their legendary tacos, featuring Mondragón family recipes like Cochinita Pibil and Birria. With plenty of vegan and vegetarian options, there's something for everyone. Plus, with 30 taps pouring BrewDog's best and Colorado's finest, it's a beer lover's paradise.
properties.name: BrewDog Denver

properties.address: 120 N Main St Suite L40, Hartford, WI 53027
properties.blurb: By the pricking of our thumbs, something tasty this way comes. If you find yourself titillated by all things eccentric, funky, and peculiar and want to toast to those delights, this is your new go-to haunt. With an excellent selection of sippables, and some shareables, not to mention a deep love of the local community, it is clear that not all omens are bad.
properties.name: Brewed Omen

properties.blurb: Brewery Rickoli doesn’t need fancy equipment or a big operation to brew up some of the best beer in Denver.They brew on a tiny 3BBL system, using a cooler that's held together with PVC and duct tape. But don’t let that fool you. What they lack in size, they make up for in flavor. They pride themselves on brewing big, high-gravity, well-balanced brews that keep all 16 of their taps filled. One thing that sets Brewery Rickoli apart is their gluten-removed beers that actually taste like beer. They want everyone to be able to enjoy a cold one, and their brews truly deliver. For those who prefer something lighter, their M.E.H Cream Ale is a refreshing option with a kiss of hops. And for those who like their beer with a little more complexity, the Quicher Bichen is a German-hopped brew with fruity notes. So if you're looking for big flavors in a small space, head on over to Brewery Rickoli.
properties.name: Brewery Rickoli

properties.address: Corner of Loyola and Girod, 734 Loyola Ave, New Orleans, LA 70113
properties.blurb: This isn't your ordinary brewery experience - it's an extraordinary journey of flavors and fun. Step inside and be captivated by the sleek and stylish ambiance that sets the stage for an unforgettable time. Whether you're planning a date night, getting pumped for a night out, or simply seeking the best of New Orleans' culinary scene, Brewery Saint X has got you covered. Indulge in their excellent menu offerings that perfectly complement their wide array of tantalizing beers. Get ready to elevate your taste buds to saintly heights at Brewery Saint X!
properties.name: Brewery Saint X

properties.address: N58W39800 Industrial Rd suite d, Oconomowoc, WI 53066
properties.blurb: Brewfinify may be a little tricky to track down, but that’s part of the fun. Step inside and you’ll discover Oconomowoc’s original on-site brewery, pouring 16 freshly brewed craft beers that cover the full spectrum of styles. Pair your pint with some laid-back snacks, settle into the relaxed taproom, and enjoy the kind of atmosphere that makes time slow down. After all, the best spots are always a little hidden.
properties.name: Brewfinity Brewing Co

properties.address: 1848 Kings Cir S, Neptune Beach, FL 32266
properties.blurb: Dog-friendly bars and brewpubs are nothing new, but believe us when we tell you, dearest canine- and beer-loving friends, that this place is on a whole other level. Pups get to go HAM in “The Yard,” a super spacious off-leash area filled with dog-friendly turf, “splash pad” water features, ample shade and plenty of treats. There’s even trained ”Ruffarees” on site to deescalate any extracurricular activity between intermingling mutts. Owners are invited to sip on ever-rotating taps of excellent local craft beers and wine on “The Porch,” a covered concession-style bar. What a ter-ruff-ic concept! We also love that Brewhound is female created, owned-and-operated.
properties.name: Brewhound Dog Park + Bar

properties.blurb: You will instantly feel like you're part of a community where the love for craft brews unites. "You brewlong here" isn't just a catchy motto, it's a promise. From an extensive tap list that seems to go on forever to the regular visits from awesome food trucks, Brewlando is more than a place to grab a drink. It's where unforgettable memories are brewed. This isn't just a one-time visit; it's a place that calls you back, time and time again. So, if you're looking for more than just a pub, if you're searching for that perfect blend of flavors and friendship, then Brewlando is your ultimate destination.
properties.name: Brewlando Brewing

properties.blurb: Rocking a 1950’s supper club vibe on the outside, inside Brewski’s is a classic sports bar free of all pretension, right in the heart of Packer Country. Cold drafts? Summer Shandy by the firepit? Absolutely. With ample space for big groups, multiple big screens, and a lively atmosphere, Brewski’s is the ultimate spot to catch all your favorite sports. Whether you're a die-hard fan or just in it for the good times, Brewski’s Sports Club is the place to be. Come for the game, stay for the unforgettable experience!
properties.name: Brewski's Sports Club

properties.blurb: They say, “To eat is to enjoy, “ and by golly we’d be hard pressed to disagree. Pay close attention now - Brisket. Made from SCRATCH. Thin crust Chicago pizza. Queso Mac and Cheese Dog. Boursin stuffed mushroom caps…We’ve gotten carried away, so sorry. You’ll find your classic domestic drafts/cans available here but if you want that extra razzle dazzle in your day, do yourself a favor and order one of their cocktails. The Gold Glove is our favorite but you can never go wrong with a 7th Inning Stretch.
properties.name: Brick & Ivy Rooftop

properties.blurb: Come for the 20 beers on tap. Stay for the largest big-screen TV in the Cedar Rapids area. Brick Alley & Sports Bar has stadium seating for Hawkeye fans, as well as indoor and outdoor patio seating overlooking the art in the alley for the less sporty types. This dedication to sports, though, shouldn’t be surprising to anyone who knows the bar’s owner: after all, he coached youth sports in Marion for over 15 years.
properties.name: Brick Alley & Sports Bar

properties.blurb: There’s not a bad seat in the house if you’re looking to take in the game, and that extends beyond just the bar as flatscreens hang like chandeliers. Even the comfy couch-like seating encourages you to stay for a couple hours. A wide range of gastropub standards will help soak up any one of their creative cocktail concoctions, like the Peanut Butter Old Fashioned or the Strawberry Coconut Margarita. Or opt to stay and root for your squad with any of their 7 or so draft options.
properties.name: Brick House Tavern + Tap

properties.blurb: With an impressive lineup of 63 beers on tap, this cozy establishment offers something to satisfy every beer lover's craving. Known as Mississippi's Craft Beer Headquarters, Brickhaus Brewtique takes pride in offering a diverse selection of statewide microbrewery delights. From bold Double IPAs that pack a punch to crisp and refreshing craft beer specialties, customers can explore a wide range of flavors. But the adventure doesn't stop there! The tap wall is a treasure trove of regional and national breweries, pouring out regular favorites and exciting seasonal varieties that are sure to tickle every palate. And the best part? Brickhaus Brewtique has the food to match their brews! The menu is packed with all the goodness one would expect from a top-notch beer spot, ensuring the perfect accompaniment to any chosen brew.
properties.name: Brickhaus Brewtique

properties.blurb: We aren’t very good at keeping secrets, especially when it has to do with awesome sports bars so we are letting the cat out of the bag when it comes to Brickhouse Sports Bar. The drinks are incredible and the vibes are just right. With darts and pool tables there is always something to do. Huge TV’s and live music create an atmosphere you can hang out in for hours. And the staff? So wonderful, inviting, and friendly. They will make you feel right at home as soon as you walk in the door.
properties.name: Brickhouse Sports Bar

properties.blurb: Steps away from the vibrant Vieux Carré, there's a haven for wonderfully strange brews that'll blow your taste buds away! Welcome to Brieux Carre Brewing Co, where the magic of New Orleans comes alive in every sip. In this part of town, we know that strange is a synonym for amazing! With a dash of creativity and a whole lot of passion, Brieux Carre is the perfect spot for beer enthusiasts looking for a unique adventure.
properties.name: Brieux Carré Brewing Co

properties.address: 50 W Park Ave, Long Beach, NY 11561, USA
properties.name: Bright Eye Beer Co

properties.address: 1604 S Cascade Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80905
properties.blurb: Located in a historic former elementary school, Bristol Brewing Co. offers all manner of scholarly pursuits. Like shuffleboard. And a seasonal beer garden. And, of course, an annual Prohibition-themed Party with 33 cent Pilsners. Plus, on Tuesdays from 6 to 8pm, they donate a dollar from every pint to a featured local nonprofit of the week.
properties.name: Bristol Brewing Co

properties.address: 119 S 2nd St, Mt Horeb, WI 53572, USA
properties.blurb: Want farm-fresh food and cider without selling your house, moving to the country, and waking up at dawn to milk something? Brix Cider has you covered. Their small-batch ciders are made with locally grown apples, and the scratch kitchen menu changes with the seasons and it is always spotlighting what’s freshest from nearby farms. It’s farm-to-table without the farm chores.
properties.name: Brix Cider

properties.blurb: The par for this course is never having your game canceled due to weather, a top tier bar selection, and finding your new favorite hangout. It’s the perfect location for an anytime hangout with your friends or a business meeting set up for tee time. You can test your swing on greens from around the world while you sip on your favorite craft beer or cocktail and not worry about who’s turn it is to be caddy.
properties.name: Broheim's Indoor Golf & Pub

properties.blurb: A community-driven co-op in Northeast where the shareholders have a significant voice explains all the good vibes this place emits, along with trivia and gameday events for good measure. It also might have something to do with Unstable Unicorn and Forbidden Hugs—two tasty beers on the tap list that were likely named after tipping a few. Just a hunch.
properties.name: Broken Clock Brewing Cooperative

properties.blurb: Embark on a tantalizing journey at Buds and Brews, Tennessee's pioneering cannabis-infused restaurant and bar. Delight in the flavors of the South with their signature Southern Fried Chicken, a crispy masterpiece that can be enjoyed with a delectable THC-infused sauce for an added twist. For a delightful twist on classic comfort food, indulge in the Grilled Muncheese, a gooey and savory delight that will leave your taste buds craving for more. Accompany your meal with a diverse selection from their extensive bar list, featuring craft beers, fine wines, and expertly crafted cocktails. At Buds and Brews, experience the perfect blend of Southern cuisine and cannabis-infused delights for an unforgettable dining adventure.
properties.name: Buds and Brews

properties.address: 1221 E Lovejoy St, Buffalo, NY 14206, USA
properties.name: Buffalo Olde Brewery

properties.blurb: What we love most about Buffalo Tap House are the bartenders - every single one of them slinging beers behind the bar will make you feel welcome. They won’t judge you if you wanna put away some wings or nachos while you watch the Bills fight for their lives on the field. They’ll remind you that the football season is long enough that you can probably even try all 31 beers on tap. Awesome beer lineup + cool people = the raddest neighborhood bar in downtown Buffalo.
properties.name: Buffalo Tap House

properties.address: 11751 S Cleveland Ave, Fort Myers, FL 33907
properties.blurb: As its name might suggest, this sports restaurant has a sprawling wings menu. It also has salads, burgers, sandwiches, and more than 50 TVs to catch the game on. And yes, we would never feature a restaurant without a drink menu: Wings and Rings has both classic and signature cocktails, plus fun non-alcoholic options like Pop Rocking Lemonade.
properties.name: Buffalo Wings and Rings

properties.address: 225 King St Unit B, Cocoa, FL 32922, USA
properties.blurb: These two seasoned brewers with over 50 years of combined experience, are on a mission to bring you the finest craft beer experience ever! These guys are truly Bugnutty about brewing, and their passion shines through in every sip.This taproom is a hidden gem with a laid-back industrial vibe, offering a glimpse of the brewing magic in action. It's like stepping into a time capsule—this building, once a 1932 Buick dealership, now houses the makings of some seriously delicious brews. And the fun doesn't stop there! With a 12-foot big screen TV, live music, and great pub grub, Bugnutty Brewing Co is a complete experience in itself.
properties.name: Bugnutty Brewing Co

properties.address: 5916 Excelsior Blvd., St. Louis Park, MN 55416
properties.blurb: A St. Louis Park staple since the 1930s, Bunny’s is always buzzing with locals. Into sportsball? Then you’ve come to the right place, pal. 30-plus TVs airing nothing but athletics of all sorts. Accompany that with an extensive menu (Psst! Get the Kramarczuk’s Polish Sausage) and more beers than you can shake a stick at. If you’re looking for the cool kids, we’ll be in Sherm’s Bar, pulling tabs and scarfing down some free popcorn.
properties.name: Bunny's Bar and Grill (St. Louis Park)

properties.blurb: Craftsmanship and community converge to create something truly special at Bur Oak Brewing Co. These beer enthusiasts are on a mission to brew beers that not only satisfy the taste buds but also bring people together. At Bur Oak, you'll find a carefully curated selection of well-crafted beers that reflect their passion for the craft. Each brew is thoughtfully created to deliver a delightful experience with every sip.But it's not just about the beer here; it's about fostering a sense of togetherness and camaraderie. Bur Oak Brewing Company thrives on the belief that good beer is best enjoyed with good company. So, whether you're a beer connoisseur or a casual drinker, you'll always feel welcome in this community-focused brewery.
properties.name: Bur Oak Brewing Co

properties.address: 18303 Perkins Rd E, Baton Rouge, LA 70810, USA
properties.blurb: At Burgersmith, they don't just create a fantastic atmosphere; they're all about crafting the tastiest, most authentic burgers around. They round up the freshest ingredients, from the buns and veggies to the sweet, juicy beef, to bring you burger perfection. So, whether you're seated at their handsome bar, in a hip dining booth, or soaking up the sun on the outdoor patio, you'll know that wherever you see the Burgersmith sign, you're in for a treat. This is the place where hamburgers are made with honest-to-goodness craftsmanship.
properties.name: Burgersmith Highland

properties.address: 730 Lakeside Plaza, Lake St Louis, MO 63367
properties.blurb: Small-batch meads take center stage in a setting designed for relaxation and pure enjoyment. Whether you're new to the world of mead or a seasoned enthusiast, you'll find yourself in mead heaven with their fantastic selection of fun and unique flavors. One sip of their Sunshine Mead, and you'll understand why it's expertly named; it's like drinking pure sunshine captured in a glass. The taste experience will leave you with a warm, happy feeling that brightens even the cloudiest of days. And let's not forget about the perfect pairing for all that mead goodness—mouthwatering pizzas! Just ask about their selection of delicious pizzas that complement the meads and make your experience at Burnt Barrel Meadery even more delightful.
properties.name: Burnt Barrel Brewing, Distillery & Mead

properties.blurb: With 16 taps and a smoker that runs 24 hours a day you will always find fresh smoked meats and house brewed beers. Now add that the owners have raised over $10,000 for local and global charities through their Bussey Brew For Good program. They even have gluten-sensitive, vegetarian and vegan options available. Smoked tofu? Say less, we are already on our way.
properties.name: Busey Brews

properties.blurb: Buzzard Billy’s brings that cajun taste of NOLA to Des Moines and it’s almost as unexpected a pairing as breakfast and hurricane. Yeah, we didn’t realize you could just throw the word “breakfast” in front of an alcoholic beverage and call it cool. Breakfast catfish goes by the name of Morning Catch, and pairs well with the aforementioned brekkie cocktail. Who knew? A legit cajun restaurant in the middle of Iowa!
properties.name: Buzzard Billy's

properties.blurb: True to its name, Bärchen Beer Garden has beer. But this German-style biergarten also has an American twist, boasting some of the best burgers and sandwiches in Omaha. And with 30 beers on tap and a wide selection of wine, cocktails, and spirits, no German — nor American— can resist it.
properties.name: Bärchen Beer Garden

properties.blurb: At Bao, you have two choices: to reserve the elegant Tea Room, with Peking duck, whole fish, and cocktails inspired by different styles of tea, or to step into the lively Tap Room, with Chinese influenced beer and street food. The Tea Room is inspired by “traditional China” with dark woods, deep reds, and ambient lighting. The Tap Room is decorated with neon, graffiti murals, and a floating dragon, and offers a drink called Aloe Darkness My Old Friend. Get ready to hear the gong.
properties.name: Băo Brewhouse

properties.address: 9535 Park Meadows Dr unit b, Lone Tree, CO 80124, USA
properties.name: Caddy Shack Cantina

properties.blurb: Look, we know we’re beer nerds, but Café Piazza has made us an offer we can’t refuse: hand-tossed pizza in the traditional Sicilian style. It’s delicious paired with a beer and the knowledge that the owner is a second-generation, professionally trained pizza maker, which basically makes him the Godfather of dough. Don’t forget to look up at the gigantic mural spray-painted on the ceiling while you’re here.
properties.name: Café Piazza

properties.address: 3826 Sherman St, San Diego, CA 92110, USA
properties.name: California Wild Ales

properties.blurb: Besides great beer, you never quite know what you’ll find at Call to Arms Brewing. You might walk in to a comedy night, pottery painting, or a monthly themed party. If you love the idea of all that variety packed in to one place, let’s talk about the beer. They have 14 taps showcasing a wide range of styles, from modern twists to resurrected classics.
properties.name: Call To Arms Brewing

properties.address: 1340 Burlington St, North Kansas City, MO 64116
properties.blurb: We love working with people that not only provide us with exceptional beer, but also work to support their community. As a veteran-owned brewery, the owners have made a space that is dedicated to supporting those who have served, and still serve today. Make sure you take your turn at the Trooper Appreciation Wall! Here you will find an intimate place filled with friends, a treasure trove of games and activities, an extensive beer list, AND BEERTAILS. Yes. We said beertails, and in fact, they can proudly claim the OG creators title. We’d suggest you hit about…Mach 5 and buzz on down here sooner rather than later.
properties.name: Callsign Brewing

properties.blurb: Trust fund kids are totally welcome in this brewery. But it’s important to the owners that you know they’re not among them. Nick and Karen did most of the funding, renovating, and building of Camber Brewing themselves, along with some much-appreciated help from friends and family. Gluten-allergics rejoice: this brewery serves gluten-reduced beer and gluten-free seltzer!
properties.name: Camber Brewing

properties.blurb: Camino describes itself as "unfussy" and we concur. This is the neighborhood bar you all wish was in your neighborhood. If a local beer is noteworthy? It'll probably be on tap here. Bring your hunger for a baller burger or creative takes on getting your veggies like the Brussels Grinder. On Mondays? Said burger is available for five American dollars. Is that even legal? It is for now. Get in here and join the party, already!
properties.name: Camino

properties.address: 7211 W Greenfield Ave, West Allis, WI 53214
properties.blurb: We all know that Camino is in it to win it with their food game - their cooks come in swinging and hit their mark every time. The West Allis location is giving all the hits that you might know and love from Milwaukee AND serving up brunch selections that are going to change your whole life. If you feel so bold as to doubt us, go ahead and take a bite out of the Nashville Chicken Waffles or the Carlos Burrito and then try to tell us we’re wrong.
properties.name: Camino (West Allis)

properties.blurb: Capital Brewery Co has been brewing German-style lagers since '84, and still use authentic copper kettles. Plus, they've got American ales, barrel-aged beers, and a cool Bier Garten open May-October. Sustainability? They're on it with solar panels and feeding local cattle. Indoor options available too. Tours? Yep, they've got those too!
properties.name: Capital Brewery

properties.address: 1728 St Charles Ave, New Orleans, LA 70130, USA
properties.blurb: Care Forgot Beercraft is one place we’ll never forget. Mainly because the beer is that good and the pizza is impossible to ignore. From New Orleans-inspired brews to an ever-changing events schedule, this spot keeps us coming back again and again. The only thing we might forget? That we were having a bad day before we walked in.
properties.name: Care Forgot Beercraft

properties.blurb: Step into the quintessential dive bar experience at Carl's Place, where you'll discover the true essence of a local favorite. As soon as you walk through the doors, you'll be greeted with a warm and welcoming atmosphere that instantly makes you feel like part of the family. With its unpretentious charm and laid-back vibe, Carl's Place embodies everything a dive bar should be. Whether you're a regular or a first-time visitor, you'll be met with friendly faces and genuine hospitality that sets this place apart. So pull up a stool, grab a cold brew, and enjoy the company of good friends and even better conversations. When it comes to finding a friendly and down-to-earth spot in Des Moines, look no further than Carl's Place.
properties.name: Carl's Place

properties.blurb: There are probably dozens, nay, hundreds, of bars like The Carney Tap scattered all across Iowa, so you might be wondering what’s so special about this little joint in Ankeny. Well, the beer is cold. The stools are comfy. The neon lights from the beer signs are well lit. And that might be true at a lot of places, but at The Carney Tap, the people make the difference. The welcoming regulars and the friendly bartenders are some of the best people you’ll meet anywhere in the Midwest.
properties.name: Carney Tap

properties.blurb: Cart-Driver’s name is inspired by the Carrettiera, who brought goods from Southern Italy’s farms to its villages via horse-drawn cart, stopping to bring dishes to the people he met. That spirit is alive and well at this LoHi location, nestled in Denver’s historic Highlands neighborhood. Settle in for the Italian experience with artisanal wood-fired pizzas, freshly flown-in oysters, a rotating array of wines, Italian spritzes, local brews, and craft cocktails.
properties.name: Cart and Driver (LoHi)

properties.blurb: Cart-Driver’s name is inspired by the Carrettiera, who brought goods from Southern Italy’s farms to its villages via horse-drawn cart, stopping to bring dishes to the people he met. That spirit is alive and well at this RiNo restaurant, tucked in a 640 square food shipping container space. Settle in for the Italian experience with premium wood-fired pizzas, freshly flown-in oysters, prosecco on tap, Italian spritzes, local brews, and craft cocktails.
properties.name: Cart and Driver (RiNo)

properties.address: 8800 S Colorado Blvd Unit G, Highlands Ranch, CO 80126
properties.blurb: In the good ol days, there were Tex-Mex places seemingly everywhere. Luckily, Casa Caliente is still as classic as it gets. An impressive tequila list, domestic and import drafts, margaritas and boozy shakes, and that nostalgic aroma of sizzling fajitas coasting through the dining room where dried chiles hang from above. Get up early on Sunday for their brunch with ultra tasty Huevos Rancheros. Never leave us, Casa Caliente!
properties.name: Casa Caliente Mexican Restaurant

properties.blurb: The culinary journey from Jerusalem to Wisconsin brings you the most exquisite Middle Eastern flavors and warm hospitality. Meet Chef Jesse Musa, the mastermind behind the magical tastes that will transport you to a world of spices and culinary delights. Hailing from Jerusalem, Chef Jesse's upbringing was steeped in the aromas of exotic spices and a deep-rooted passion for crafting simple yet incredibly flavorful dishes. His dream was to share the richness of Middle Eastern cuisine with the vibrant city of Milwaukee. Here you'll experience the authentic taste of the region, bringing a piece of the Middle East to your plate. From aromatic spice blends to mouthwatering delicacies, Casablanca promises a feast of flavors that will leave you craving more.
properties.name: Casablanca (Brookfield)

properties.blurb: The culinary journey from Jerusalem to Milwaukee brings you the most exquisite Middle Eastern flavors and warm hospitality. Meet Chef Jesse Musa, the mastermind behind the magical tastes that will transport you to a world of spices and culinary delights. Hailing from Jerusalem, Chef Jesse's upbringing was steeped in the aromas of exotic spices and a deep-rooted passion for crafting simple yet incredibly flavorful dishes. His dream was to share the richness of Middle Eastern cuisine with the vibrant city of Milwaukee. Here you'll experience the authentic taste of the region, bringing a piece of the Middle East to your plate. From aromatic spice blends to mouthwatering delicacies, Casablanca promises a feast of flavors that will leave you craving more.
properties.name: Casablanca (Milwaukee)

properties.address: 1845 E Broadway Rd suite 106, Tempe, AZ 85282, USA
properties.blurb: The catalyst of a good time starts here. Catalyst Crafted Ales stirs up Tempe’s craft beer scene with inventive house-brewed ales, a menu full of crowd-pleasing bites, and a vibe that keeps friends coming back. From Thursday trivia to live music and weekend brunch, this is where fun, flavor, and community collide. So grab a pint and see what kind of reaction you get.
properties.name: Catalyst Crafted Ales

properties.blurb: Proudly connected to over 30 other local businesses, Cedar Creek Pub sits a jump from the Fitzsimons Medical Campus. What better treatment would you need than one of ten draft options like the Native Pear Cider from Downeast or the Rucana Tangerine Sour from Ecliptic. Maybe the prescription is the Pow Pow Pils from WeldWerks? How bout just take two elk burgers and call us in the morning.
properties.name: Cedar Creek Pub

properties.blurb: At Celebration Brewing, life’s too short for ordinary beer. With a range of flagship brews from light and refreshing to bold and dark, there’s something for every palate. Their commitment to farm-to-table dining shines through a menu crafted by a third-generation chef, pairing perfectly with their beers. Celebration Brewing is all about bringing the community together, whether you're a local or just visiting. Stop by, grab a pint, and enjoy the celebration!
properties.name: Celebration Brewing Co

properties.address: 5800 S Federal Blvd, Littleton, CO 80123, USA
properties.name: Centennial Grill

properties.blurb: While known across Waukee for their stellar burgers, Central Standard also sports two dozen drafts at any given time. Focusing on the finest of the Midwest, you’ll encounter gems like the Double Blackberry Sour from Big Grove in Iowa City, or the Ruthie Lager from Exile in Des Moines. Double patty burgers come standard and if that doesn’t seal the deal, how bout a Shake of the Month that you can even opt to booze up.
properties.name: Central Standard

properties.blurb: Central Waters Brewing has brought their exceptional craft to Milwaukee, and we couldn't be happier about it. Their presence in the city adds a whole new level of excitement to the beer scene, and boy, do they know how to make an entrance. Their tap lineup is nothing short of killer, showcasing a range of brews that will have your taste buds dancing with joy. The passion they have for their craft is palpable in every pour, and their enthusiasm to serve you is infectious.But it's not just about the brews at Central Waters Brewing, oh no. They're taking things up a notch by teaming up with Trouble Makers Cocina. Prepare to have your culinary senses awakened as these innovative chefs put their spin on Mexican cuisine, creating a symphony of flavors that perfectly complements their brews.
properties.name: Central Waters Brewing Co

properties.blurb: The people* have spoken! Don’t sleep on Central Waters Brewing - it is one of the best in the fine state of Wisconsin. And if you know Wisconsin, you know that’s quite the compliment. Their barrel-aged brews are simply unbeatable, they offer an impressive lineup of year-rounds, and the seasonals are so good you’ll wish they were anything but. We suggest taking one of those summer seasonals outside on the patio to enjoy the warmth while it lasts. *Us. We’re the people.
properties.name: Central Waters Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Right in the heart of Wynwood, Cervecería La Tropical serves up bold, flavorful beers as colorful as the neighborhood itself. Pair them with Latin-inspired bites, soak in the live music, and let the energy of Miami carry you from happy hour into the late-night buzz. It’s the kind of spot where you might pop in for a quick pint and leave hours later, caught up in the vibrant beats, the lively crowd, and the aroma of delicious food. The beers are as creative as the murals outside, and the good vibes? They never quit.
properties.name: Cerveceria La Tropical

properties.blurb: If you're wondering, it’s pronounced “Cha-yes, please.” Chafunkta is the kind of family-owned brewery that every watering hole dreams of being. Their taproom is a go-to spot for weekly events and a beer menu with something for everyone. Whether you’re grabbing a glass, a pint, or a crowler to go, you’ll find your new favorite brew here. Wanna mix it up? They’re always ready to pour something you won’t forget.
properties.name: Chafunkta Brewing Co

properties.blurb: The folks at Chandeleur Island Brewing lean into the laid back vibe you’ll find all along the Gulf Coast. They happen to do it with tasty brews, a chill atmosphere, and friendly bartenders. Chandeleur Island Brewing is the kind of place the locals take their out-of-town guests to impress them with a refreshing sour or lip-smacking IPA. So shake the sand off your toes, settle in, and order a couple of flights and revel in the spirit of the coast.
properties.name: Chandeleur Island Brewing Co

properties.address: 1700 Tamiami Trl Unit A-5, Port Charlotte, FL 33948, USA
properties.name: Charlie Foxtrot Brewing

properties.blurb: Your classic neighborhood bar, but a million times better. You’ll be thinking of grandma’s home cooking when you bite into a delectable homemade pot pie while sipping on a local craft porter. Tip: Arrive early for big sports games to snag the best spot. Better tip: Don’t wear a Raiders jersey.
properties.name: Charlie Hooper's

properties.blurb: No lie, we pretty much grew up here. Before we were of drinking age, our parents would take the whole fam damily to Chatterbox for a good old-fashioned pizza night. We'd pound pie, play video games, and suck down soda until we were silly. These days—with our parents no longer keeping a watchful eye on us—we still pound pie and play video games, but now we're sucking down suds until we're silly.
properties.name: Chatterbox Pub

properties.blurb: Checkerspot checks a lot of our boxes. The knowledgeable bar staff can help you navigate the tap list, which is full of flavor combos that are unique and surprising. We also love that each is crafted with locally sourced ingredients. Our faves include the Juniperus IPA, which makes us feel like we’re hiking in the Pacific Northwest, and not, you know, chilling on a patio in Baltimore. But a great beer can transport you and that’s exactly what the beers at Checkerspot do.
properties.name: Checkerspot Brewing

properties.address: N1671 Honey Creek Rd, Monroe, WI 53566
properties.blurb: Farm-to-table isn’t just for food. This five-generation family farm started over 100 years ago, and plants, grows, and harvests all the barley, wheat, hops, fruits, nuts, berries, and herbs that goes into their beer. They start by brewing their signature base beer (Agriculture Ale), and infusing it on a variety of farm-grown crops for flavor and aroma combinations. And if you think you can't taste that farm-fresh difference... you would be wrong.
properties.name: Cheese City Beer Farm

properties.address: 1320 Triad Center Dr, St Peters, MO 63376, USA
properties.blurb: Here the beer experience reaches new heights in a crafty and inviting setting. Prepare to be delighted by their exceptional selection of beverages, where great people and great beer come together. With a remarkable lineup of 30 taps that continuously rotate, alongside an array of cans, bottles, wines, seltzers, and ciders, there's something to satisfy every taste preference. But Chillax Tap & Co offers more than just a phenomenal drink selection. Valis Brothers, their full-service restaurant, tantalizes the taste buds with a diverse menu that caters to all palates. From appetizing bites to hearty dishes, their food options complement the outstanding libations perfectly.
properties.name: Chillax Tap & Co (St.Peters)

properties.blurb: “Whose motorcycle is this?” -”It’s a chopper, baby.” And this sportsbar is total Bronco country. 30 plus flatscreens! That’s better than jacking into the Matrix. With a Nice patio for those sunny days and a game room for those not-so-sunny ones, Choppers has something for ya even if you don’t bleed the orange and navy blue. Bison burgers, wraps, and mac and cheese will give you the energy to get through the game, and an extensive draft selection will help soothe any on-the-field loss. Nice patio too for those sunny days.
properties.name: Chopper's Sports Grill

properties.blurb: Kick back and enjoy the laid-back vibe at our fun cantina — the perfect stop before or after a show at Mission Ballroom. With multiple draft lines, craft cocktails, and plenty of wine, start things off with a lineup of crave-worthy appetizers, from queso and guacamole to elote and empanadas. We’re all about quality local ingredients, serving up taco classics like carnitas and carne asada alongside creative favorites like our mushroom taco with chimichurri and the shrimp & chorizo. You can't go wrong at the Chubby Unicorn!
properties.name: Chubby Unicorn Cantina

properties.address: 3924 W Spruce St, Tampa, FL 33607, USA
properties.blurb: Cigar City Brewing has held steadfast in its unwavering dedication to crafting the most impeccably consistent and highest-quality ales and lagers. This commitment shines brightly through their cutting-edge Quality Assurance and Quality Control initiatives, bolstered by their state-of-the-art Beer Lab. Their relentless pursuit of flavor expansion has led to the creation of some of the most extraordinary and uniquely tropical-inspired beers in the industry. Dive into a world of taste sensations, with offerings like the iconic Jai Alai IPA, the rich Maduro Brown Ale, and the extraordinary Margarita Gose. At Cigar City Brewing, every sip is a journey to tropical paradise!
properties.name: Cigar City Brewing

properties.address: 5837 Mission Gorge Rd A, San Diego, CA 92120, USA
properties.name: Citizen Brewers

properties.address: 101 N Country Club Rd #101, Lake Mary, FL 32746, USA
properties.blurb: Looking for a place that pairs good vibes with great brews? Citrus City Craft in downtown Lake Mary has you covered. Swing by and sip on one of their delicious craft cocktails or beers, all while lounging on the awesome outdoor patio. Got a pup? Perfect! They’re dog-friendly, and your furry friend might even snag the coveted "Pet of the Month" title. Live music? Yep. Special events? Always. Games to fuel your competitive side? You bet. Plus, their draft cocktail system will have your thirst quenched faster than you can say, “another round, please!”
properties.name: Citrus City Craft

properties.blurb: When you step into City Barrel, there's only one way to kick off your visit which is with a taste of pure excellence. Start with their award-winning Rad AF, a New England IPA. It's a delightful burst of juicy mango and papaya, all wrapped up in a pillowy softness that'll keep you coming back for more. With every sip, Citra and Mosaic hops create a symphony of flavor that's downright addictive. But that's just the beginning of the flavor journey. Next up, don't miss the Fancy AF Fries. These are crispy, golden perfection served with a side of RAD AF cheese sauce, bacon, tomato, onion, a drizzle of mustard, and a crown of scallions. Trust us, one order won't cut it; get one for yourself and another for the table to share because you won't want to part with a single bite.
properties.name: City Barrel Brewing Co

properties.address: 2206 Bay St, Fort Myers, FL 33901, USA
properties.name: City Tavern

properties.address: 705 Edgewood St NE, Washington, DC 20017, USA
properties.name: City-State Brewing Co.

properties.blurb: The boundary-pushers at Clear Fork will tell you step-by-step, all the deets included, how they make their cider. It’s a level of confidence that comes with knowing artistry—and a little bit of magic—is all part of the process. Have yourself a Big Britches Dry Cider, and you’ll be feeling some of that artistry and magic deep in your bones.
properties.name: Clear Fork Cider

properties.blurb: Big Dive Energy alert! We love an unfussy, tell-it-like-it-is spot, making Clementines pretty much a dream come true There’s the horseshoe-shaped bar, the pool table, the Elvis pinball. The perfectly simple draught list with exactly the right beers and nothing extra. Given that they open at 6 AM every day, it’s honestly a wonder we haven’t moved right in.
properties.name: Clementines Tavern

properties.address: 750 W Desoto St, Clermont, FL 34711, USA
properties.blurb: At Clermont Brewing Co, they’re all about good beer, live tunes, and even better vibes. Picture this: you're sipping craft beer brewed right on-site, diving into thin-crust pizzas made with house-made dough, or munching on gourmet salads that make veggies feel like VIPs. The fun doesn’t stop. Whether you’re inside their cozy farmhouse-inspired space, kicking back on the patio, or lounging in the lively beer garden. And if “beer’s not your thing” branch out with their excellent wine selection.
properties.name: Clermont Brewing Co

properties.address: 422 Indianola Rd, Des Moines, IA 50315, USA
properties.blurb: Tucked near the Iowa Cubs stadium, Club 2000 is the kind of low-key spot that knows exactly what it’s doing. This neighborhood hidden gem is all about good food, cold drinks, and Cubs games on the TV. Hit them up on Taco Tuesday or Steak Night for solid specials and a cozy, come-as-you-are vibe. The crowd’s easygoing, the beer’s cold, and the grill is always on. ** Deal excludes Barn Town Products **
properties.name: Club 2000

properties.blurb: Club 300 is Wisconsin at its finest. From the old school brick exterior, to the neon beer signs in the windows, it’s everything you expect from a local watering hole. This is the kind of place where the beers are cold, the service is quick, and the patrons are old time locals with nicknames like Bud, who tell stories from the good old days. Bud’s a great guy, seen a lot of things. Grab a bottle of High Life and pull up a stool next to Bud and settle in. He’s got all day and so do you.
properties.name: Club 300

properties.address: 18 1/2 S Clinton St, Iowa City, IA 52240, USA
properties.name: Coa Cantina

properties.address: 425 E Grand Ave, Des Moines, IA 50309
properties.blurb: If you're on the hunt for Des Moines' top-notch tequila bar, look no further than Coa Cantina! Brace yourselves for a fiesta-filled experience as they serve up daily specials, including lip-smacking flavored margaritas and zesty Bloody Marias. And let's not forget their impressive array of drafts to keep the party going strong! Whether it's a birthday bash, an office shindig, or any other special event, Coa Cantina is ready to sprinkle some extra magic and make it a truly memorable affair. Cheers to good times and unforgettable moments!
properties.name: Coa Cantina

properties.address: 2161 McGregor Blvd E, Fort Myers, FL 33901
properties.blurb: What an absolute find! Ft. Myers might not be known for beer, but you wouldn’t believe that for a second if you were going off a visit to Costal Dayz.Trivia and live music keep nights a healthy mix and the lip-smacking Homeport Honey Wheat, the hoppy and floral Amberjack Amber Ale, and citrusy Portside Pale Ale coupled with the best views in Ft. Myers from their patio have cemented Costal Dayz as a Florida fave.
properties.name: Coastal Dayz Brewery

properties.blurb: Get ready for the ultimate collision of good times and great beer at Collision Brewing Co! This lively brewery is all about mixing up a storm of laughter, flavor, and good vibes. With a commitment to using local ingredients, their brews are like a harmonious symphony of freshness. The energetic staff is always ready to make your visit a smash hit, ensuring every moment is filled with laughter and cheer. So buckle up and brace yourself for a collision course of delicious brews, fantastic atmosphere, and memories that will make you say, "Cheers to that!"
properties.name: Collision Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Colorado Bar and Grill is a haven of delightful flavors and good vibes! The friendly staff warmly welcomes every guest, ensuring a memorable experience in this inviting spot. You can indulge in the mouthwatering chicken tacos and beef burrito with beans, both of which are deliciously crafted options sure to satisfy any palate. Entertainment is a priority here! Live music fills the air, adding to the already vibrant ambiance. On Tuesdays, patrons can enjoy free pool, while Wednesdays are dedicated to the beloved Wing Wednesdays—a perfect excuse to relish our delectable wings.
properties.name: Colorado Bar and Grill

properties.blurb: 70 taps. No, that's not a typo. Special consideration to Colorado breweries, the list often includes standours like Bloodaxe Farmouhouse from TRVE and the Mama Peaches IPA from Sanitas. Campfire even features a Brewery of the Month to give even extra shine to a local beer maker.Poblano Cheddar Biscuits and gravy on weekend brunch. Fire pits and picnic table style seating lean into the campfire motif, as well as cocktails aptly named Mallow on the Graham and Up in Smoke had us hoping we could just make this our summer camp location.
properties.name: Colorado Campfire

properties.address: 6209 S Santa Fe Dr, Littleton, CO 80120
properties.blurb: Is there anything better than challenging your friends to old school arcade games while tossing back a couple of ice cold craft beers? The cool folks at Colorado Pinball Pub invite you in to Sip and Flip. That’s right. Come for the nostalgic vibes of the pinball machines and stay for the stellar whiskey lineup. Need a place to cool off after an epic Ms. Pacman battle? The patio is the perfect spot, not that we’re speaking from experience or anything.
properties.name: Colorado Pinball Pub

properties.address: 5642 S Sycamore St, Littleton, CO 80120, USA
properties.name: Comet Brews

properties.blurb: This hotel/brewery – or brewery/hotel – brews house beers on-site. It also offers craft cocktails, hand-selected wines, and tasty small plates. Of course, that’s not all it offers. Nestled in historic Mineral Point, this 1800s-era registered landmark has five luxurious guest rooms equipped with whirlpool bathtubs and fireplaces in addition to its intimate European-styled taproom.
properties.name: Commerce Street Brewery Hotel

properties.address: 1235 Thomas Beck Rd, Des Moines, IA 50315
properties.blurb: Certainly a local favorite, Confluence has fast become a destination for any Midwestern beer aficionado. Shaded patio, massive taproom, and enough bike parking racks to think you’re in Amsterdam, Confluence really is at the top of the game, and not just for Iowa. The Des Moines IPA was without flaw, and the Capital Gold Lager should only be possible in the dreamworld but no, you’re awake, and at Confluence.
properties.name: Confluence Brewing Co

properties.address: 9638 NE 2nd Ave, Miami Shores, FL 33138, USA
properties.blurb: Conscious Brewing may be small in size, but it’s big on intention. This family-owned nano brewery in Downtown Miami Shores puts thought into every pour, making beers that feel as deliberate as the name suggests. No gimmicks, no shortcuts—just carefully crafted brews that make you slow down and actually taste what’s in your glass. Proof that good beer doesn’t just happen; it’s made with purpose.
properties.name: Conscious Brewing

properties.blurb: Contrary to what you may have heard, this ain’t your average brewery. For starters, they offer a Smoked Maple Coffee Porter reminiscent of bacon and the best diner breakfast you’ve ever had. And that’s just one option on their tap list of 20+ beers. If anyone in your party’s feeling a little contrary to beer, they have local cider, wine, and canned cocktails too.
properties.name: Contrary Brewing Co

properties.address: 6800 Sunset Way, St Pete Beach, FL 33706, USA
properties.blurb: Looking for the coolest vibes on the beach? You’ve already found them. Cool Vibes in St. Pete keeps the party rolling with late-night food, great drinks, and live entertainment all just steps from the sand. The kitchen stays open until 2:30 AM, so whether it’s an after-dinner bite, a midnight snack, or fuel to keep the good times going, they’ve got you covered. Beach air, live music, and a place that lives up to its name? That’s the vibe.
properties.name: Cool Vibes On The Beach

properties.blurb: You know that place where everyone’s friendly, the beer is unforgettable, and it somehow feels like your third visit even if it’s your first? That’s Copper Kettle Brewing Co. The husband-and-wife team behind it has been perfecting the craft for over a decade, serving up award-winning beers that range from bold and creative to perfectly classic. (Yes, the Mexican Chocolate Stout is as good as you’ve heard. It might actually be better than you've heard.) Add in rotating food trucks, a cozy taproom, and a staff that treats you like family, and honestly… what are you still doing reading this? Let’s go.
properties.name: Copper Kettle Brewing Co

properties.address: 3455 S Palo Verde Rd #135, Tucson, AZ 85713, USA
properties.blurb: Since day one, the mission at Copper Mine Brewing has been to provide the highest quality beer to their beloved patrons while fostering an environment where individuals can embrace their true selves and enjoy a refreshing pint in the company of family and friends. With an impressive selection of 10 carefully crafted beers, Copper Mine Brewing Co strives to offer something for every taste preference. Join Copper Mine Brewing Co and experience the perfect blend of exceptional brews, warm camaraderie, and unforgettable moments. Here, the pursuit of the finest beer and creating lasting memories go hand in hand.
properties.name: Copper Mine Brewing Co

properties.address: 110 Emery St Suite C, Longmont, CO 80501, USA
properties.name: Copper Sky Distillery

properties.blurb: Step into Cornbred Barbecue, the proud recipient of over 250 prestigious awards, and get ready for a mouthwatering experience. This beloved BBQ joint knows a thing or two about perfectly smoked meats and finger-licking flavors. As you dive into their menu, prepare yourself for a delightful surprise - a constantly rotating beer selection that showcases the best craft brews from local breweries. With 24 tap lines and a variety of cans and bottles, there's always a refreshing drink to complement your BBQ feast. From hoppy IPAs to smooth stouts, their beer menu is sure to please any beer aficionado. But let's not forget the star of the show: their incredible BBQ. Whether it's tender brisket, succulent ribs, or juicy pulled pork, Cornbred Barbecue has mastered the art of crafting unforgettable flavors that will leave you craving more. So grab a seat, grab a cold brew, and prepare to indulge in the best BBQ around. Get ready for a truly award-winning experience at Cornbred Barbecue!
properties.name: Cornbred Barbecue

properties.blurb: Beer on tap is good. Beer on tap with mouthwatering names like Spiced Apple Cider, Key Lime Pie, and Fancy Little Holiday Shindig is better. Come to Corner Tap for 24 rotating taps with whimsical, creative names (our current favorite is Abominable Snowman vs Unicorn) along with some classical options. Not in the mood to go out? Grab a craft beer to-go.
properties.name: Corner Tap

properties.blurb: As the first craft distillery to grace the city since the days of prohibition, Corsair has garnered widespread acclaim for its spirits, earning praise from numerous publications. With over 800 medals from national and international spirits competitions, Corsair's innovative and adventurous approach to distilling has captivated enthusiasts worldwide. The taproom invites patrons to savor the best cocktails crafted with their award-winning spirits, expertly mixed to create unforgettable flavors.
properties.name: Corsair Distillery & Taproom

properties.blurb: Cottontail Lounge is Urbandale’s go-to spot, open daily from 11am for brunch cocktails or late-night hangs. With daily specials, a weekday happy hour, and a menu packed with favorites like steak and burger nights, there’s always a reason to stop by. Cozy yet elevated, their cocktail lineup nails classics and creative house drinks, plus a solid beer and wine selection. Don’t miss trivia nights with real prizes! Cottontail is where Urbandale comes to unwind.
properties.name: Cottontail Lounge

properties.address: 1500 SE 3rd Ct #100, Deerfield Beach, FL 33441, USA
properties.blurb: Cove Brewery is your South Florida escape, where craft beers and good times flow effortlessly. Enjoy the laid-back atmosphere while sipping on refreshing craft brews that capture the essence of the region's lifestyle. As Deerfield's first brewery, Cove is all about celebrating the sun-soaked spirit of Florida. Their taproom is a welcoming oasis that embodies everything great about the state. Join in for laughter, community, and a taste of South Florida in every sip. Cheers to sharing good times at Cove Brewery!
properties.name: Cove Brewery

properties.blurb: An OG on the Greeley brewing scene, Crabtree is going on 15 years in the business. Top notch beers like the sweet and malty Serenity Amber Red Ale, the nummy Chunkin Pumpkin ale, or the perfectly balanced Dearfield Blonde Ale make us want to move in down the block. Onsite ownership keeps standards high, as Crabtree churns out just beer after delightful beer for all palettes. Enjoy the huge tabletop Battleship game, bingo night, or take things outside onto the biergarten and bask in the weather. Safe to say, Crabtree has earned their beaming reputation.
properties.name: Crabtree Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Craft Brewed is a unique destination that encompasses both a well-stocked bottle shop and a lively craft beer bar. As a leading bottle shop, Craft Brewed offers a diverse selection of wines, spirits, and craft beers for enthusiasts to explore and take home. Stepping into the craft beer bar, visitors are treated to an impressive sight of 32 taps, showcasing an unparalleled array of craft beers from across the state. With a focus on quality and variety, beer lovers will find themselves in a beer paradise with options to satisfy every palate. To complement the delightful libations, the kitchen serves up a delectable range of offerings, including thin-crust pizzas, giant pretzels, and other enticing small bites. Whether you're in search of the perfect beverage to enjoy at home or looking for a vibrant spot to savor craft beers on tap, Craft Brewed Bottle Shop and Tasting Room is the place to be.
properties.name: Craft Brewed Bottle Shop and Tasting Room

properties.address: 6712 Frank Lloyd Wright Ave, Middleton, WI 53562
properties.blurb: Tables? Check. Taps? Check. But it's more than that. Craftsman goes beyond the basics to craft something truly special. The food menu is a culinary masterpiece, crafted with care and creativity, while the beer list is a treasure trove waiting to be explored. From the moment you walk in, you'll feel the passion and dedication that make Craftsman an experience, not just a destination.
properties.name: Craftsman Table & Tap

properties.blurb: Much like its namesake, the Crafty Chameleon’s tap list is constantly evolving. Keeping with the theme, their wood-fired pizza oven bakes up The Chameleon pizza with the note “changes frequently… please ask your server.” For those of you aren’t fans of change, never fear: the Crafty Chameleon has some constants. Like a great selection of craft beers, and the savory sweet Apple Bacon pizza.
properties.name: Crafty Chameleon Brewery

properties.address: 2675 S Kinnickinnic Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53207, USA
properties.blurb: Get ready to be wowed at Crafty Cow, where the beer and food game is strong! The beer menu is a playground for your taste buds, featuring unique and exciting brews that will leave you wanting more. Of course, we had to dive into their signature Crafty Cow Lager, and it was so darn good, it vanished before our food even hit the table. But let's talk about the food—oh boy, it's a flavor explosion! From the Maple Bacon Brussels Sprouts to the Chicken Fried Pork Belly with cheese sauce and chili crisp, each bite is a taste sensation. And don't even get us started on the Honey Chipotle Corn Ribs—seriously, you don't want to miss these bad boys. We may have filled up on appetizers (oops!), but the mains are just as tempting. And if you're feeling extra brave, take on the Heat & Repeat Food Challenge—worthy bragging rights await those who dare.
properties.name: Crafty Cow - Burgers & Fried Chicken

properties.address: 153 E Wisconsin Ave, Oconomowoc, WI 53066, USA
properties.blurb: Get ready to be wowed at Crafty Cow, where the beer and food game is strong! The beer menu is a playground for your taste buds, featuring unique and exciting brews that will leave you wanting more. Of course, we had to dive into their signature Crafty Cow Lager, and it was so darn good, it vanished before our food even hit the table. But let's talk about the food—oh boy, it's a flavor explosion! From the Maple Bacon Brussels Sprouts to the Chicken Fried Pork Belly with cheese sauce and chili crisp, each bite is a taste sensation. And don't even get us started on the Honey Chipotle Corn Ribs—seriously, you don't want to miss these bad boys. We may have filled up on appetizers (oops!), but the mains are just as tempting. And if you're feeling extra brave, take on the Heat & Repeat Food Challenge—worthy bragging rights await those who dare.
properties.name: Crafty Cow - Burgers & Fried Chicken

properties.address: 6519 W North Ave, Wauwatosa, WI 53213, USA
properties.blurb: Get ready to be wowed at Crafty Cow, where the beer and food game is strong! The beer menu is a playground for your taste buds, featuring unique and exciting brews that will leave you wanting more. Of course, we had to dive into their signature Crafty Cow Lager, and it was so darn good, it vanished before our food even hit the table. But let's talk about the food—oh boy, it's a flavor explosion! From the Maple Bacon Brussels Sprouts to the Chicken Fried Pork Belly with cheese sauce and chili crisp, each bite is a taste sensation. And don't even get us started on the Honey Chipotle Corn Ribs—seriously, you don't want to miss these bad boys. We may have filled up on appetizers (oops!), but the mains are just as tempting. And if you're feeling extra brave, take on the Heat & Repeat Food Challenge—worthy bragging rights await those who dare.
properties.name: Crafty Cow - Burgers & Fried Chicken

properties.blurb: Crane Brewery Company’s tap room is somehow both rustic and modern, with a 26-ft live-edge bar, reclaimed barn-wood tables, and hand-painted menu boards. But the real draw, of course, is the ever-evolving myriad of beer on tap. Also available: soda, local kombucha, and nitro cold-brew coffee from Benetti’s!
properties.name: Crane Brewing

properties.blurb: This is the microbrewery of our dreams where the beer flows like liquid gold and the vibes are always top-notch! Prepare yourself for a taste adventure like no other as you indulge in a treasure trove of exceptional brews on tap. These brew wizards are passionate about their craft, and their head brewer is a bona fide beer maestro! From your all-time favorites to jaw-dropping seasonal and special concoctions, they've got it all covered. Get ready to have your taste buds do the happy dance!
properties.name: Crawford Brew Works

properties.blurb: Crazy Mountain Brewery is a little wild in all the right ways. Their motto? “Stench of Fresh" and oh man, does it smell good! From bold IPAs to rich stouts and crisp lagers, the taps are always rotating with new, creative brews that keep beer lovers on their toes. But it’s not just about what’s in your glass. With cozy vibes, great food, and a steady stream of live entertainment, Crazy Mountain delivers the kind of laid-back energy you’ll want to come back to again and again. Pull up a seat, grab a pint, and see what’s brewing next.
properties.name: Crazy Mountain Brewery

properties.address: 426 W Plant St, Winter Garden, FL 34787, USA
properties.blurb: Shop 'til you drop... right into Crooked Can Brewing Co! Nestled inside the bustling Plant Street Market, this spot is your perfect shopping pit stop. Grab a High Stepper American IPA or a Cloud Chaser Hefeweizen, then dive into their rotating selection of small-batch and seasonal brews. With something new and exciting always on tap, it’s like a treasure hunt, but with beer. Who could ask for more?
properties.name: Crooked Can Brewing Co

properties.address: 501 Washington Ave S, Minneapolis, MN 55415, USA
properties.blurb: ** DEAL NOT VALID ON VIKINGS GAME DAYS **
properties.name: Crooked Pint Ale House

properties.blurb: Crooked Pint Ale House is a neighborhood pub with big-city flavor. From Pub Pot Pies and Pub Tacos to Jumbo Tator Tots (yes, really), the menu keeps you coming back bite after bite. The beer list is just as impressive, with 32 drafts featuring local and regional craft favorites, plus plenty of wine, bourbon, and scotch for those feeling fancy. Classic comfort food, a legendary beer lineup, and a cozy spot to pull up a chair because Crooked Pint has all the ingredients for a perfect hangout.
properties.name: Crooked Pint Ale House

properties.blurb: Welcome to a crossroads of choices, where your thirst for adventure meets your quest for great taste! Now, before you consider parting with your soul or joining a retro road trip with Britney Spears (2002 vibes, anyone?), how about opting for something more refreshing—like a delightful beer? Yep, we were secretly hoping you'd choose that too (but if you bump into Britney, send our regards). At Crossroads Brewery, the magic happens as they craft their brews using only the finest ingredients. What's their specialty, you ask? Regularly releasing a captivating array of new beers, they’re all about variety and experimentation. It's a journey into taste that's constantly evolving, a testament to our commitment to keeping things fresh, exciting, and oh-so-delicious.
properties.name: CrossRoads Brewery

properties.address: 1165 E McNeese St, Lake Charles, LA 70607
properties.blurb: What began as a passion project has grown into a full-fledged destination. Join the locals flocking to Crying Eagle Brewing, where you can try their most popular beers: Louisiana Lager and Ready to Mingle. The brewery has a great outdoor space with games and a stage for live events. Making it a one-stop shop for your day is their bistro, which serves pizzas, sandwiches, and apps.
properties.name: Crying Eagle Brewing Co

properties.blurb: When we say Crystal Springs Brewing Company is homey, we mean it’s like hanging out at that cool neighbor's house who turned their garage into the ultimate brewpub. With beers like the Juicy Yo IPA, packed with tropical hops, and their ever-changing seasonal brews, you’re in for a treat. The cozy interior is perfect for a laid-back visit, but if it’s packed, you and your pup can chill on the dog-friendly patio. With ten-ounce and fun-sized four-ounce pours, there’s no reason not to sample a few and find your new favorite!
properties.name: Crystal Springs Brewing Co

properties.address: 2719 Loker Ave W STE D, Carlsbad, CA 92010, USA
properties.name: Culver Beer Co

properties.blurb: Whether you’re a local or just passing through Bailey, make sure you stop by Cutthroat Cafe for breakfast. And lunch. Actually, you should probably just plan on eating a meal here daily for however long you’re sticking around. The chicken fried steak is some of the best you’ll ever taste. And nothing says hearty like a two-hander burger. So what if we just made up “two-hander” - you know what we mean. It’s obviously a burger so big that both hands are required.
properties.name: Cutthroat Cafe

properties.address: 1109 Honey Ct, De Pere, WI 54115, USA
properties.blurb: Nestled right near the Fox River Trail in De Pere, WI, you'll find a fantastic little gem called Cycling Brews. Committed to some of the best local craft beer around, they also "cycle" through rotators from the Midwest and beyond. Whether you're looking for that hazy from your favorite GB haunt or wine or seltzer is more your forte. Cycling has you covered. Be on the lookout for food truck schedules and live music weekly via their website. We indulged in some suds and some of the best bar snacks in town as we dipped through on a bike ride along the Fox. A must-stop in De Pere!
properties.name: Cycling Brews

properties.blurb: This is one of those local breweries that happens to be on everyone’s ‘must stop’ list in Baton Rouge. From the laid back atmosphere to the friendly, knowledgeable bartenders, Cypress Coast Brewing is doing it all right. In addition to their top notch in house beers, they offer a few guest taps from some of your faves. We absolutely love how you never know what you’re going to get when you walk in - they’re slinging new brews all the dang time.
properties.name: Cypress Coast Brewing Co

properties.blurb: On the off chance you don’t know that Czech Station should be your destination for all things tasty and delicious, we are here to change that ASAP. You want Benedicts? You’ll be sorry if you don’t try the I’m Not Crabby or the Southern Sow. Loaded Biscuits and Gravy? They’ve got you covered. Wanting a more savory choice? We could cry because their Adult Grilled Cheese is so good. Feeling especially razzle-dazzle? Edible shot glasses. Rest assured, you will not leave disappointed.
properties.name: Czech Town Station

properties.blurb: Get ready to indulge in the ultimate beer experience at Danico Brewing Co. This spot’s a hidden gem with a cozy vibe and a seriously impressive lineup of handcrafted brews. From their crisp and clean Hey Pard’ Pils to rotating IPAs, stouts, and sours, there’s something here for every kind of beer lover. Add in a solid food truck schedule and you’ve got all the makings of a perfect afternoon.
properties.name: Danico Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Taking a hard lean towards the pubs and taverns of Ireland, Danny's is every bit a 180 degree turn from the bars that seem to have drifted towards the feel of a family fun center. Make no mistake, Danny's is a pub, with darts, and cool bartenders, and live DJ dance nights. They cater as well to the Joe Public sports fan by tossing the game du jour up on the flatscreen. However, it's the little touches like darker than dark wood interior, a heavily-represented Irish draft list, and "newspaper" liners for their baskets of food that earned from us the silent "tip o' the cap" respect.
properties.name: Danny's Pub

properties.blurb: MKE is full of neighborhood gems you might not stumble upon unless your buddy checked it out first. Lucky for you? PubPass is your buddy and we checked out Dark Horse one night for several hours. The place is a legit, no-frills, authentic Milwaukee watering hole complete with regulars, laughter, good times, and the possibility you will be the one who tells your friends about this rad little spot you found.
properties.name: Dark Horse

properties.address: 103 W Birch Ave, Flagstaff, AZ 86001, USA
properties.name: Dark Sky Brewing

properties.blurb: Looking for a dart bar that hits the bullseye in all categories? Look no further than this gem in the Riverside area! Dart Bar and games has a focus on craft beer and bar games. The spacious layout is packed with classic bar games like darts, pool, air hockey, and foosball. But wait, there's more! Prepare to be amazed by unique additions like bumper pool and bubble hockey. And let's talk beer—10 rotating craft taps featuring the best of Florida and North Florida, while the other 10 taps cover the bar usuals. Combine all that with excellent service and a vibrant atmosphere, and you've got a winning combination at this dart bar. Get ready for a memorable night of fun, games, and brews!
properties.name: Dart Bar & Games

properties.blurb: It’s impossible not to love a place called Day Drink Inn. It’s basically training camp for folks who aspire to beer drinking greatness. This neighborhood bar has the friendliest bartenders, an incredibly warm and inviting atmosphere, and obviously wants to support local day drinkers. There are plenty of great beers on tap, some incredible classic cocktails, and reasonable prices. Yeah, you heard us. Great drinks and great people and great prices. When does training camp begin?
properties.name: Day Drink Inn

properties.address: 3178 Bladensburg Rd NE Suite B, Washington, DC 20018
properties.blurb: Just a friendly public service announcement: don’t come here if you’re not ready to make friends. The bartenders are laid-back and know their stuff, and before you know it, fellow beer enthusiasts might be striking up a conversation about their favorite IPA or crisp lager. Don’t worry, it’s all part of the vibe. Everyone’s just excited to share the love for good beer, and honestly, you’ll probably agree once you try a pint or two.
properties.name: DC Brau

properties.address: 1726 Dr. William Finlayson St, Milwaukee, WI 53212, USA
properties.blurb: At Dead Bird Brewing, the motto 'Outstanding Beer by Upstanding Gentlemen' isn't just a tagline. It's a way of life. Since 2015, they've been crafting high ABV beers that are as unique as they are delicious, often highlighting locally sourced vegan ingredients. And the food? Let's talk about the Sexy Chips. Crispy potato chips tossed in truffle oil, parmesan, parsley, and red pepper flakes. Pair those with an array of pizzas that perfectly complement their brews, and you've got a recipe for a fantastic time.
properties.name: Dead Bird Brewing Co

properties.address: 14258 W Club Deluxe Rd, Hammond, LA 70403, USA
properties.blurb: Deadbeat Brewing Co is our go-to hangout when we need a little time in nature… or just an excuse to drink beer outside. Grab a spot in the sprawling beer garden, soak up the waterfront views, and maybe challenge your friends to a game under the oaks. The brews hit all the right notes. Classic, creative, and totally worth lingering over. Basically, it’s the kind of place where leaving is optional.
properties.name: Deadbeat Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Nestled right on Main Street, Della Viti is where you can kick back and let the experts lead you to your new favorite sip. Whether you’re into wines, beers, or cocktails, they’ve got you covered. The vibe? Totally laid-back and cozy, perfect for unwinding. Pair your drink with some small plates packed with big flavors, and you’ve got yourself a winning combo. With a draft beer selection, wines, and cocktails, there’s something for every palate.
properties.name: Della Viti

properties.address: 154 S Main St, Laurie, MO 65037, USA
properties.name: Demolition Brewing Company

properties.blurb: Gilbert is really stepping up the craft brew game and we’re happy to report that Desert Monks does not disappoint. At this everyman’s brewery, you’ll find a wide selection of house brews and the monks promise there’s something for everyone. With a rotating tap that includes seasonals, you never know what you’re going to find, but if Golden Juicy Layers IPA or Quit Your Wine-ing are on the tap list when you pop in, get one. Heck, settle in and get both.
properties.name: Desert Monks Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Delve into the world of innovation and flavor at Diamondback Brewing, an extraordinary production brewery that thrives on pushing boundaries and crafting unforgettable experiences. Their commitment to their craft shines through in their unfiltered lagers, bold hop-forward ales, and artfully brewed mixed-fermentation beers. This dedication to excellence extends beyond just the brews. Prepare to be wowed by their Neapolitan-inspired pizzas, each a mouthwatering masterpiece in its own right. Nestled in a cozy nook, Diamondback Brewing may be a hidden gem, but once you stumble upon it, it becomes an unforgettable part of your journey. The moment you take a bite of their mind-blowing pizza, you'll realize you've found a treasure trove of taste.
properties.name: Diamondback Brewing Co

properties.blurb: When you think of France, you don’t often think of beer. Berets, sure. Disdain for American tourists, yep. Champagne, absolutely. Beer? Not so much. But Diebolt has a whole host of French-inspired craft beer ready to make you say, “Ooh là là!.” They don’t just stick to French styles, though. Our latest must-drink is their Session Stout. (Extra points because of its name: Vlad-i-da-di, We Likes to Party!)
properties.name: Diebolt Brewing

properties.address: 835 Serenoa Rd, Santa Rosa Beach, FL 32459
properties.blurb: What’s finer than a cocktail made with award-winning spirits that have been lovingly hand-crafted using all local ingredients? How about everything we just said, but the family-run distillery making said spirits is also legit committed to serving its community and practicing sustainable, eco-friendly production methods—so you can feel even better when sipping your tipple of choice! Both vodkas—Half Shell and Dune Laker—are to die for. Try them in a martini or your favorite beach bevvy (the distillery is located mere minutes from glorious Grayton and Rosemary beaches on the Gulf Coast). The dog-friendly tasting room lounge is hip as heck, with mid-century modern vibes, while an outdoor patio boasts plasma TVs for all the games. Live music is always a possibility, while a rotation of food trucks ensures you’ll never go hungry.
properties.name: Distillery 98

properties.blurb: Take the plunge into the vibrant atmosphere of Dive Inn, a dive bar that's all about fun and good times. Get ready to be whisked away by their Tiki-themed cocktails, craft beer selection, and their signature classic Old Fashioneds that will make your taste buds dance. As the self-proclaimed Official Unofficial Badger Women's Volleyball Bar, Dive Inn is the ultimate spot to catch a game and cheer on your favorite team. And if you're a die-hard Packer fan, you're in luck! They have special game day deals just for you, along with the occasional meat raffle to satisfy your carnivorous cravings.
properties.name: Dive Inn

properties.blurb: Divided Vine emerged as a unifying concept, inviting everyone to share their love for beer and wine in a warm and welcoming environment. The founders, Jeff, Emily, and Clayton, pour their heart and soul into this bar, creating a space where people can gather and enjoy their favorite libations. This delightful establishment offers a diverse menu that caters to all tastes, featuring scrumptious pizza, delectable paninis, and a mouthwatering Churro Stack for a delightful dessert, accompanied by a luscious Nutella dipping sauce. From the moment you step inside Divided Vine, you'll feel the passion and camaraderie that underpins this vibrant place.
properties.name: Divided Vine Beer and Wine Bar

properties.blurb: DJ's Watering Hole is the place where soulful and healthy meals come alive with bold flavors. Every dish is crafted with love and expertise using house recipes that are sure to tantalize your taste buds. From savory delights to nutritious options, their menu is a culinary journey you won't want to miss. And when it comes to quenching your thirst, DJ's Watering Hole has got you covered with an impressive selection of local and domestic draft beers. Whether you're a beer connoisseur or simply looking to enjoy a refreshing brew, their tap lineup will surely satisfy. Get ready to indulge in a soulful meal and raise a glass to good times at DJ's Watering Hole. Cheers to flavorful bites and a wide selection of brews that will keep you coming back for more.
properties.name: DJ's Watering Hole

properties.blurb: If you’ve lucked out with your prescription, you’ll head to Doc’s Lounge where it’s always good for what ales ya.
