properties.name: Missipi Brew

properties.address: 8221 S Holly St, Centennial, CO 80122, USA
properties.name: Modern Brew - Kitchen & Bar

properties.blurb:
** BOGO OFFER ONLY GOOD FOR FLAGSHIP BEERS **
- Dreamyard Hazy IPA
- False Pattern Hazy Pale Ale
- Teal Label West Coast IPA
- Supra Deluxe Premium Pilsner
- First Call Cold Press Coffee Lager
properties.name: Modist Brewing Co.

properties.blurb: One of the newer kids on the block in Milwaukee’s revitalized Water Street district, Mojo’s fresh take on brewpubs is evident with the delicious cocktail DJ-helmed dance nights and karaoke. If your moves are rusty, opt to chill with a game of bags on their patio. Nightly food trucks swing by and park out front, so you’ll be able to nosh throughout the eve
properties.name: Mojo MKE

properties.address: 2300 E 77th Ave Unit 300A, Denver, CO 80229, USA
properties.name: Molly Brown Distillery

properties.address: 10876 Myhre Pl NW Suite 112, Silverdale, WA 98383, USA
properties.name: Moment Brewing

properties.blurb: Ssshh…can you keep a secret? Well good, because we can’t. But it’s not our fault okay? There’s just nothing like stumbling onto a bar that has the prestige of being a hidden gem of a city. With the dark and lush interior, a bar that screams ‘cozy up here for a while,’ and the libations to keep you comfortable…we may have blown the secret, but you’ll be happy that we did.
properties.name: Monica's On Astor

properties.blurb: Here the art of small batch brewing takes center stage. This intimate brewery exclusively serves its handcrafted beers within its inviting taproom. From traditional favorites to adventurous creations, their diverse lineup of flavors and styles ensures there's a brew to suit every taste. With a passionate commitment to the craft and an intuitive approach to brewing, they tirelessly strive to create beers that not only please your palate but also win over your family, your pickiest neighbor, and everyone in between. And just like their beer menu, their food offerings are in a constant state of change, promising a dynamic culinary experience that keeps you coming back for more. Embrace the evolving flavors, savor the unique brews, and discover the extraordinary at Monolith Brewing.
properties.name: Monolith Brewing

properties.blurb: Get ready to be blown away by Roger Miller, the brewmaster extraordinaire with over two decades of brewing wizardry under his belt. From backyard home brews to a full-scale brewery, his passion for crafting top-notch beer shines through in every sip. Located in the heart of Cornell, MoonRidge Brewing Co is a hidden gem worth discovering. The magic doesn't end with their exceptional beers. (which trust us, they are worth the visit alone) But oh no, they've sprinkled enchantment on their pizza too! Using the spent grains that flavor their brews, they've conjured up mouthwatering pizza crusts that'll leave you in awe. Who knew spent grains could taste so good?
properties.name: Moonridge Brewing Company

properties.address: 18475 W Colfax Ave Suite 132, Golden, CO 80401
properties.blurb: Morris and Mae Food Hall is a culinary delight! Housing a plethora of food vendors, there is something for everyone. From healthy options like poke and acai bowls, to comfort foods like mac and cheese and tacos. Even Italian piadas. Their selection of desserts also includes gelato, cakes and espresso! With over 20 local taps, their drink menu includes seasonal and classic cocktails, wine, canned and bottled beer. Morris and Mae Food Hall is the perfect destination for anyone looking for a diverse culinary experience.
properties.name: Morris and Mae Food Hall

properties.address: 1250 Niagara St Suite 130, Buffalo, NY 14213, USA
properties.name: Mortalis Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Step into the world of Mother's Pub and get ready for a wild ride! This lively establishment is all about the fun, the laughter, and the good times. With a vibrant atmosphere and a cast of incredible characters, you're in for an unforgettable experience. The bartenders at Mother's Pub are like the best friends you never knew you needed—quick with a joke, a smile, and, of course, a perfectly poured drink. And let's not forget about the star of the show: the high-quality beers that will leave your taste buds begging for more. So, get ready to have a blast at Mother's Pub, where the good vibes flow as freely as the drinks. It's time to let loose, make memories, and have the time of your life. Cheers to an epic adventure!
properties.name: Mother's Pub

properties.address: 1036B Park Blvd, Massapequa Park, NY 11762, USA
properties.name: Motion Craft Brewed

properties.address: 6939 Laurel Ave, Takoma Park, MD 20910, USA
properties.blurb: Motorkat is renowned for navigating Takoma Park's streets on a motorcycle, igniting a spirit of velocity within the community. So the Motorkat concept revolves around this symbolic persona and Takoma Park's progressive origins. Presenting a culinary voyage guided by seasonal nuances and wood-fired techniques, Motorkat delivers an exceptional dining adventure. Accompanied by a thoughtfully curated raw bar, the experience pays homage to top-notch sourcing, inventive cuisine, and Takoma Park's dynamic history.
properties.name: Motorkat

properties.address: 131 N Orange Ave Ste 106, Orlando, FL 32801, USA
properties.blurb: Craft beer, good vibes, and downtown energy meet at Motorworks. With 24 taps to explore, there’s always a new favorite calling your name. Grab a flatbread or a sandwich, soak up the live music, and let the buzz of the city seep in without ever feeling rushed. It’s the kind of place where stories start over a pint, laughs come easy, and staying a little longer feels perfectly justified. Motorworks isn’t just another brewery it’s the downtown hangout you’ll keep coming back to.
properties.name: Motorworks Brewing

properties.blurb: Motorworks Brewing Taproom Tampa doesn’t just pour beer, it keeps the whole neighborhood in motion. With exclusive brews made in Bradenton and Orlando, wood-fired Neapolitan pizza coming out fast from Cinzia’s kitchen, and every screen tuned into the game, there’s always something pulling you in. On Harbour Island, this isn’t just another taproom. It’s where the gears of great beer, good food, and lively company lock together and keep spinning.
properties.name: Motorworks Brewing Taproom

properties.blurb: This urban oasis is the perfect spot to wet one’s whistle after a dusty day of adventurous off-road exploration through the magnificent trails of southeastern Arizona (or even if you just want a reward after crushing all those TPS reports at the office). MotoSonora’s founders have done a radical job of making their brewery a haven for the road warrior and city dweller alike. Sip an award-winning Belly Tank Blonde Ale or Victory or Death IPA on the killer beer garden and marvel as the setting sun paints the desert sky a hot pink hue. Dogs are very welcome and can even run free in an off-leash area known as the “Ruff Zone.” The excellent Substance Diner food truck is posted up onsite every day, offering top-notch, plant-based comfort food delights like vegan burgers, hot dogs, and even malts and shakes.
properties.name: MotoSonora Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Indulge in the ultimate craft beer experience at Mountain Top Tap Room, where every visit is a celebration of local flavors and community spirit. Immerse yourself in the lively ambiance and join the fun on Monday nights for open mic sessions, where talented individuals take the stage to showcase their skills and entertain the crowd. If you're a trivia enthusiast, Thursday nights are your time to shine as you put your knowledge to the test and compete for glory. With an impressive lineup of 36 rotating taps, Mountain Top Tap Room offers a curated selection of the finest local and regional craft beers and ciders, ensuring there's something to please every palate. From hop-forward ales to refreshing ciders, each sip is a testament to the dedication and creativity of the region's passionate brewers. So gather your friends, embrace the vibrant atmosphere, and discover the best of local craft at Mountain Top Tap Room. Cheers to unforgettable nights filled with great brews and unforgettable memories!
properties.name: Mountain Top Tap Room

properties.address: 5271 High Crossing Blvd, Madison, WI 53718, USA
properties.blurb: We might not know Mr. Brews personally, but his vibe is totally our scene. With gourmet burgers like the Brews Chetta featuring havarti, bruschetta, and basil pesto mayo, plus 60 craft beers on tap, it’s clear we’d get along famously. Swing by and see why Mr. Brews’ delicious mix of brews and burgers has us hooked.
properties.name: Mr Brews Taphouse

properties.blurb: Here at PubPass we are equal opportunity eaters and drinkers. We’ll try anything, from a cheap lager to the finest craft beers the best breweries have to offer. Every once in a while we like to class it up a bit, and since we know some of you do, too, we’re here to bring you what might be the most mouth-watering steak ever in the history of meat. Mtn Prime is a gem in historic Idaho Springs. They take their meat, and their brunch, seriously. This is an absolute must-stop for us. Pinkies up, friends.
properties.name: MTN Prime

properties.blurb: Mudbug Brewery, proudly hailing from Thibodaux, Louisiana, embodies the spirit of Cajun culture in every pour. Founded in 2011 with a love for good beer and good times, Mudbug has grown into a local staple, offering five flagship brews that capture the essence of Cajun life. Whether you're a native or just passing through, Mudbug's unique specialties invite you to celebrate and savor the rich flavors of Louisiana. Grab a pint and let the good times roll, Cajun style!
properties.name: Mudbug Brewery

properties.address: 585 E South Boulder Rd, Louisville, CO 80027
properties.blurb: If you had to describe Mudrock’s in one word, it might be “tavern.” But “taproom” would also be correct. And we would accept “café.” And you would get half-credit for “biscuits.” Mudrock’s Tap and Tavern has a morning biscuit bar with chicken fried biscuits, breakfast biscuit sandwiches, and butters and jams. It also has coffee, with iced cold brew and nitro cold brew on tap. And, of course, it has beer, including seasonal strong ales. Did you get all that?
properties.name: Mudrock’s Tap and Tavern

properties.address: 1095 Aviation Dr, Lake Havasu City, AZ 86404
properties.blurb: We wanted to try the winner of the Brews From The Sun competition so we set out to Mudshark brewery and let me tell you the sun makes some GREAT brews. Well, brewer Wayne Wannanan makes some great brews with the help of the sun, that is. While being solar powered and striving to reduce their carbon footprint is amazing in itself their beer speaks for itself. We had ourselves a Moon Light to keep with the sun/moon theme but we will be back to try one of their rotating flavors as well! Don’t forget about their killer food, while you are there. You can’t go wrong with the pizza and beer combo.
properties.name: Mudshark Brewery and Public House

properties.address: 1253 1300 SE 1st St, Des Moines, IA 50315, USA
properties.blurb: At Mullets in Des Moines, it’s all business in the front and brunch in the back! Open until 3 p.m., this spot knows how to serve up a breakfast that’s as bold as a fresh mullet cut. Big plates? Check. Breakfast cocktails? Absolutely. Whether you're diving into a stack of pancakes or kicking back with a Bloody Mary, Mullets keeps things lively. It's a brunch experience that's like the hairstyle: classic, a little wild, and totally worth showing off. Who knew a mullet could taste this good?
properties.name: Mullets

properties.address: 4518 Mortensen Rd suite 101, Ames, IA 50014, USA
properties.name: Mullets (Ames)

properties.address: 617 SW 3rd St Suite 103, Ankeny, IA 50023, USA
properties.blurb: Over in Ankeny, Mullets takes that same mullet magic and cranks it up a notch. They’re dishing out serious brunch vibes with a "business on your plate, party in your glass" kind of energy. Open until 3 p.m., they’re whipping up all your breakfast favorites with cocktails to match. Like its Des Moines counterpart, this is where the mullet mindset thrives—because nothing says “good morning” quite like a mimosa and a heaping plate of bacon. At Mullets Ankeny, they know brunch should always have a little fun in the back!
properties.name: Mullets (Ankeny)

properties.blurb: They don’t come any cooler than this community-focused brewery in the hip Rail Yard District. Industrial-chic spaces decked with local art set the scene inside, while a palm-filled Biergarten brings the party outdoors. Kids have room to roam, dogs get the VIP treatment, and live music keeps the energy buzzing. But let’s be real, you came for the beer. With a lineup as bold and creative as the space itself, every pour is a reason to raise a glass and stay a little longer.
properties.name: Myrtle Ave Brewing

properties.blurb: Change can be hard, and with a constantly rotating tap of beers and food trucks, we understand it might be difficult to accept that the new beers on tap are also delicious. Yes, you had a favorite. Yes, it’s been retired from the rotation, but guess what? You can find a new favorite! And it will be cold, and hoppy, and juicy. But just in case, you should probably also grab a few cans of your new favorite on your way out because it might disappear and honestly, we can only handle so much change.
properties.name: Nano 108 Brewing

properties.address: 5501 W National Ave, West Milwaukee, WI 53214, USA
properties.blurb: With a name like National Pizza Pub and Grille, you know the pizza has to be something special—and we're here to tell you, it is! The combinations here are out of this world, like the Honey Hot Chicken Pizza, Ranch Club Pizza, and Mexican Fiesta Pizza. Each slice is a delicious adventure, making it our new favorite spot for unique and flavorful pies.
properties.name: National Pizza Pub and Grille

properties.address: 5686 S Sycamore St, Littleton, CO 80120, USA
properties.name: Ned Kelly's Irish Pub

properties.blurb: Come to Nederlanders for the 70+ indoor golf courses from around the world. Stay for the gourmet hot dogs piled high with cheese, bacon, chili, pickles, mac and cheese, sauerkraut, and more (but not all at once – unless you want it to. We’re not judging). Of course, Nederlanders also has a full-service bar including specialty mules, shots, and wine. And if you’re bringing the whole family, you can buy soda and mocktails to go with those dogs.
properties.name: Nederlanders Tap & Golf

properties.blurb: Nerds, assemble! Nerdspeak Brewery is true to its name. When you step inside, you’re overwhelmed with graphics from shows, musicians, and movies (especially the owner’s favorite, “Star Wars.”) It has a retro, industrial, cyberpunk atmosphere that is unabashedly, proudly geeky. It also has 10 exceptional craft beers on tap, and a Cookie Duster IPA milkshake coming soon. Which means even if you’ve never been a nerd in your life… you’ll probably love this place.
properties.name: Nerdspeak Brewery

properties.address: 2531 7th Ave E, North St Paul, MN 55109
properties.blurb: No explanation necessary here. That is, unless, you've never had a PubPass before or somehow didn't make it to this NSP institution — arguably the oldest in the state. We're not even mad. We're just jealous that you're about to try their Coneys for the first time. You're about to have a server call you "hon". You're about to cheers bikers and consider getting a Harley yourself. You're about to say hello to the live bullfrog in the front window and then debate between a bullfrog and a Harley. Maybe start with a leather vest or a toad and see how it feels, eh?
properties.name: Neumann's

properties.blurb: As Wisconsin’s first co-op brewery, this one’s for the people, and you can become a member-owner today. Here, grab a pint or two and mull on it. If you wind up owning a bar the following day, then consider it fate. Or destiny. Or divine intervention. Any of those make for a good excuse. On second thought? You might never top Hopped by Ziggy or 4x4 so maybe it's best to just own a little slice of this place... for now, anyway.
properties.name: New Barons Brewing

properties.blurb: Take that leap and try out this spot in the Bay area. Worst case scenario? You visit this awesome brewery/distillery/vineyard/winery and have a nice lil afternoon sampling adult bevvies. Best case scenario? You have a nice lil afternoon sampling adult bevvies and making new friends at the table seated next to yours and you head home with a trunk full of new favorite wines and spirits. This best case scenario is basically just a Saturday for us, honestly.
properties.name: New Denmark Brewing Co

properties.address: 928 Rep. John Lewis Way S, Nashville, TN 37203
properties.blurb: Nashville is quickly becoming one of our favorite cities to sample beers in, and it’s not just because an IPA helps tamp down the heat of a hot chicken sandwich. New Heights Brewing, located in the heart of Nashville, is one of the spots putting Nashville on the beer-lovers map. New Heights has a tap lineup sure to impress even the prickliest palette - from sours to IPAs, porters to stouts, this local brewery has something for everyone.
properties.name: New Heights Brewing Co

properties.address: 2000 W Midway Blvd, Broomfield, CO 80020, USA
properties.name: Night Owl Lounge

properties.address: 1201 S Joyce St C10, Arlington, VA 22202, USA
properties.name: Nighthawk Brewery & Pizza

properties.blurb: We don’t care what you call it, No Name Brewing has the right idea. No frills, nothing crazy, just good local beer for the community to enjoy. Pair it with pizza, wings, subs, or calzones from Boardwalk Pizza, and you’ll leave thinking some things don’t need a name to be great.
properties.name: No Name Brewing Company

properties.blurb: At No Seasons Brewing, the spotlight isn’t just on the beer (though, trust us, that’s worth the hype). It’s on the people. The bartenders, servers, brewers, and behind-the-scenes heroes who make the hospitality world go ‘round. Every pint here is brewed with a little love, a lot of collaboration, and a nod to the folks who turn “grabbing a drink” into an experience worth remembering. No gimmicks. Just good beer, good people, and the kind of vibe that makes you want to raise your glass a little higher.
properties.name: No Seasons Brewing

properties.blurb: With a tap list long as a CVS receipt everyone will be able to find something to drink at Noble’s East. You can find beers from local breweries as well as the not so local ones. From IPAs to Gose and everything in between. The long menu doesn’t stop at beers, either. It keeps going into their food menu. We couldn't pass on the Southwest Chicken Eggrolls to start and then we went to smoked brisket with a side of sweet potato fries. Stopping in late? They have a whole late night menu to keep you full all night long. Sleep tight with dreams of the Break Room Dog with 3 toppings of your choice.
properties.name: Noble's East Nashville

properties.address: 2901 NW Commerce Park Dr, Boynton Beach, FL 33426, USA
properties.blurb: At NOBO Brewing, the Boynton Blonde is the standout you didn’t know you needed. This classic Blonde Ale is taken up a notch with a hint of local orange blossom honey, adding a subtle sweetness to the finish that’s downright irresistible. From there, let your taste buds explore their award-winning brews, all proudly made on-site. Whether you’re a craft beer newbie or a seasoned connoisseur, NOBO’s got something to please every palate—and you might just find your new go-to favorite.
properties.name: NOBO Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Set inside a restored historic power station in downtown Donaldsonville, NOËL Family Distillery is a family-run craft distillery turning Louisiana sugarcane into seriously good spirits. Expect small-batch rum, vodka, tequila, and ready-to-sip cocktails—all packed with Gulf Coast character. Swing in for a tasting, soak up the history, and raise a glass to craft done the Louisiana way.
properties.name: NOEL Family Distillery

properties.blurb: NOLA Distillery knows a thing or two about raising the bar—literally. This award-winning spot has been recognized among the Top 100 Spirits Made in the USA, and their lineup proves why. From the Double Gold–winning Louisiana Tradition® Bourbon to the bold NCBA® Cattle Drive Bourbon, every sip is crafted with care (and a little New Orleans spirit). Sure, a pour neat is always a winner, but where NOLA really shines is in showing you how to shake, stir, and mix your way to cocktail greatness. Because sometimes the only thing better than top-shelf spirits… is what you do with them
properties.name: NOLA Distillery

properties.blurb: Most sports bars let you watch the game, but Noonan’s does them one better. Swing by and pretend you’re fresh off the PGA Tour after crushing all 18 holes at Heather Ridge and earning those bragging rights. Take your time celebrating with friends. The only thing left to figure out is who’s buying the next round… spoiler alert: it’s probably whoever lost this round.
properties.name: Noonan's Sports Bar & Grill

properties.blurb: Everyone knows the best weekends are cabin weekends. Northwoods Brewing has captured the cabin vibe with their cozy interior, then made it even better by offering 35 taps. It doesn’t get much better than shooting some pool with your pals while sipping on a Lil’ Bandit Brown Ale, or watching the game while you share a basket of pork belly bites.
properties.name: Northwoods Brew Pub

properties.blurb: Number 38 in Denver is where you’ll find the city’s best patio, hands down. With 120 rotating taps showcasing the best of Colorado’s breweries—both big names and hidden gems—you’re sure to find an old favorite or discover a new brew. Their kitchen serves up a fresh take on American cuisine with a Colorado twist that’ll keep you coming back for more. Seriously, we can’t rave enough about this place. You just have to experience it for yourself!
properties.name: Number Thirty Eight

properties.blurb: O'Brien's calls itself "Milwaukee's Happy Place." Strangely enough, that’s also what our buddy Dave calls his garage. But Dave doesn’t have darts. Dave doesn’t have live entertainment and sports shuttles. Dave doesn’t have wings drenched in the one-of-a-kind “Jamo & Coke” sauce, plus pizza and sandwiches to keep things rolling. Hey Dave, we love ya, but let’s take the party over to O'Brien's… at least until you finally fix that kegerator.
properties.name: O'Brien's Irish American Pub

properties.blurb: Lydia's O'Lydia's, say have you met O'Lydia's? Listen, every big group has one Groucho in it. But maybe he's just hungry? Every think of that? Put down the animal crackers and duck soup and get that grumbly tummy over to one of the best damn pre or postgame spots around. Whether you plan to take their shuttle to Green Bay or go west and catch some stickball. Did you know eggplant was a food item long before it was your friend Brad's favorite emoji? It's true (and their grilled version is fantastic). You can learn a lot from O'Lydia's!
properties.name: O'Lydia's

properties.blurb: Is there anything better than a cold beer and a hearty platter of fish and chips after a long day on the slopes? Maybe a dip in the hot tub, but we’d recommend a quick visit to O’Neils Tavern and Grill first. With their friendly service, happy hour deals, and shepherd's pie that’s to die for, it's a great option for the whole family. Or a great option if you’re trying to escape the family - they have a full bar and an Irish Margarita can make you forget a lot.
properties.name: O'Neil's Tavern and Grill

properties.blurb: Oak & Ale is one of those spots that just gets it. Tucked into the Oak Street corridor in Uptown New Orleans, it’s the kind of place where craft beer lovers, wine nerds, and cocktail people all somehow end up at the same table. The vibe is easy, the patio stays buzzing, and the taps and bottles keep things interesting with a thoughtful mix of local favorites and hard-to-find pours. Whether you’re popping in for a quick round or settling in for the night, Oak & Ale hits that sweet spot between neighborhood hang and discovery-worthy stop.
properties.name: Oak & Ale

properties.address: 1033 N Old World 3rd St, Milwaukee, WI 53203
properties.blurb: Entrenched in the heart of downtown Milwaukee, Oak Barrel lives up to its name. The barrels are so much a part of the decor you may be vicariously transported inside a Donkey Kong game. What was once a 19th century hardware store, the exposed brick building now is dedicated to the craft of cocktails and top tier brews. The Milwaukee cheesesteak on a pretzel bun pairs well with any number or beer options, especially that yumm Eagle Park Billy Ray Citrus Hazy IPA. You’d think even an angry gorilla would be able to chill out in a place like Oak Barrel.
properties.name: Oak Barrel Public House

properties.address: 8201 Oak St, New Orleans, LA 70115, USA
properties.blurb: Get ready to raise a glass and make memories at Oak St Brewery, where dreams come true and delicious brews flow freely. The owners have turned their dreams into reality in retirement, crafting exceptional beers that will leave you wanting more. With their state-of-the-art BREWHA equipment, they've mastered the art of brewing, creating flavors that will dance on your palate. Oak St Brewery welcomes the whole family, furry friends included, and even encourages you to bring your favorite snacks from outside. So grab a pint, soak up the vibrant atmosphere, and let the good times roll at Oak St Brewery!
properties.name: Oak St Brewery

properties.blurb: "While Oakstone Recreational may be better known as a venue for volleyball and bags tournaments, it also offers a slew of beer options from Tall Boys to bottles to cans. What’s more, this rec center has a full food menu including a Friday fish fry and a Sunday brunch. We know, we know: we had you at “bags tourmnament”... "
properties.name: Oakstone Recreational

properties.address: 15064 E Mississippi Ave, Aurora, CO 80012, USA
properties.name: Oasis Bar and Grill

properties.address: 4613 S Mason St Ste D1, Fort Collins, CO 80525
properties.blurb: Here you’ll find that the everyday lives of people are seen as very precious and there is a dedication to empower everyone’s journey. We’ll definitely cheers to that! Life may be full of obstacles, but we assure you the only hurdle you may stumble over while you’re here is trying to pick which beer you’re going to order. They’ve got your typical go-to’s but if you’re feeling adventurous try out the Vice Tea Ale (YUM) or the Detour Orange Vanilla Cream Ale (double YUM).
properties.name: Obstacle Brewing

properties.address: 2316 W Colorado Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80904
properties.blurb: OCC Brewing set out to create a space that feels like home. We don’t know about you, but our home doesn’t have cold beer on tap and a drool-inducing menu of apps and sandwiches. Still, we wouldn’t mind living here, especially if it means getting first dibs on their latest beer creations. Order the Venus in Furs and say it with us: there’s no place like home!
properties.name: OCC Brewing

properties.address: 5041 Newport Ave, San Diego, CA 92107, USA
properties.name: Ocean Beach Brewery

properties.blurb: Did you know that pelicans always fly in an odd-numbered v formation? It’s a fact. What’s also a fact is that private-chef-turned-brewer Hunter Davis is elevating the craft beer scene along the picturesque beaches of the Florida panhandle. We instinctively flock to the lighter “Seaside Suds” fare, headlined by Bud’s Brew — a delightfully crip, citrusy Golden Ale that pairs well with Gulf Coast sun, sand and surf (when in Rome, right?). Excellent IPAs, stouts, cream ales, pilsners and hard seltzers are all on offer as well. Beach casual vibes, a family friendly atmosphere, a steady rotation of killer food trucks and … Adult Lego Nights?! Okay, we weren’t expecting that last one either, but we bet it’s as awesome as it sounds!
properties.name: Odd Pelican Beer Co

properties.blurb: Odyssey Beerwerks strives to bring beer lovers unique and hand-crafted brews, all while embracing the journey and connecting with the people they meet along the way. Their diverse selection of beers includes favorites such as the Ghost Drifter Pale Ale and the Psycho Penguin Vanilla Porter.
properties.name: Odyssey Beerwerks

properties.address: 311 N Tejon St, Colorado Springs, CO 80903
properties.blurb: A long journey deserves a good meal. Maybe you didn’t voyage for 10 years to get here, but you walked in from the car right? That counts! Pull up a chair, order the bacon sampler or fish tacos, and pick your favorite local beers from Odyssey’s extensive menu. Can’t get enough? Come back for brunch, with options for build-your-own Bloody Mary or mimosa.
properties.name: Odyssey Gastropub

properties.blurb: Off Broadway Drafthouse is fortunately a well-revered local hangout with above-standard pub food and nearly two dozen delectable draft picks. Off Broadway Drafthouse is fortunately one block off the lake loop with plenty of bike parking, boasts a picturesque patio for outdoor seating, and has a warm wood and brick interior with a carpenter’s dream of a bar. And Off Broadway fortunately, despite the name, has nothing to do with a one-man play about a clown who can’t feel joy after the loss of his floppy shoes set entirely in a prison cell. We didn’t love that play. But we DID love Off Broadway Drafthouse.
properties.name: Off Broadway Drafthouse

properties.blurb: Breweries are popping up like daises in May these days, and they all got their roots in their own special way. Old 121 developed in that sweet spot of industry and friendship, where the collaboration from years of experiences came together to create a place that just radiates with comfort and good beer. You can throw down in their monthly game night competitions, play your luck at Monday night BINGO, and enjoy weekly game nights on Wednesdays, all while sipping from tasty beers. Lean into the old standby styles, or frost yourself with the dark, juniper, and sage sour – Foraged in Frost (shiver our timbers is that a tasty brew).
properties.name: Old 121 Brewhouse

properties.blurb: Old Alker Distillery is where Louisiana flavors come to life. Offering a range of locally distilled spirits, from smooth rums to bold whiskeys and citrusy gins, every bottle is a testament to their passion for craft distilling. Located in the heart of New Orleans, this distillery isn't just about creating great spirits, it's about building a community that shares a love for the art and science of distilling. Whether you're a local or just passing through, Old Alker is a must-visit destination for anyone who appreciates finely crafted spirits.
properties.name: Old Alker Distillery

properties.address: 300 Anastasia Blvd, St. Augustine, FL 32080, USA
properties.blurb: Old Coast Ales started in a garage with brewing just 10 gallons at a time, a dream and a lot of elbow grease. Today, they’re brewing 200 gallons at a time while keeping that scrappy, bootstrapped spirit alive in every pour. From malty stouts and porters to crisp ESBs, refreshing wheats, and world-class IPAs, there’s a flavor to match every mood. Special barrel-aged ales? Check. A taste of garage-born greatness? Double check.
properties.name: Old Coast Ales

properties.blurb: Not many places can say they have been brewing beer for almost three decades, but the folks over at Old Colorado Brewing Co can. Using their grandfather’s recipes and family traditions they are continuing to perfect their beer that has been handed down for generations. As one of the first micro breweries in Colorado they are proud to serve some award winning beers. As if their beer wasn’t enough now they partner with The BBQ Love Shack to also bring you some of the best BBQ around. With a combo like that I’m surprised you’re still reading this and not already on your way!
properties.name: Old Colorado Brewing Co

properties.address: 22005 S Ellsworth Rd, Queen Creek, AZ 85142
properties.blurb: Step into Old Ellsworth Brewing Co, where good times and great brews collide! Our lively atmosphere is the perfect backdrop for your next adventure in flavor. Get ready to experience the bold and captivating Warthooth Black Rye IPA, a brew that's as fierce as it sounds. Its rich and malty profile will leave your taste buds dancing with delight. And speaking of dancing, our food menu is always jam-packed with specials that'll make your mouth water. From savory bites to delectable entrees, there's something for everyone to savor. So gather your crew, come on over, and let Old Ellsworth Brewing Co be your ultimate destination for unforgettable beers and irresistible bites. Cheers to good times, incredible brews, and the never-ending pursuit of flavor!
properties.name: Old Ellsworth Brewing Co

properties.address: W148N12696 Pleasant View Dr, Germantown, WI 53022
properties.blurb: This charming, quaint spot out in the countryside is definitely worth the drive. Settle in with a cold beer, an appetizer or two, and enjoy your wood-fired pizza with friends. If all that isn’t enticing enough, did we mention the homemade sausages? A proper Wisconsinite would never turn down a sausage sampler platter. Bring your appetite, and maybe some stretchy pants, to the barnyard patio of Old Germantown.
properties.name: Old Germantown

properties.blurb: When you can’t just jet on down to the Deep South for century-old distillery flavor? Let the folks at Old Sugar satisfy those cravings with spirits sure to ease your worries. Their warehouse and tasting room reveal the professionalism and care taken to ensure high quality, and the cocktail list made us want to rent an RV for a week and park it across the street... just so we’d be able to make our way through all the selections. Turns out you can't park an RV just anywhere. Check your math on that one next time, Seth. We're taking Lyfts here from now on.
properties.name: Old Sugar Distillery

properties.blurb: Recently renovated from top to bottom, Olde Town Tavern and Grill is back and better than ever. Think classic neighborhood joint, with tons of TVs for watching the game, and a chill enough vibe to hang out and shoot some pool. Grab a friend, a burger, a beer, and heck, another beer too. You’ll be here awhile.
properties.name: Olde Town Tavern and Grill

properties.blurb: As one of the trailblazers in Baltimore, they've been at the forefront of pushing boundaries, experimenting with new styles, and crafting innovative flavors. It's not just a brewery, it's a testament to the city's brewing heritage and a hub of creativity that keeps the beer scene exciting and ever-evolving. Step into their taproom, a place that holds the essence of Baltimore's beer legacy. It's a love affair with craft brewing that extends not only to their brews but also to the community they serve. So gather your friends, raise your pints, and immerse yourself in the legacy of Oliver Brewing Co. After all, love may come and go, but the joy of beer is everlasting. Cheers to a match made in beer heaven!
properties.name: Oliver Brewing Co

properties.address: 6401 N Florida Ave, Tampa, FL 33604, USA
properties.blurb: Ology Brewing Co draws inspiration from generations of scientists who delved into the intricate realms of taste, aroma, and microbiology. This rich legacy fuels their tireless dedication to merging traditional and innovative techniques, resulting in a mesmerizing range of beverages, including beer, liquor, coffee, and delectable food offerings. Experience the fusion of passion and innovation at Ology Brewing Co - where every sip is an adventure! Their taproom is a haven for beer enthusiasts, offering an array of meticulously crafted brews that span the spectrum from IPAs to stouts, sours to barrel-aged creations. The tap list is a testament to the art of brewing, promising an exciting journey of taste and exploration with every visit.
properties.name: Ology Brewing Co

properties.address: 9462 Deerwood Ln N, Maple Grove, MN 55369
properties.blurb: OMNI Brewing believes variety is the true spice of life—and their taplist proves it. From crisp pilsners and hop-forward IPAs to inventive seasonals, they brew with the goal of having something for every kind of beer lover. Their handcrafted pizzas make a perfect pairing, whether you’re sharing a pie with friends or keeping it all to yourself. At OMNI, the choices are many, but the answer is always yes.
properties.name: OMNI Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Located in Milwaukee’s historic Brewery District, On Tap occupies the iconic Mill House building of the former Pabst Brewing Company. This spot is a must-visit in a city famed for its beer scene, offering some of the best local Wisconsin brews on tap alongside expertly crafted cocktails. Despite its fortress-like exterior, On Tap has a lively, welcoming vibe that makes it easy to see why locals and visitors alike keep coming back for a taste of Milwaukee’s finest.
properties.name: On Tap

properties.address: 301 S Spring St, Beaver Dam, WI 53916
properties.blurb: It’s no surprise that a place named for the ah-oo-gah sound of an old car horn is a lot of fun to visit. Housed in a building that was once an auto shop, Ooga Brewing is committed to being that perfect laid-back spot for locals. It doesn’t hurt that they brew up great beer with even better names, like the No Tan Lines Summer Lager or the Hashtag FML Weizenbock.
properties.name: Ooga Brewing Co

properties.address: 107 Co Rd ID, Barneveld, WI 53507, USA
properties.blurb: Ope, we’re just gonna scooch right by ya and settle in for some seriously good burgers, pizza, sandwiches, and plates. With a full bar pouring local taps and top-notch drinks, this is the kind of spot where hearty food, flowing drinks, and that laid-back Midwestern vibe come together to make every visit feel like a homecoming.
properties.name: Ope Haus Pub

properties.address: 1117 International Pkwy #1701, Lake Mary, FL 32746, USA
properties.blurb: In a land not so far away, a band of adventurous souls set out on a quest to discover a craft beer oasis in Lake Mary. Their mission: to quench their thirst with unique flavors in a Sunshine State setting. And lo and behold, Orange County Brewers emerged to solve their boozy conundrum! This place is the holy grail of Central Florida's craft beer scene, where locals and travelers alike can drink like there's no tomorrow. But it's not just about the beer – the culinary delights are a fiesta for your taste buds, featuring tacos, burritos, quesadillas, and more! With bold flavors in every sip and a mix of rotating and year-round brews, you'll have a front-row seat to Central Florida's fantastic fiesta of flavors. So, why wait? Gather your merry band of beer lovers and set forth to Orange County Brewers for an unforgettable experience!
properties.name: Orange County Brewers

properties.address: 3117 University Ave, San Diego, CA 92104, USA
properties.name: Original 40 Brewing Company

properties.blurb: How many tequilas is too many? According to Otra Vez Cantina, the answer isn’t 200. This high-energy Mexican bar and restaurant has over 200 tequilas and mezcals and a wide range of handcrafted cocktails. Its menu has South American influences. Its decor has modern Mexican influences. And its music program is custom-designed to help create a vibrant, diverse atmosphere.
properties.name: Otra Vez Cantina

properties.blurb: Hi, we’re PubPass! Remember our mutual friend, beer? They introduced us to Our Mutual Friend Brewing, and we're lowkey obsessed. Right in the thick of the action in RiNo / Five Points, OMF is the one with the vibrant mural on their exterior wall. Head inside for unique beers and a staff that'll keep you around long enough for a second beer or a flight. We love their sours!
properties.name: Our Mutual Friend Brewing

properties.address: 1776 11th Ave N, St. Petersburg, FL 33713, USA
properties.blurb: At Outcast Brewing, standing out isn’t just encouraged, it’s the whole point. The taps are busy with craft beers and hard sodas, but the adventure doesn’t stop there. Step into their cocktail lounge, pop over to the wine and bubbles bar, or head out back to the massive pavilion where live music, games, and good times are always on tap. Families roll in, dogs get spoiled, and nobody’s in a rush to leave. Outcast might be the name, but once you’re here, you’re part of the crew.
properties.name: Outcast Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Outfield Beer Co. has a stellar starting lineup of beers and ciders on tap. This Bonner Springs favorite is family friendly - that is, until you challenge your little brother to a game of bags. Then it’s maybe less friendly. And it’s probably against some law to not offer BBQ with your beer, so be sure to scope out the popular BBQ joint next door. At the very least, you can split some ribs with your little brother while he mourns his loss.
properties.name: Outfield Beer Co

properties.address: 1725 Vista View Dr Ste B, Longmont, CO 80504
properties.blurb: Step into a whole new dimension of brewing excellence at Outworld Brewing. This otherworldly brewpub takes your taste buds on a cosmic adventure with their stellar selection of craft beers. From hoppy ales to smooth stouts, they've got flavors that are truly out of this world. But it's not just the brews that will transport you to another realm – the Sci-fi fantasy theme creates an atmosphere that's truly immersive. Indulge in their full menu of delectable dishes that are sure to fuel your intergalactic journey. So gather your crew, embrace the extraterrestrial vibes, and let Outworld Brewing be your portal to a fantastic beer-filled escapade.
properties.name: Outworld Brewing

properties.address: 760 St Philip St, Baton Rouge, LA 70802
properties.blurb: At Oxbow Rum Distillery, every drop of their Estate Rum is a labor of love, crafted from the ground up. They farm, mill, and distill each batch themselves, capturing the true essence of Louisiana’s finest sugarcane. It’s a rum that speaks of integrity and perseverance, with no compromises—just pure, natural flavor from the fields to the bottle. Whether you try the Oxbow Mojito or the Agricole Daiquiri, you’ll taste the truth in every sip.
properties.name: Oxbow Estate Rum

properties.address: 650 Corey Ave, St Pete Beach, FL 33706, USA
properties.blurb: At Oyster Shucker Craft & Draft, the beer list runs deep, the bourbon shelf is stacked, and the view? Let’s just say it does most of the bragging for us. Add in a chef-driven menu that’s fresh, local, and made from scratch, and you’ve got an island spot that knows how to impress. From crisp oysters to cold drafts, this is where flavor and scenery meet and neither one ever plays second fiddle.
properties.name: Oyster Shucker Craft & Draft

properties.address: 721 Grand Ave, San Diego, CA 92109, USA
properties.name: Pacific Beach AleHouse

properties.blurb: Look closely at Palm City Brewing’s tap list, and you’ll notice that IPAs outnumber their other beers—and for good reason. From their Last Laugh IPA, the beer that started it all, to Hazify’s delightful citrus kick, they play to their strengths. Other reasons to visit include $10 burger & beer nights, and small-batch releases every Tuesday. Hello, paradise.
properties.name: Palm City Brewing

properties.address: 2668 US-98 Suite 2100, Santa Rosa Beach, FL 32459, USA
properties.blurb: Palm Folly Hard Seltzer is the epitome of conscious refreshment. Crafted with a commitment to plant-based, vegan, gluten-free, and non-GMO principles, Palm Folly stands out in the crowd. The upscale taproom exudes the essence of the stunning Emerald Coast, drawing inspiration from its sugar sand beaches and crystal-clear, blue-green waters. Guests are invited to indulge in the sparkling seltzers while immersing themselves in the inviting ambiance. Whether lounging by the fire pit or reclining on the lawn, the Palm Folly experience is one of pure enjoyment. To enhance the experience, a grab-and-go fridge awaits, offering picnic boxes brimming with delectable delights that perfectly complement the seltzers.
properties.name: Palm Folly Hard Seltzer

properties.address: 428 SW Ward Rd, Lee's Summit, MO 64081, USA
properties.blurb: Pappo’s Pizza is built on Italian roots, family recipes, and a serious love for fresh, natural ingredients. The hearth-baked pies are loaded with flavor, the passed-down meatball recipe is the stuff of legend, and every bite feels like it came straight from the family table. Honestly, it’s the kind of pizza even your grandma would approve of, though she might ask for the recipe.
properties.name: PaPPo's Pizzeria

properties.address: 12919 Stroh Ranch Ct Unit B, Parker, CO 80134
properties.blurb: There must be something in the beer at Parker Pourhouse because the locals can’t stop raving about the amazing options on the menu. Even better, sprinkled in amongst the beer options are a few crisp ciders and refreshing seltzers, too. And if you double-dip in the house-made pimento cheese dip while you’re waiting for the main course, a Big Papa sandwich, we promise not to tell anyone.
properties.name: Parker Pourhouse

properties.blurb: In typical 2020 fashion, a fire ripped through one of our favorite places in the parish. Fast forward to 2021, and Parlay’s back and better than ever. Their signature 60-foot bar? Well, it’s now 80 feet long. Remember how they didn’t serve food? Well, now they’ve got their very own oyster bar. If you need us, we’ll be welcoming our old haunt back with an afternoon beer. Feel free to join us and toast the return of Lakeview’s prized watering hole.
properties.name: Parlay's Bar

properties.address: 9567 S University Blvd, Highlands Ranch, CO 80126
properties.blurb: Is there a greater pairing than pizza and beer? Okay, maybe don’t answer that. We know pizza pairs well with just about everything. But at Parry’s, with a constantly rotating selection of the best craft beers, you can find the perfect beer and pizza combo. Or beer and calzone combo. Or beer and Italian nachos combo. What we’re saying is, you can’t go wrong because the beer is cold and the pizza is hot and cheesy and what else even matters?
properties.name: Parry's Pizzeria & Taphouse

properties.blurb: Patent 139 in Phoenix is a spot that you don't want to miss. They offer a wide variety of delicious   sandwiches and smash burgers that will leave your taste buds satisfied. One of their standout beers is the Fluffy Tangerine Clouds IPA, which is a must-try for any beer lover. Along with their beer selection, they also have a great variety of cocktails, seltzers, and wine to choose from.
properties.name: Patent 139 Brewing

properties.blurb: Come for the merry and bright holiday decorations. Stay for the ice-cold Pickle Shot. Patti’s Power Plant brightens Milwaukee every year with a giant vintage Santa head, a sparkling tree, and strands upon strands of multicolored lights. But even in Santa’s off-season, Patti’s is perfect for Tuesday Bingo nights, charity events, and watching the Packers with a cold beer and some pickle-flavored popcorn.
properties.name: Patti's Power Plant

properties.blurb: When asked if we love beer or dogs more, we’re honestly stumped. That’s why we practically live at Paws & Pints. You’ll catch us there with our pups all the time, soaking up the good vibes. With indoor and outdoor dog parks, a kitchen packed with snacks, plus a bar and coffeehouse, it's basically paradise for both humans and their four-legged friends. Sip on the “Farmer’s Best Friend” brewed by Confluence, knowing $1 of every draft goes straight to local animal rescues. Pair it with a Bark Burger, and yes, they’ve got a dog menu too. No dog? No problem! The food and brews are still worth the trip!
properties.name: Paws & Pints

properties.address: 1401 St Andrew St, La Crosse, WI 54603
properties.name: Pearl Street Brewery

properties.address: 301 Main St Unit A, Windsor, CO 80550
properties.blurb: No, it isn’t spelled wrong. A peculier is a parish or church set outside the usual jurisdiction. Translation? The beers at Peculier Ales are a step beyond business as usual. Located in a historic mill with a gorgeous outdoor patio, this brewery takes great care with every pour. From crisp lagers to bold sours and everything in between, their lineup is always rotating, always fresh, and always worth a stop.
properties.name: Peculier Ales

properties.address: 1831 E Mulberry St, Fort Collins, CO 80524
properties.blurb: One might classify carrot cake inspired ale or blueberry mango fruit sours as peculiar ales. And you should expect nothing less at this brewery, which strives to provide beer that stands apart from traditional standards. If you want your beer a little less flavorful, don’t panic: Peculier Ales also offers ales that are a little less, well, peculiar.
properties.name: Peculier Ales (Fort. Collins)

properties.blurb: Imagine this: you cruise in, greeted by the whir of laughter, clinking glasses, and the irresistible scent of freshly brewed creations. It's like finding that perfect gear that propels you forward with excitement. At Pedal Haus Brewery, they've mastered the art of crafting beers that are as adventurous as a bike ride down an unexplored trail. And just like a well-tuned bicycle, their menu is finely balanced. Savor burgers that handle like a dream, appetizers that kickstart conversations, and a whole vegan section of the menu. It's a culinary journey that pairs perfectly with their liquid masterpieces. So, if you're ready to hop on a flavor-packed adventure, pedal your way to Pedal Haus Brewery. It's more than a brewery – it's a two-wheeled haven where every sip and every laugh keeps you rolling back for more.
properties.name: Pedal Haus Brewery (Chandler)

properties.address: 214 E Roosevelt St Suite 4, Phoenix, AZ 85004
properties.blurb: Imagine this: you cruise in, greeted by the whir of laughter, clinking glasses, and the irresistible scent of freshly brewed creations. It's like finding that perfect gear that propels you forward with excitement. At Pedal Haus Brewery, they've mastered the art of crafting beers that are as adventurous as a bike ride down an unexplored trail. And just like a well-tuned bicycle, their menu is finely balanced. Savor burgers that handle like a dream, appetizers that kickstart conversations, and a whole vegan section of the menu. It's a culinary journey that pairs perfectly with their liquid masterpieces. So, if you're ready to hop on a flavor-packed adventure, pedal your way to Pedal Haus Brewery. It's more than a brewery – it's a two-wheeled haven where every sip and every laugh keeps you rolling back for more.
properties.name: Pedal Haus Brewery (Phoenix)

properties.blurb: Imagine this: you cruise in, greeted by the whir of laughter, clinking glasses, and the irresistible scent of freshly brewed creations. It's like finding that perfect gear that propels you forward with excitement. At Pedal Haus Brewery, they've mastered the art of crafting beers that are as adventurous as a bike ride down an unexplored trail. And just like a well-tuned bicycle, their menu is finely balanced. Savor burgers that handle like a dream, appetizers that kickstart conversations, and a whole vegan section of the menu. It's a culinary journey that pairs perfectly with their liquid masterpieces. So, if you're ready to hop on a flavor-packed adventure, pedal your way to Pedal Haus Brewery. It's more than a brewery – it's a two-wheeled haven where every sip and every laugh keeps you rolling back for more.
properties.name: Pedal Haus Brewery (Tempe)

properties.address: 2010 Sylvia Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
properties.blurb: Biking and beer, if done safely, can make for the best afternoon. Next time you have your wheels on the Cedar Valley Nature Bike Trail you’d be wrong to not stop at Pedalers Fork. With everything from all you can eat Wings on Saturday nights to Bingo on Tuesdays there is always something going on. Just don’t take too long trying to decide which of their 108 tap beers you want to try this visit.
properties.name: Pedalers Fork

properties.address: 6340 49th St N, Pinellas Park, FL 33781, USA
properties.blurb: Rev Up Your Good Times at Pee-Pa's Garage Craft Brewery! If you're on the hunt for a perfect blend of fun, camaraderie, family vibes, automotive, art, and exceptional beer, look no further than Pee-Pa's Garage Craft Brewery. This vibrant hub has its own collection of signature house beers ready to grace your taste buds. Additionally, their taps feature a rotating selection of guest brews from neighboring breweries, ensuring there's always something delightful on tap to suit your palate. Whether you're an auto aficionado, an art enthusiast, or simply seeking a fantastic time with friends and family, Pee-Pa's Garage Craft Brewery is your ultimate destination.
properties.name: Pee-Pa's Garage Craft Brewery

properties.blurb: Perennial flowers are ones that return every year. Perennial’s beer drinkers return way more frequently than that. That’s because at Perennial Artisan Ales they’ve been brewing up excellent beer for a decade now, and their tasting room is just the type of low-key place you want to spend an afternoon. Here you’ll find us daydreaming over their Belgin-style witbuer with coriander, pink pepercorns and orange peels. Best of all, unlike flowers, beer is always in season.
properties.name: Perennial Artisan Ales

properties.address: 2 E Pikes Peak Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80903, USA
properties.blurb: Phantom Canyon Brewing Co is where the art of brewing meets the mastery of culinary delights. Prepare yourself for a tantalizing experience as thoughtfully crafted brews and award-winning food await you. Here, they believe that great beer deserves great food, and every dish is carefully selected and created with passion and style. From delectable appetizers to mouthwatering salads and enticing entrees, their menu is a testament to the dedication and artistry that goes into every aspect of their culinary offerings. As for their beers, they are brewed with the same level of dedication and passion, resulting in a bold and diverse selection that sets them apart from other breweries. Get ready to embark on a flavor journey unlike anything you've experienced before at Phantom Canyon Brewing Co.
properties.name: Phantom Canyon Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Here the mantra is simple: the best products, the best value, and an explosion of flavor that will have you coming back for seconds. Hold onto your taste buds, because these guys are serious about quality. They're not just making burgers, they're crafting legends. Picture this: grass-fed beef transformed into the stuff of dreams, stacked between buns and topped with all the trimmings. And the soda? Pure cane sugar perfection that'll have your inner kid jumping for joy. But wait, there's more. Enter Music City's mightiest kitchen, where wursts (sausages) are not just cooked, they're crafted. These folks grind, stuff, and smoke their way to sausage heaven. The result? A wurst experience that'll have you singing their praises. Oh, and did we mention the craft beer? It flows here like a liquid treasure, ready to elevate your culinary experience to new heights.  **DEAL GOOD ON CORE BEERS **
properties.name: Pharmacy Burger and Beer Garden

properties.address: 8300 N Hayden Rd, Scottsdale, AZ 85258, USA
properties.name: PHX Beer Co. Scottsdale Brewery & Restaurant

properties.address: 918 New York Ave, St Cloud, FL 34769, USA
properties.blurb: Looking for a place that’s as hot as it sounds? Phyre Saloon is bringing the heat (in the best way possible). Cold drinks, warm vibes, and a whole lot of fun are always on tap here. Whether you're down for a pint with your crew or just seeing where the night takes you, this is your go-to spot. Who needs fireworks when you've got Phyre? Come for the drinks, stay for the fire—because it’s always lit at Phyre Saloon!
properties.name: Phyre Saloon and Steakhouse

properties.address: 900 Rosa L Parks Blvd, Nashville, TN 37208
properties.blurb: ​​Nashville's craft breweries all gather here in one delightful spot. This is the place for those who crave local goodness and want to savor the best of Nashville's brewing scene all at once. Picnic Tap Farmers Market is your ticket to a craft beer extravaganza. Whether you're up for a couple of pints, a flight to sample the spectrum, or a growler to take the joy home, this lively hub has you covered. The taps here are like a merry-go-round of taste, always spinning with Nashville's finest: seasonal marvels, limited-time delights, and those well-loved classics that keep you coming back for more. Now, let's talk dogs – hot dogs, that is! These aren't your run-of-the-mill franks; we're talking top-notch, all-beef creations from the renowned Porter Road Butcher right here in Nashville. Hand-crafted with love, these dogs come in all shapes and sizes, ready to treat your taste buds to a carnivorous delight. And guess what? The buns are no ordinary buns; they're baked fresh by the masters at Provence Breads. Your hunger doesn't stand a chance!
properties.name: Picnic Tap Farmers Market

properties.blurb: Cream City has come a long way from its Schlitz, Pabst, and Miller High Life days. While we still appreciate a classic macro brew, Pilot Project is where the real excitement is. This place is like a beer playground for local brewers, offering 24 rotating taps that range from homebrew experiments to fresh takes from established breweries. With elevated local fare, brewery tours, workshops, and even rooftop yoga, it’s the perfect spot to kick back before hitting a Bucks game or just to explore the craft beer scene.
properties.name: Pilot Project Brewing

properties.blurb: What happens when a former homebrewer restores a historic body shop into a brewery and event space? Great things happen. Great things like Harold's St. Pete Style Lager, Milk Bone Sweet Stout, or any of their seasonal tastey treats. With over 35 taps, Pinellas Ale Works aka 'PAW' is sure you'll find a craft beer you'll love. Don't forget to bring the dog! because PAW is one of the most dog friendly breweries in St. Petersburg and 1st Runner Up for Best Small Brewery in Florida 2020!
properties.name: Pinellas Ale Works

properties.blurb: Webster’s says pinnacle means “the highest point of achievement.” Around here, it just means killer beer, good times, and a calendar so full of events you’ll wonder if they ever sleep. Pinnacle Brewing Co. has already snagged awards for their brews, opened their doors to pups of all shapes and sizes, and carved out a spot at the very top of the local beer scene. Call it coincidence if you want, but we’re pretty sure they’re living proof of their own name.
properties.name: Pinnacle Brewing Co

properties.blurb: If you’re looking for an ale house that serves more than greasy burgers and nachos, Pint Brothers is the spot for you. Nestled in the heart of Denver’s Tech Center in the Marriott, this brewery offers an expansive menu with breakfast options and unexpected bar food like crispy Brussel sprouts and bourbon pecan pie. Don’t worry, beer fiends: they also have an eclectic beer collection with rotating seasonal brews, tasting flights, and small-batch craft beers.
properties.name: Pint Brothers Ale House

properties.blurb: The Piper Inn prides itself on having the best wings in Denver. If you want to argue with a bar that’s been around for over 50 years, well, you’re probably just hangry. Quick—order the unbeatable Chinese Style wings, wash them down with a Tommyknocker Blood Orange IPA, and we’ll pretend your moment of doubt never happened.
properties.name: Piper Inn

properties.blurb: Pisco Sour Restaurant and Lounge is a true feast for the senses. A mouthwatering menu of Peruvian food and tons of patio seating means you can soak up the sunshine and pretend you’re on vacation. The ceviche and pollo a la brasa are menu standouts. And while we’d normally recommend a beer, we obviously gotta go with the pisco sour on this one. When in Peru, after all.
properties.name: Pisco Sour Restaurant

properties.blurb: You’ll show up for a Tropical Snow Dance IPA, stick around for another round or two. Trust us, every brew’s a winner, you'll want to keep trying them. Then you’ll dive into the menu and order a Taco Tray, Double Baked Cayenne Wings, an Arugula Salad, and BBQ Carnitas Nachos just because you can. After all that, you might find yourself wanting to walk home to work it off, just so you can come back and do it all over again.
properties.name: Platt Park Brewing Co

properties.address: 16120 San Carlos Blvd, Fort Myers, FL 33908
properties.blurb: Point Ybel is going to be the best part of your Florida vacation. Yeah, the beach is cool, and sunshine is awesome, but have you tried Snook Bite, their flagship IPA, or Endless Summer Pale Ale? Look, we’re not gonna tell you how to spend your vacation, but the beach will still be there tomorrow. Grab your pals, shake the sand off your toes, and head to one of our fave spots in Fort Myers.
properties.name: Point Ybel Brewing

properties.address: 3200 NW 23rd Ave Suite 500, Pompano Beach, FL 33069, USA
properties.blurb: Every time you step into Pompano Beach Brewing, it's like walking into a surprise party for your taste buds. You never quite know what they've got on tap, but one thing's for sure – it's going to be amazing! Their lineup is a rollercoaster of flavors, featuring bold IPAs that'll make your hop-loving heart sing, decadent pastry stouts that are practically dessert in a glass, a rainbow of goses offering a tantalizing diversity of tastes, and everything in between. Seriously, it's a craft beer adventure waiting to happen.
properties.name: Pompano Beach Brewing Co

properties.blurb: The delightful scent of sizzling bacon perfumes the town of Cudahy and the good times never cease. At Porky's, you'll find mouthwatering $1 hot dogs that will have everyone oinking with joy. But it's not just about the delicious eats—this place is also a haven for beer enthusiasts. The taps are always flowing with a wide variety of brews, catering to every piggy palate. So, whether you're craving a pint or indulging in some porcine delights, Porky's on Squire is the place to be.
properties.name: Porky's on Squire

properties.blurb: Nestled in the heart of New Orleans, Port Orleans celebrates the city's rich culture with every pint. Whether you're a local or visiting for the first time, indulge in their handcrafted brews that capture the essence of the Big Easy while grubbing down on some tacos or wings. Join them for a beer and savor a taste of tradition and creativity.
properties.name: Port Orleans Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Potosi’s lineage dates back to the 19th century. As you feast your eyes on their stone built brewery, you might feel yourself magically growing a handlebar moustache. A grandfather of craft beer, Potosi proudly boasts core staples like the Snake Hollow IPA, Cave Ale Amber, or the confidently named Good Old Potosi Golden Ale. Be sure to also make some time for a brewery tour, a walk through their museum (that’s culture right there, baby!), and of course, any of their seasonals.
properties.name: Potosi Brewing

properties.address: 735 Girod St, New Orleans, LA 70130, USA
properties.name: Pour House @ District

properties.blurb: We here at PubPass like to encourage you, our dear  drinkers, to diversify. Proper 21 is a spot that you  don’t need any urging to go to. It’s got an insane  food menu. It’s got a posh sports bar vibe (you might  be thinking “posh” and “sports bar” don’t go together  but you’d be wrong) and once you’re immersed in it,  my friend, you are in it. Now we know most of you  like burgers as much as you like beer, and the  Proper Burger does not disappoint.
properties.name: Proper 21

properties.blurb: Lucky for you, we loved Proper 21 so much we’re not-so-subtly suggesting you hit both DC locations. Have we steered you wrong yet? No, no we have not. Locals absolutely love this spot for its elevated sports bar vibe, unique menu, and cocktail list. You can definitely judge a place by the people that happy hour there, and only the cool kids are hanging here. So grab your buds, pull up a stool, and happy hour your heart out.
properties.name: Proper 21K

properties.blurb: We don’t have to be told twice to “drink like a German.” You might be wondering how exactly Germans drink. Our completely unscientific poll reveals that drinking like a German means with gusto, with friends, with ingredients sourced directly from Germany. It also means partaking in some delicious bar snacks. It means washing those snacks down with a nutty Dunkel or a summer seasonal Radler. Go forth, friends, and drink like Germans!
properties.name: Prost Brewing Co & Biergarten

properties.blurb: The fine folks at Prost Biergarten lean heavily into their German heritage and we gotta say, no one does it better in the beer business than the Germans. In fact, they offer an award-winning lineup that includes a refreshing pilsner and a rich dunkelweizen. Pair either of those with one of the mouth-watering menu items (bratwurst or schnitzel, anyone?) and you’re in for a good time, with or without your lederhosen.
properties.name: Prost Brewing Co. & Biergarten (Highlands Ranch)

properties.address: 901 Bayfront Ct suite 102, San Diego, CA 92101, USA
properties.name: Protector Brewery

properties.address: 711 E Missouri Ave Ste 115, Phoenix, AZ 85014, USA
properties.name: PROVISION

properties.address: 1401 West River Rd N, Minneapolis, MN 55411
properties.blurb: We're certain you've tried Miraculum — the glorious IPA that helped this place grow into one of the hottest tap rooms in town. If not? Start with that. Then try something very few in the country have tried... feather bowling! Pryes is one of only three locations in the states where you can play said sport. Something tells us you'll be staying for a few! PubPass Not Redeemable For Barrel Aged Beers
properties.name: Pryes Brewing

properties.blurb: Step into the world of Public Craft Brewing Co, where the vibe is all about laid-back enjoyment, quality brews, tasty bites, toe-tapping tunes, and a big ol' embrace of the downtown Kenosha community. At Public Craft Brewing Co, they're all about the craft-brewed ales that put a smile on your face and a little hop in your step. But it's not just about the beer; oh no, it's a full-blown experience. Delicious food that'll make your belly do a happy dance? Check. Live music that sets the perfect backdrop for your good times? Check. And let's not forget the warm, fuzzy feeling that comes from supporting your downtown Kenosha community – these folks take that responsibility seriously, and it shows.
properties.name: Public Craft Brewing Co

properties.blurb: For as much as we love beer you’d assume we’ve given some thought about brewing our own. While we don’t have the skills needed for that, we have plenty of ideas. That’s where Public Offering Brewing Co comes in. They don’t just want to brew the beer THEY like, they want to brew the beers YOU want. They invite you to ask questions and tell them what kind of beer you think would be rad. Nothing is off limits when you put your creativity in the hands of these folks. So dream big, and stop in with those new ideas.
properties.name: Public Offering Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Nestled right in the mountains within spitting distance of Dillon Bay, Pug Ryan’s Brewery is about to be the highlight of your day. Their classic pub fare pairs perfectly with draft beer options ranging from the Pack Iron Pale Ale to the Outlaw Vanilla Stout. Daily specials and awesome outdoor seating will keep you coming back.
properties.name: Pug Ryan's Brewery

properties.blurb: With a name like Pump Haus, you know they're serious about their beer game. From hoppy delights to smooth sips, their taps are a symphony of flavors just waiting for you to explore. And speaking of bites, their kitchen is like a culinary playground where they whip up mouthwatering creations that'll have you coming back for more. Got a competitive streak? Challenge your friends to a game of pool, or settle in front of one of their TV's to catch the latest game action. And let's talk about the specials – every night of the week is a new opportunity to indulge in some seriously delicious deals.
properties.name: Pump Haus Pub & Grill

properties.blurb: With an impressive array of 24 taps, half of which showcase the brewery's in-house creations, Quarter Barrel is on a mission to delight taste buds with a diverse selection of beers. From time-honored classics to intriguing experimental blends, the beer menu promises an exciting journey for every guest. But the excitement doesn't stop there. A culinary haven as well, the pizzeria crafts delectable pizzas from scratch, embracing locally-sourced ingredients to ensure a top-notch dining experience that's a cut above the rest. You can enjoy the arcade filled with over 40 games, transporting you back to the heyday of video gaming while savoring their brews and bites. It's a family-friendly haven where both young and young-at-heart can make memories together.
properties.name: Quarter Barrel Brewery and Arcade

properties.blurb: There’s no better place to happy hour in Chandler (we checked our notes and can confirm that the Quarthaus patio beats all other patios). We’d never steer you away from sampling a local craft beer, but perhaps we can nudge you in the direction of a cocktail made with their small batch vodka or whisky. A gentle little nudge. Go on now, try that spicy bloody mary this weekend. You know you want to.
properties.name: QuartHaus

properties.address: 506 E Grand Ave, Des Moines, IA 50309
properties.blurb: We love Buffalo chicken... in any form or setting. We also love dips. So when we discovered the homemade Buffalo Chicken Dip at Quinton’s we just about lost it. Thank god we held it together! Had we not kept our wits about us, we might have missed out on other homemade noshables like poppers, fries and even more dips. And, kids? Those are just appetizers. When you’re ready to go main event? Get a sandwich like the T.A.C. or the Nelson Philly or... wait... is that?  Buffalo Chicken! We’re spent.
properties.name: Quinton's

properties.address: 5741 C St SW Suite D, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404
properties.blurb: At Quinton's, the culinary journey is a delectable exploration of flavors and favorites.From mouthwatering appetizers to sumptuous burgers, fresh salads, and a medley of specialties and classics, the menu caters to all tastes and cravings. But let's talk about the real showstopper – the spuds. These Idaho potatoes, hearty and wholesome, take center stage as a meal in their own right. Each serving features not just one, but two Idaho potatoes, generously adorned with an array of toppings limited only by your imagination. And of course, the libations are equally impressive. Quinton's proudly presents a beer list that showcases the finest brews Iowa has to offer, ensuring that every sip is a celebration of local craftsmanship.
properties.name: Quinton's (C Street Cedar Rapids)

properties.blurb: At Quinton's, the culinary journey is a delectable exploration of flavors and favorites.From mouthwatering appetizers to sumptuous burgers, fresh salads, and a medley of specialties and classics, the menu caters to all tastes and cravings. But let's talk about the real showstopper – the spuds. These Idaho potatoes, hearty and wholesome, take center stage as a meal in their own right. Each serving features not just one, but two Idaho potatoes, generously adorned with an array of toppings limited only by your imagination. And of course, the libations are equally impressive. Quinton's proudly presents a beer list that showcases the finest brews Iowa has to offer, ensuring that every sip is a celebration of local craftsmanship.
properties.name: Quinton's (Coralville)

properties.address: 450 1st St SW Unit 101, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404
properties.blurb: At Quinton's, the culinary journey is a delectable exploration of flavors and favorites.From mouthwatering appetizers to sumptuous burgers, fresh salads, and a medley of specialties and classics, the menu caters to all tastes and cravings. But let's talk about the real showstopper – the spuds. These Idaho potatoes, hearty and wholesome, take center stage as a meal in their own right. Each serving features not just one, but two Idaho potatoes, generously adorned with an array of toppings limited only by your imagination. And of course, the libations are equally impressive. Quinton's proudly presents a beer list that showcases the finest brews Iowa has to offer, ensuring that every sip is a celebration of local craftsmanship.
properties.name: Quinton's (Downtown Cedar Rapids)

properties.address: 215 E Washington St, Iowa City, IA 52240
properties.blurb: At Quinton's, the culinary journey is a delectable exploration of flavors and favorites.From mouthwatering appetizers to sumptuous burgers, fresh salads, and a medley of specialties and classics, the menu caters to all tastes and cravings. But let's talk about the real showstopper – the spuds. These Idaho potatoes, hearty and wholesome, take center stage as a meal in their own right. Each serving features not just one, but two Idaho potatoes, generously adorned with an array of toppings limited only by your imagination. And of course, the libations are equally impressive. Quinton's proudly presents a beer list that showcases the finest brews Iowa has to offer, ensuring that every sip is a celebration of local craftsmanship.
properties.name: Quinton's Bar and Deli (Iowa City)

properties.blurb: R Bar hits all the right notes to make it feel like, well, our bar. A full menu of your favorite bar food, from burgers to pizza to apps like deep fried pickles and tots. A strong selection of beers—or a Bloody Mary if it’s that kind of morning. Daily specials and events like Tuesday Bingo and a Friday Fish Fry. Yeah, we’ll be coming back.
properties.name: R BAR

properties.blurb: At R'Noggin Brewing Co, the heart of Southeast Wisconsin, passion for high-quality beer comes to life. With a dedication to tradition and a deep-seated respect for the craft, R'Noggin proudly produces exceptional brews that pay homage to the region's time-honored beer legacy. Step into a world where beer is not just a beverage but a cherished tradition. With an ever-evolving selection of 90+ different beers on tap throughout the year, each visit is a new adventure. Explore a diverse array of flavors, styles, and aromas that only the art of brewing can provide. And now, there's even more to savor. R'Noggin Brewing Co has joined forces with Antioch Pizza Shop, bringing you a mouthwatering fusion of flavors. From classic pizzas and hearty pastas to delectable Italian beef and hot dogs, the menu offers a tantalizing journey through Italian-American culinary delights.
properties.name: R'Noggin Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Is there anything more Wisconsin than a good ol’ fashioned Friday night fish fry? Okay, it ranks at least in the top five. Rail House, a family-owned brewpub, is frequented by locals and out-of-towners just passing through, but one thing they can all agree on is that the service is friendly, the onion rings are piping hot, and the beer is cold.
properties.name: Rail House Restaurant & Brewpub

properties.address: 4055 Central Ave NE, Columbia Heights, MN 55421, USA
properties.blurb: At Rail Werks Brewing Depot, you’re in for a trifecta: cold beer, smokin’ BBQ, and a family-friendly atmosphere that feels like a backyard cookout. Whether you're grabbing a pint from their rotating taps or diving into some fall-off-the-bone BBQ, it's always a good time. Bring the whole crew—yes, even the picky eaters. The beer flows, the meat smokes, and the vibe is just right.
properties.name: Rail Werks Brewing Depot

properties.address: 11625 Reed Ct Unit B, Broomfield, CO 80020
properties.blurb: In case you hadn't heard, Rails End Beer is the place with the Blood Orange IPA that has everyone in the greater Bloomfield area drooling. It’s also the place with the amazing patio with the mist that feels refreshing in the summer. It also happens to be the place that’s super dog-friendly, if that’s your thing. At least one of these things has to be your thing. Make Rails End Beer your new thing, you won’t regret it.
properties.name: Rails End Beer Co

properties.blurb: You’ve seen the maneuver. Maybe you’ve even participated. The cap goes inside out. The beer starts flowing. The comeback’s in full effect. The bar’s in jubilation. There are ducks on the pond. It’s a shot to the gap. The runner rounds third. He’s heading home. The throw is late! Excuse us, bartender—another round for the victors. We loved the Ambush, a slightly malty amber ale with caramel notes on the backbone, perfect for raising a glass to a winning night at the yard. Play ball!
properties.name: Rally Cap Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Range Restaurant and Cocktails invites you to embark on an unparalleled experience, where three distinct concepts seamlessly intertwine to create a captivating Central Iowa destination like no other. The American cuisine restaurant at Range is a culinary haven, boasting signature steaks, artisanal pastas, unique burgers, delectable appetizers, and more. Their commitment to utilizing the freshest, locally-sourced ingredients, primarily from the Midwest, shines through in every dish, all complemented by reasonably priced, high-quality proteins.Embracing innovation, their carefully curated cocktail menu features house-made ingredients, handpicked bourbon barrels, and premium liquors. With an impressive selection of over 20 draft beers, including seasonal picks, and one of Iowa's most extensive arrays of special reserve whiskeys, Range's libation offerings are second to none. For a truly unique experience, explore their custom indoor golf center – a space of unparalleled distinction. With six PGA-endorsed indoor golf simulators, Range caters to both avid golfers and those seeking an entertaining night out.
properties.name: Range Restaurant and Cocktails

properties.address: 10930 Endeavour Way Suite C, Seminole, FL 33777, USA
properties.name: Rapp Brewing Company

properties.address: 11000 Metro Pkwy Unit 23, Fort Myers, FL 33966, USA
properties.name: Red Horse Distillery

properties.blurb: If you wandered into Red Rock Saloon, you’d be forgiven for thinking you weren’t in Madison anymore. Billing themselves as the city’s only country and rock bar, they mean business, hosting live music every Friday and offering some of the tastiest wings and BBQ around. Come thirsty, though we recommend riding the mechanical bull before throwing back the whiskey.
properties.name: Red Rock Saloon

properties.blurb: Red Rocks Grill is the perfect place to pop in for a pre-show burger and beer on your way to spend an epic night at the legendary Red Rocks Amphitheater. This rustic spot has charmed locals and concert-goers for years. The Dinosaur Eggs are spot on, and we enthusiastically endorse the Man Handler burger (meat on meat on meat), with a side of onion rings and a cold brewski to wash it down.
properties.name: Red Rocks Grill

properties.blurb: If you swing by the Red Rooster on a Thursday you are in for some grooving and jamming, as the Blues Jam sets the stage on fire!
