On Fridays, it's all about the mouthwatering Fish Dinner - beer-battered cod that'll make your taste buds do a happy dance! With slaw and house-made tartar sauce, it's a seafood delight. But don't worry if you visit any other day, because there's always something to crow about!
properties.name: Red Rooster

properties.blurb: If you want to catch the game let us suggest Red’s. If you want to catch some good vibes may we also suggest Red’s. Now, if you want to catch BOTH, boy are you in for a treat. With TVs galore a hopping beer list and some of the best wings around you can’t go wrong. You can choose from any of their 9 sauces or four dry rubs. Trust us, you’ll be feeling saucy.
properties.name: Red's American Grill

properties.blurb: Need an excuse to treat yourself to a beer today? Resolute Brewing Company has just the thing. Food trucks seven days a week. Twenty tap lines serving traditional, barrel-aged, and unique styles. A dedicated gluten-free tap. A large outdoor patio and accompanying lawn. Need we say more? Fine. Juice Index might be the tastiest New England-style IPA this side of Vermont.
properties.name: Resolute Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Resolute Brewing turned out to be a welcome stop between Denver and Boulder, and boy, we sure need to make that trip more often if it’s gonna mean fantastic food trucks, twenty or so tap lines, and a postcard worthy view of the mountains from their patio. Events like pop music bingo and movie nights offer a little something extra than other breweries, but the All the Fuss Lemondrop Sour and Resolute Brewing’s Transparently Trendy New England Style IPA were ones that we would squeeze into that postcard.
properties.name: Resolute Brewing Tap & Cellar

properties.blurb: Belly up for a night of revelry at Revel Bar. Our recommendation? Try their take on an Old Fashoned — complete with a fire-kissed orange peel and rosemary (crazy good). After that? Sip on a Harvest Margarita before you hit the hookah (yeah, it’s a hookah bar, too) and get all contemplative about whether or not Bay View is one of the best neighborhoods in the universe. What is a universe, anyway? [exhale]
properties.name: Revel Bar

properties.blurb: Rewined Beer & Wine Bar is the brainchild of two individuals with a shared love for warm retro nostalgia and gaming. This eclectic establishment is a reflection of their vision, much like their ever-evolving selection of 130 beers, ciders, and wines, which includes a rotating lineup of eight beer and wine taps. At Rewined, you're invited to step into a world where you can enjoy 8-bit Nintendo games, Halo matches, or even challenge a friend to a game of Risk while savoring a refreshing brew and indulging in a classic grilled cheese sandwich. But the passion at Rewined extends beyond beverages and games. This is a veteran- and gay-owned business that takes pride in its place within the community. So, pull up a barstool, select your favorite brew, and join in the fun. Whether you're sinking Battleships or simply savoring a good time, Rewined Beer & Wine Bar looks forward to welcoming you with open arms.
properties.name: Rewined Beer And Wine Bar

properties.address: 1360 W Sweden Rd, Brockport, NY 14420, USA
properties.blurb: ** Deal for $3 beer OR 1/2 Priced Flight! **
properties.name: RG Brewery

properties.address: 920 Girard St NE, Washington, DC 20017, USA
properties.blurb: Nestled in Northeast DC, Right Proper Brewing Co.'s Tasting Room is your passport to a world of flavors. Open from Wednesday through Sunday, this cozy haven serves up their core beers that are bound to make your taste buds dance. How about diving into the Senate Beer or sipping on the Li'l Wit? But the story doesn't end there. Right Proper's ever-evolving seasonal offerings are sure to keep you intrigued. Enjoy their eclectic creations through flights and glasses, or if you're on the move, grab cans, bottles, or growlers to go. Step inside and soak in the ambiance of reclaimed cherry wood and a creatively quirky chalk art mural. Peek into the brewery and witness the magic happening. When the weather's lovely, head out to the patio for some good times under the open sky. Right Proper Brewing Co. is all about crafting memories, one sip at a time!
properties.name: Right Proper Brewing Co

properties.address: 624 T St NW, Washington, DC 20001, USA
properties.blurb: Just when you thought Right Proper couldn’t top their game, you step into the Shaw Brewpub & Kitchen and realize they absolutely can. Their brews pair perfectly with some of the tastiest food in town. Whether you’re diving into a juicy burger, crispy chicken sandwich, hot wings, or beer-battered cheese curds (yes, they’re as good as they sound), every bite is a winner. Trust us, you can’t go wrong. Especially when you’ve got a cold Right Proper beer to wash it all down.
properties.name: Right Proper Brewing Company (Shaw Brewpub & Kitchen)

properties.address: 28120 Hunters Ridge Blvd, Bonita Springs, FL 34135
properties.blurb: Whether you’re on vacation or just wish you were, Riptide Brewing is the spot for laid-back vibes and refreshing beers. Their newest location is spacious and airy, with lots of outdoor seating and a rotating roster of food trucks, plus the same brews you’ve come to love. Stop by for trivia night or to soak up some sun with a Seafoam Haze IPA in hand.
properties.name: Riptide Brewing Co (Bonita Springs)

properties.blurb: Some people’s ritual is meditation, or running, or cleaning the kitchen every Thursday. Personally we like the ritual of eating incredible food in a place that feels like a cozy cabin retreat. Ritual Social House is exactly that, with a menu that packs serious flavor, from the pizzas to the parmesan fries. Did we mention their cocktail lineup and selection of local microbrews? Say hello to your new weekly tradition.
properties.name: Ritual Social House

properties.address: 12 Avenida Menendez, St. Augustine, FL 32084, USA
properties.blurb: River & Fort serves southern continental flavors with a side of skyline envy. Local seafood, steaks, craft cocktails, and rotating local beers pair perfectly with rooftop views of St. Augustine’s historic streets, the Bayfront, and even the lighthouse on a clear day. It’s elevated dining, literally.
properties.name: River & Fort

properties.address: 201 Main St St 101, Kansas City, MO 64105
properties.blurb: History permeates the very air of this space, carrying the essence of the pre-prohibition breweries that once thrived here. River Bluff Brewing has fully embraced these historical vibes, and we believe they've successfully struck paydirt by doing so. With an ever-changing tap list, you’re sure to always find something that’ll suit your fancy. The brewers here meld together tricks-of-the-trade from the past and present to create some truly golden elixirs. This is definitely our favorite kind of alchemy.
properties.name: River Bluff Brewing

properties.blurb: As a brewery that’s big on community, River Hops is ready to welcome you. With a full calendar of events, including tons of live music, it’s the perfect spot for you and your group of friends to spend the afternoon. In the warmer months, there’s ample outdoor seating. Try the Oxbow Orange and see for yourself why it’s their top-selling beer.
properties.name: River Hops Brewing

properties.blurb: Pull up a seat and get ready to deep-dive into the delectable world of Belgian style and barrel-aged beers. Our friends at River North established their reputation for these tasty yeast-forward beers as soon as their doors first opened, and believe us, it is well deserved. Pop into the Washington St. location, and you’ll get a chance to sample their heavy-hitting barrel-aged brews – yes we love the God Complex, no we will not be discussing the reasons why at this time. Should you find yourself exploring the spaces and views of RiNo, bop into their Blake St. location! Personally, we’d say grab a Mountain Haze and head outside to their patio with your pup, but what do we know?
properties.name: River North Brewery

properties.blurb: When you’re a brewery in Colorado, you have to prepare yourself for all four seasons. River North has the perfect patio and accompanying tap lineup to maximize those long summer nights. When snowy season hits, you can hunker down inside with a delightful array of winter seasonal offerings. Regardless of the season, you know you’re going to get a great beer brewed by great folks.
properties.name: River North Brewery

properties.blurb: Beer and coffee. Together. In one place. No, we swear you’re not dreaming. There truly is a place you can delight your senses with a perfectly crafted latte, or a rich cup of coffee, and THEN delight them in an entirely different way with a hazy IPA, a tart sour, or a crushable lager. Y’all we gotta say this is about as close to perfection as you’re going to get.
properties.name: Rochester Brewing

properties.blurb: Beer and coffee. Together. In one place. No, we swear you’re not dreaming. There truly is a place you can delight your senses with a perfectly crafted latte, or a rich cup of coffee, and THEN delight them in an entirely different way with a hazy IPA, a tart sour, or a crushable lager. Y’all we gotta say this is about as close to perfection as you’re going to get.
properties.name: Rochester Brewing (Parkville)

properties.blurb: Kansas Rock City, anyone? Founded in 2012, Rock & Brews is the brainchild of a small group headlined by none other than Gene Simmons and Paul Stanley of KISS fame. This is the place to be if you wanna rock ‘n’ roll all night after indulging in some retail therapy or getting some much-needed spa treatment or visiting the museum or movie theater at the impressive Prairiefire shopping and entertainment complex. Classic rock fans will delight in the ambiance and menu items named in honor of songs and artists from the glory days. All manner of classic American fare (appetizers, burgers, BBQ, pizzas) are on offer here, as are over 50 rotating taps with plenty of craft faves, including local stalwarts like Boulevard and Free State Brewing Co.
properties.name: Rock and Brews (Prairie Fire)

properties.blurb: We love a pub with a little bit of history behind it. Nestled inside the historic train depot, Rock Bottom Express is just such a place. They’ve retained much of the original building while creating a classic bar feel. Also classic is the food: burgers, wings, cheese curds. As luck would have it, all of those pair perfectly with their line-up of—you guessed it—classic beer favorites.
properties.name: Rock Bottom Express

properties.blurb: You’ve got the East Coast and you’ve got the West Coast, but in Loveland, it’s all about the Rock Coast. Brewed in-house with beers named after Colorado’s trails, passes, and iconic figures, it’s a lineup that feels right at home in the Rockies. Pair it with some seriously crave-worthy bar food, and you’ve got the perfect mix of local flavor and laid-back vibes. Beer in your glass, bites on your plate. Let us welcome to the best coast of all.
properties.name: Rock Coast Brewery

properties.blurb: Step into the world of Rock'n Dough Pizza & Brewery, where the magic of delicious brews and irresistible food dances together in perfect harmony. This lively brewpub boasts an impressive lineup of ales, IPA's, ciders, and even some tongue-tingling sours on tap. It's a paradise for beer enthusiasts and flavor explorers alike. But hold on, it's not just about the brews here. Prepare to have your taste buds dazzled by our culinary creations beyond the realm of pizza perfection. Sink your teeth into juicy burgers, wrap your hands around savory wraps, or embrace the fresh goodness of our vibrant salads. At Rock'n Dough, we believe that good times are best enjoyed with a frothy mug in one hand and a scrumptious bite in the other. So come on over and experience the lively atmosphere, where brews flow, flavors explode, and laughter fills the air. It's a taste adventure you won't want to miss!
properties.name: Rock'n Dough Pizza & Brewery

properties.address: 1320 S Vandeventer Ave, St. Louis, MO 63110
properties.blurb: Rockwell Beer Co. shares a mission with all of us who appreciate a finely crafted brew – they're here for good beer, and we're definitely here for good beer too! Nestled proudly in the heart of St. Louis, Missouri, this 15-barrel brewery has deep roots in the community and a refreshingly straightforward philosophy: Beer should be all about fun, not fussiness. And we couldn't agree more! At Rockwell, they're always pushing the boundaries, experimenting with new styles, and approaching beer-making with an open and creative mind. Every sip is a testament to their dedication to crafting exceptional brews that'll put a smile on your face.
properties.name: Rockwell Beer Co

properties.blurb: Rockwell Beer Garden is your go-to destination for an outdoor escape. With its inviting open-air patio and delectable tavern-style pizza, it's the perfect spot to indulge your senses. Sip on a refreshing craft beer while basking in the sun and enjoying the vibrant ambiance. Fuel up with a cup of expertly brewed coffee from Coma Coffee Roasters, ensuring a delightful start to your day. With 16 HDTVs scattered throughout, you can catch all the action of your favorite sports games while immersing yourself in the lively atmosphere. Owned by two former rugby players, Rockwell Beer Garden exudes a spirit of camaraderie and good times. Come and experience the joy of great food, great drinks, and great company at Rockwell Beer Garden, where every visit is a memorable escape.
properties.name: Rockwell Beer Garden

properties.blurb: If Watermelon Cucumber, Blackberry Chocolate, and Pineapple Passionfruit don’t sound like your typical beer flavors, you must not have been to Rocky Mountain Brewery lately. Specializing in cider-flavored beers, these guys always have something unique on tap. Standard lager more your thing? Yeah, they’ve got that too—but trust us when we tell you the Pineapple has a cult following for a reason.
properties.name: Rocky Mountain Brewery

properties.blurb: The combo of pizza, beer, and sports is pretty much always a slam dunk. Rocky Mountain Pizzeria knocks it out of the park with their collection of Colorado sports memorabilia and their commitment to showing every game imaginable on the bar’s numerous TVs. Ready for the hat trick? In the summer, they have live music every Friday on their patio. Chant it with us now: MVP! MVP!
properties.name: Rocky Mountain Pizzeria

properties.blurb: Wagyu burgers. Seasonal produce. Tap-tending. No, we’re not playing a delicious game of Mad-Libs. We’re describing Rocky Mountain Tap & Garden, an upscale beer emporium that boasts the best of Colorado craft beer. Skip the bar line with one of their 30 self-serve beer taps, or check out the market menu for dishes featuring seasonal produce from a local Boulder farm. Rocky Mountain also offers a premium selection of wines and carefully crafted mixed drinks, because of course they do.
properties.name: Rocky Mountain Tap & Garden

properties.blurb: Founded in 1999 by a quartet of Colorado-raised siblings, Rockyard Brewing Co proudly stands as the enduring brewpub gem of Douglas County. With a rich history and a dedication to quality, Rockyard has emerged as a true pioneer in the craft beer scene. Their brews have earned esteemed accolades from renowned beer competitions like the Great American Beer Festival, World Beer Cup, and the Colorado State Fair. These medals of distinction are a testament to Rockyard's unwavering commitment to crafting exceptional beers that capture the essence of Colorado's vibrant brewing culture. Beyond their liquid triumphs, Rockyard offers a full-fledged culinary experience. Their menu is a symphony of flavors, featuring a tempting array of appetizers, nourishing soups and salads, mouthwatering burgers, satisfying sandwiches, and enticing entrees.
properties.name: Rockyard Brewing Co

properties.address: 2727 S Broad Ave Suite #103, New Orleans, LA 70125, USA
properties.name: Roulaison Distilling Co

properties.blurb: This brewery has a warning on its website: “micro-brewed beer has a lot of flavor and may cause you to actually taste your beer!” And Rowland’s is as full of history as it is cheek: these walls once housed a fire station, a city hall, a dress shop, and a tavern. The place is lined with family photos and eclectic, one-of-a-kind items, including a mirror that dates back to 1926. Pop in for a cold brew and warm vibes, or take a growler home with you.
properties.name: Rowland's Calumet Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Ruby Beach Brewing is all about locally sourced, adventurous beers that keep the Jacksonville craft scene interesting. Grab a Scallywag Golden Sour or take a gamble on the ever-changing Sour Du Jour. Think flavors that rotate from mango to lychee and beyond. With a modern taproom and outdoor Jaguars viewing parties, it’s a great spot to sip, cheer, and enjoy some local flavor.
properties.name: Ruby Beach Brewing

properties.blurb: Embark on a flavor-filled journey at Rule105, where craft beers take center stage. From stouts and porters to IPAs, pale ales, and lagers, each brew is meticulously crafted and gluten-reduced for your enjoyment. With live music, delicious wood-fired pizzas, wings, and pretzel balls, along with trivia nights and local club gatherings, Rule105 offers a vibrant and engaging experience. Let their friendly staff guide you to the perfect beer while you soak in the lively atmosphere. Join them for a memorable time filled with tasty bites, live tunes, and amazing brews!
properties.name: Rule 105 Brewing

properties.address: N7454 Summit Rd, Plymouth, WI 53073, USA
properties.name: Rumors Roadhouse BBQ

properties.address: 4721 S Orange Ave, Orlando, FL 32806, USA
properties.blurb: Beer. Oysters. Pizza. Burgers. Charcuterie boards. Do we really need to say more? Runabout Brewing is basically a greatest-hits playlist of everything you actually want to eat and drink. Cold brews, a raw bar, and wood-fired bites mean you’re set for the night. Whether you came hungry, thirsty, or both. Honestly, the only thing left to ask is why you’re still reading this instead of already grabbing a pint and a dozen oysters. Go on, we’ll save you a seat.
properties.name: Runabout Brewing

properties.blurb: Saddle Mountain has plenty of great beers, but their Clan-Destine Scottish Ale is the true standout. Once just a seasonal, it’s now their most-brewed beer thanks to five GABF medals in six years (and fans demanding it year-round). Pair a pint with one of their killer craft burgers—or go full Homer Simpson and grab hot buttermilk donuts for the table.
properties.name: Saddle Mountain Brewing Co

properties.blurb: If you climb a mountain you get to start a brewery, them's the rules. At least around here. Sahale Peak is perhaps not the place to start if you're an amateur climber. A more reasonable ascent? The Summit — a tastng flight of all ten of Sahale's taps. You might need to warm up tho. Use your PubPass for a Golden Ale or Wheatsconsin Weiss and prepare for glory.
properties.name: Sahale Ale Works

properties.address: 688 Minnehaha Ave E, St Paul, MN 55106
properties.blurb: In Budapest, there exist clandestine and wondrous patios that sit between buildings, filled with found furniture, strung lights, laughter and music. Lucky for you? Saint Paul Brewing has brought this Bohemian bliss to life in your backyard. So come transport your senses with more than a dozen taps and some of the most creative wood-fired pizzas this side of Hungary.
properties.name: Saint Paul Brewing

properties.address: 530 W Broadway Rd, Tempe, AZ 85282, USA
properties.name: SaltFire Brewery Co Taphouse

properties.blurb: Already a big fan of the Salvatore’s in Sun Prairie, the newer Livingston street location in Madison is just as friendly and just as lauded. WIth modernized touches to the bar and dining room, a delectably-creative cocktail list, and Chef Jed and his team dishing up menu offerings like the Bucatini Miso Carbonara and Havarti Bacon Smashburger, there’s no mystery why Salvatore’s has won over locals and visitors alike. Then there’s the pizza, my friends. Oh my, is there the pizza….Good enough to bring us back again.. and again.. and yes, again.
properties.name: Salvatore's Tomato Pies (Livingston)

properties.address: 121 E Main St, Sun Prairie, WI 53590
properties.blurb: Don’t tell us a tomato pie is the same as a pizza because sorry Jack, it’s not. Putting sauce on after the cheese changes EVERYTHING. It’s delightful, it’s tangy, and having to choose which is better would be torture. Luckily Salvatore’s doesn’t make us, offering both tomato pies and traditional pizza at a level of expertise that hearkens back to the great pizzamakers of New Jersey. Salads, burgers, pasta and more complement a menu obviously built by food lovers. The exposed brick facade and gorgeous hardwood floors make Salvatore’s a damn sharp looking addition to Sun Praire’s Main Street. With eight beers on tap, like the Imperial Dragon IPA, Salvatore’s is a definitive return trip.
properties.name: Salvatore's Tomato Pies (Sun Prairie)

properties.address: 3160 8th St SW suite p, Altoona, IA 50009
properties.blurb: This Altoona bar and grill offers your typical tavern fare - greasy cheeseburgers, hot and crispy fries, and ice cold beers. And maybe typical isn’t for you. But you’d be missing out on local drafts with your pals during peak patio season, some of the friendliest bartenders this side of the Mississippi, and crowd-pleasing karaoke nights. Okay, upon closer inspection, Sam’s is anything but typical.
properties.name: Sam's Bar & Grill

properties.blurb: Sam’s calls itself a place for friends. Fair enough. You could definitely come here with your “friends”… But what if they drink one of the pints you order off Sam’s thoughtfully-curated list? What if they Bogart a slice of that Foltz Family Market pizza you ordered? What if they steal a slurp of your Old Fashioned or a handful of your kettle chips? You know what, Dave? I think I’m gonna start drinking alone for a while, okay?
properties.name: Sam’s Tap

properties.address: 10450 Friars Rd, San Diego, CA 92120, USA
properties.name: San Diego Brewing Company

properties.address: 150 S Wellwood Ave, Lindenhurst, NY 11757, USA
properties.name: Sand City Brewing

properties.address: 111 W 2nd Ave suite c, Hutchinson, KS 67501
properties.blurb: Step into Sandhills Brewing and prepare to have your taste buds tantalized with their exceptional oak-fermented and specialty beers. This brewery is all about pushing the boundaries of flavor and crafting unique brews that will leave you craving more. With a focus on quality and innovation, Sandhills Brewing delivers a lineup of beers that will make your taste buds sing with joy. But it's not just the beer that will captivate you; the taproom itself is a hidden gem. It's a laid-back, low-key haven where beer enthusiasts of all ages can gather and unwind.
properties.name: Sandhills Brewing

properties.blurb: Welcome to Sandy Valley Brewing Co., where the beer is as delightful as a sunny stroll through the valley! They're all about partnering with local foragers and farmers to infuse their brews with the flavors they love. Get ready to taste the pure joy of their Apriel, a fruited sour with apricots, and the Jola, a red ale with a spruce tip twist. With each sip, you'll feel the love for their valley tickling your taste buds. So come on in, join the fun, and let your taste buds dance to the rhythm of Sandy Valley Brewing Co.! Cheers to local flavors and good times!
properties.name: Sandy Valley Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Dating back to the 70s, Saz’s is in many ways, the definitive sports bar. It’s massive, it’s got a rockstar menu (including signature BBQ baby back ribs and pulled pork sandwiches), and well, it looks like a castle. Just how it oughta be. Family friendly so take the ‘rents and watch the game, maybe with a cloudy farmhouse like the New Glarus Spotted Cow. Four different Bloody Mary cocktails, a Bananas Foster Old-Fashioned, signature burgers like the Wisco with skewered cheese curds on buttery brioche, not to mention the “Famous Friday Fish Fry” make sure every palate is covered.Come hungry and leave the belt at home.
properties.name: Saz's State House

properties.blurb: Ready for another round at Schlafly? Well, you're in for a treat because the beer scene here is a never-ending adventure. With every season, a new brew takes center stage, making sure there's always something fresh and exciting to savor. And they've got a heart for local too. Schlafly proudly sources from local farmers, nurturing their community as they brew up these liquid gems. With beer this good you’ll be back to support local, too!
properties.name: Schlafly Bottleworks (Maplewood)

properties.blurb: Start your craft beer journey with Schlafly’s Kölsch Ale—a perfect mix of crisp and subtly malty flavors. Using German Noble Hops, this golden ale brings the fruity notes of an ale with the clean finish of a lager. Schlafly's year-round lineup includes fan-favorites like Pale Ale and IPA, each delivering its own unique take on traditional styles. No matter the brew, Schlafly’s year-round offerings promise delicious consistency every time you stop by.
properties.name: Schlafly Taproom

properties.blurb: "This Eagle River favorite is as much a live music venue as it is a bar, with an amazing lineup of bands and solo acts every weekend. Shotski’s is also the proud world record holder of the World’s Longest Shotski, using 468 skis, the perfect homage to its name. Pop into this local joint to watch the game, grab a meal, and chat with the best bartenders in town. "
properties.name: Schotskis

properties.blurb: If you don’t support Sconnies, you aren’t welcome in this bar. And a “Sconnie,” of course, is anyone from Wisconsin, who goes to school in Wisconsin, or who just loves Wisconsin (and especially Wisconsin sports). With 37 TVs and state-of-the-art sound, this iconic spot is the ultimate haven for Badgers fans. Football Saturdays pack the place with buzzing energy and anticipation. The roar grows louder around the SCONNIESCREEN, which is a massive 10-foot display that turns every game into a full-on event. Here, the cheers, high-fives, and Wisconsin pride fill the air, making you feel like you’re right in the heart of the action.
properties.name: SCONNIEBAR

properties.address: 215 N College Ave, Fort Collins, CO 80524
properties.blurb: While the term “scrumpy” refers to cider made from undesirable fruit, we can confirm that the cider here is, in fact, quite desirable. The mouthwatering lineup of ciders includes a sweet Blackberry Cobbler and a crisp, dry Campfire, infused with Colorado spruce and fir tips. Want something with more of a kick? Try the Rasbenero, a surprising raspberry habanero blend, paired with a side of candied bacon. Wild flavors abound.
properties.name: Scrumpy's Hard Cider Bar

properties.address: 1269 Garnet Ave, San Diego, CA 92109, USA
properties.name: SD TapRoom

properties.address: 9610 Gulf Blvd, Treasure Island, FL 33706, USA
properties.blurb: Poured Proudly since 1993, Sea Dog Brewing Company has been crafting classic brews with a coastal twist. Founded in Camden, Maine, and now pouring pints across Maine, New Hampshire, and Florida, they’ve kept tradition alive with their signature brewing style. Every sip tells a story—whether it’s a fruity, balanced ale brewed with English two-row malted barley or a crisp lager made from imported German hops and grains. Using a British top-fermenting yeast and open fermenters, Sea Dog serves up time-honored brews that capture the spirit of New England with every pint.
properties.name: Sea Dog Brewing Co

properties.blurb: "Seedstock is a term that means saving the best of what you have now for planting tomorrow. And that’s exactly what this Denver brewery does when they craft their beers: take lessons from the past and apply them to the present. Pop in for a wide assortment of perfectly-crafted beers on tap, from Pilsners to IPAs to stouts. Or order crowlers of your favorite beers online! "
properties.name: Seedstock Brewery

properties.address: 3052 El Cajon Blvd suite C, San Diego, CA 92104, USA
properties.name: Seek Beer Co.

properties.address: 1855 Blake St Suite 160, Denver, CO 80202, USA
properties.name: Seven Grand

properties.address: 301 N Claiborne Ave, New Orleans, LA 70112
properties.blurb: Spoiler alert: New Orleans has never been confused for tame. In honor of that and the 73 different neighborhoods that make up this ridiculously rambunctious place, the spirits served at Seven Three are precisely what your spirit needs. Start with a pint or two before deciding what St Roch Cucumber Vodka would go best with (the correct answer is rocks with a splash of club soda).
properties.name: Seven Three Distilling Co

properties.blurb: Get ready to embark on an epic journey to Shakopee Brew Hall, where the beer dreams come true! As you step into this delightful taproom, you'll immediately sense the dedication to craft and the love for history. It's like stepping into a beer wonderland! Prepare your taste buds for a thrilling adventure, because the tap lineup is ever-changing and always full of surprises!  With each visit, you'll be greeted by new brews, flavors, and experiments that'll blow your mind!
properties.name: Shakopee Brewhall

properties.address: 2300 S Chambers Rd # A, Aurora, CO 80014
properties.blurb: Isn’t “the Guinness is cold” the highest compliment one can pay to their favorite Irish pub? When you pop into Sheabeen’s, expect your favorite Irish imports to be cold, expect the live music to be upbeat, and expect to cheer on the Rockies and the Broncos with fellow fans. At this friendly neighborhood pub, you’ll find awesome bartenders, fierce pool competitors, and old friends seated along the bar.
properties.name: Sheabeen Irish Pub

properties.address: 2956 Roosevelt St Unit 2, Carlsbad, CA 92008, USA
properties.name: Shoots Fish & Beer

properties.blurb: Some people hear about the decline of a native tree species and think, “That’s too bad.” Others think, “I’m gonna help do something about this.” Lucky for you? The owners of Shortleaf Brewing decided that brewing delicious craft beer was the best way to give back and help replant Shortleaf Pines that are native to Missouri. This is one place you can feel extra good about that extra pint because every sip is helping the forest grow.
properties.name: Shortleaf Brewing

properties.blurb: Some people hear about the decline of a native tree species and think, “That’s too bad.” Others think, “I’m gonna help do something about this.” Lucky for you? The owners of Shortleaf Brewing decided that brewing delicious craft beer was the best way to give back and help replant Shortleaf Pines that are native to Missouri. This is one place you can feel extra good about that extra pint because every sip is helping the forest grow.
properties.name: Shortleaf Brewing

properties.address: 6922 W Orchard St, Milwaukee, WI 53214, USA
properties.name: Shotzy's Country Rock Bar 2

properties.address: 105 S Main St, Oconomowoc, WI 53066, USA
properties.name: Shotzy’s Country Rock Bar

properties.blurb: Elevate your nights at Sidney's Rooftop Bar, where Wednesdays and Fridays light up the skyline with sheer fun and a view that will leave you breathless. Imagine a 360˚ canvas showcasing the city's beauty and a sun setting over the Caloosahatchee River. From pumping DJ nights to the exhilarating rooftop Karaoke, there's always something awesome happening at Sidney's. It's not just a bar, it's a hub of vibrant energy and excitement that'll make your nights unforgettable. So why settle for ordinary when you can have extraordinary? Grab your friends, step onto the rooftop, and let Sidney's Rooftop Bar be your ticket to a night of endless fun, breathtaking views, and memories that'll stay with you long after the night is over!
properties.name: Sidney's Rooftop Bar

properties.address: 56 E Lee St, Warrenton, VA 20186, USA
properties.name: Silver Branch Brew Co (Warrenton)

properties.address: 8401 Colesville Rd #150, Silver Spring, MD 20910, USA
properties.blurb: This neighborhood hang is a local favorite. With a wide variety of beers on tap and a full menu full of sandwhiches, wings and even cantina inspired snacks. We can guarantee this is absolutely where you wanna hang with your pals on a patio. The biergarten vibes will make you want to stick around for one more Glass Castle, Silver Branch’s “Holy Grail” beer. It’s totally crushable and like a lot of beers in the lineup, the folks here are not afraid to put a unique spin on a traditional brew.
properties.name: Silver Branch Brewing Co

properties.address: 24 NW Greenwood Ave, Bend, OR 97703, USA
properties.name: Silver Moon Brewing

properties.blurb: Step into the world of Simonet's Bar, where the fun never stops! It's a playground for the young at heart, filled with the nostalgic charm of pinball, skee ball, darts, and retro video games that'll transport you back in time. But that's not all! Simonet's Bar knows how to turn up the excitement with nightly specials that'll have you coming back for more. And let's not forget about the craft beer – a masterpiece of flavors sourced from the finest local breweries and even beyond, guaranteeing a taste adventure that's out of this world.
properties.name: Simonet's Bar

properties.address: 222 Lake Ave Suite 1B, Yonkers, NY 10701, USA
properties.name: Simple Motive Brewing Company

properties.address: 102 N Naches Ave, Yakima, WA 98901, USA
properties.name: Single Hill Brewing

properties.blurb: A brewery with stand-up comedy? Sign us up! (to watch, that is). This dog-friendly Minneapolis brewery doubles as a comedy club, with frequent evening events like Drag Bingo, Amateur Hour, and sets from local comedians. It also has a creative beer list, with brews like Cake Beer, Peanut Butter Jackpot, and Scoopshot, a lactose-free milkshake IPA. Now that deserves applause.
properties.name: Sisyphus Brewing

properties.blurb: If you’re one of those people who likes to read a menu before you hit up a restaurant, we’re here for you. Site-1 Brewing currently has Not a Planet on tap, a beer mashed with heavy doses of honey malt, Maris Otter, and honey crisp cereal. It also has Galactic Goat, a light lager brewed with the express purpose of pairing with your home-grilled creations. And if that isn’t enough for you to put your car in drive: this brewery also has pulled pork sandwiches, deviled eggs, and more noshes.
properties.name: Site-1 Brewing

properties.blurb: If there’s one thing we love more than beer, it’s food. Especially when said food is made with hyper-local ingredients. Our go-to eats are Green Chile Mac and Cheese and the Pitmaster Cubano to round things out. Wash those down with a Pearl Snap Kölsch, and you’ll be well on your way to a nice night out. Feel like something that hits different? May we interest you in a Vanilla Bourbon Old Fashioned?
properties.name: Six Capital Brewing

properties.blurb: SJ stands for the dynamic duo behind this beloved brewery, Shaun and JoAnn Stewart. These friendly folks have quickly made a name for themselves, earning the title of "Best Brewery in Jacksonville" in consecutive years. And let us tell you, the locals aren't wrong—this place is an absolute gem. With a constantly rotating beer list, every visit brings new and exciting flavors to sample. Yet, beyond the impressive libations, what truly sets SJ Brewing Co apart is the welcoming and inviting atmosphere. Prepare to forge lasting connections as you bond with fellow beer enthusiasts over pints from their extensive tap list. At SJ Brewing Co, the warmth and camaraderie are as refreshing as the brews themselves.
properties.name: SJ Brewing Co

properties.address: 209 E Main St Suite H, Mt. Horeb, WI 53572
properties.blurb: Anchored in the old Norwegian-style beer hall tradition, Skal Public House is gonna bring out the Viking in all of us. You’ll find us here on the patio on Fridays for the fish fry and a Potosi Pilsner. Might we also suggest gathering your pals, ordering a basket or three of cheese curds, and diving deep into the Super Flight of 24 delicious craft beers. It’s what your Nordic ancestors would have wanted.
properties.name: Skal Public House

properties.blurb: It’s hard not to be THAT guy. The one that gets overly excited at a perfectly executed pun. But alas…we’ll be good mates and recommend the tasting flight, aptly named Walk the Plank. Seriously. Your cute lil beers are served on a wooden plank at this super chill, eclectic brewery. Skeleton Brew Crew offers up a solid lineup of staples and some awesome seasonals (you’ll wanna come in summer, for sure). And, the folks pulling the taps are some of the raddest bartenders Wisco has to offer.
properties.name: Skeleton Crew Brew

properties.blurb: You say hole in the wall, we say charming, understated neighborhood bar beloved by locals. The regulars love Skippy’s and we gotta say, we agree. It might be the wing sauce lineup. Or the fact that when the Broncos are on there isn’t a bad seat in the house to watch. Maybe it’s the fact that the beer is served ice cold by some of the friendliest staff. Could be the animated conversations and laughter that floats around from satisfied patrons. Skippy’s might just be the raddest hole in the wall we’ve found.
properties.name: Skippy's

properties.blurb: There is magic to be found when gazing into the wondrous sea of constellations in the night sky and the same magic can be found amongst the walls of this brewery. You can’t tell us that monthly Bingo nights aren’t magical. We simply will not believe you. Come toast to the constellations and maybe try out a couple of wishes while you’re sipping. If you were thinking of wishing for some delicious eats to pair with your beer, we have good news…that one definitely came true.
properties.name: Sky Bear Brewery & Pub

properties.blurb: Craving a slice of authentic New York-style pizza that rivals the best in the Big Apple? Slice N' Roll Pizza Pub has got you covered. But here's the twist: they not only serve up mouthwatering pizza, but they'll also deliver it to your favorite downtown brewery using their fleet of e-bikes. That's right, you can enjoy a piping hot slice of pizza while sipping on a cold brew, all without leaving your seat. With a clever solution to keep your slice deliciously hot during delivery, Slice N' Roll ensures that every bite is as fresh and satisfying as can be. Of course, if you prefer a leisurely dining experience, their dog-friendly patio provides the perfect setting to savor your pizza and drinks on-site.
properties.name: Slice N' Roll Pizza Pub

properties.address: 6625 Coachlight Dr, West Des Moines, IA 50266
properties.blurb: Gather 'round and let me tell you a tale of ambition, pickleball, and a whole lotta craft beer. We had this grand idea to combine the thrill of pickleball with the joy of sipping on ice-cold brews, but alas, the parks and rec department put a damper on our plans. Fear not, for we discovered Smash Park! A paradise where we can unleash our pickleball skills and indulge in frosty beverages and nachos with our fellow picklebros. Brace yourselves, because Smash Park boasts an impressive lineup of beers on tap that will make your taste buds dance with delight. From the classics to local brewery favorites, they've got it all.
properties.name: Smash Park

properties.address: 1721 County Rd C West, Roseville, MN 55113, USA
properties.blurb: Smash Park is where paddles meet pints. Whether you’re chasing a perfect serve or giving your legs a break with a local craft beer, there’s no shortage of fun. Chef-crafted food, unique cocktails, and endless games keep the energy high, while another round in hand might just make that backhand a little sharper. Friendly competition, tasty bites, and cold drinks Smash Park makes it easy to win on and off the court.
properties.name: Smash Park

properties.address: 8121 S 125th St, La Vista, NE 68128, USA
properties.name: Smash Park La Vista

properties.address: 209 SE Main St, Lee's Summit, MO 64063
properties.blurb: The divine pairing of barbeque and beer takes center stage at Smoke Brewing Co. Located in downtown Lee's Summit, this one-of-a-kind BBQ-Brew restaurant invites you to savor the best of both worlds. Treat yourself to championship-worthy barbeque that will tantalize your taste buds, and complement it perfectly with their selection of seasonal and best-selling craft beers. It's a match made in culinary heaven. And if you're looking for a delightful way to start your Sunday, don't miss their irresistible Sunday Brunch. Trust us, you don’t want to miss that.
properties.name: Smoke Brewing Co

properties.blurb: There’s so much on the Smokin’ Fins menu that we want to try but unfortunately, we discovered that our tummies have a max capacity. But, here at PubPass, we are problem solvers. The happy hour menu offers all the things we wanna try so we’re definitely grabbing our favorite work buddies for cocktails (of the liquid AND shrimp varieties) and nibbles. We’ll see you on the other side of these lobster tater tots, friends.
properties.name: Smokin Fins

properties.address: 3015 Merle Hay Rd, Des Moines, IA 50310
properties.blurb: The Smoking Goat Pub is a haven for those seeking a fun and flavorful dining experience. Their menu is filled with mouthwatering appetizers and baskets that are guaranteed to make your taste buds dance with joy. From their sizzling sandwiches to their juicy burgers, every bite is a delightful adventure. And let's not forget about their breaded cod that will have you hooked from the first bite. The Smoking Goat Pub is where food meets fun, creating an unforgettable dining experience that will leave you wanting to come back for more.
properties.name: Smoking Goat Pub

properties.address: 4500 W Forest Home Ave, Greenfield, WI 53219
properties.blurb: When people say “typical Wisconsin bar,” they’re talking about a place like Sobo’s Tap. A bar with darts, $1 pool, and daily drink specials. A bar where you can get a good Bloody Mary any day of the week, and good conversation too. The kind of place that opens at 6 AM every day, because some of us work the night shift. And for those of us who don’t, there’s Thursday night karaoke.
properties.name: Sobo's Tap

properties.address: 3625 W Bowles Ave #9, Littleton, CO 80123, USA
properties.name: Social Bar & Lounge

properties.address: 240 Village Park Dr Suite 100, Littleton, CO 80122, USA
properties.name: Social Bar & Lounge

properties.blurb: Look, we know beer drinking is more fun with friends. At this Scottsdale pub, they make it easy to #eatdrinkbesocial. Believe us, you’ll be able to drag even your most introverted friends to Social Tap Eatery. Lure them in with the promise of a chill atmosphere, buy them a pint of their favorite local craft beer, and then hook ‘em with nibbles from the award-winning scratch kitchen. If that doesn’t work, maybe find new friends? You can probably make one or two out on the patio.
properties.name: Social Tap

properties.blurb: Soggy Bottom Brewing Co. blends Prohibition-era charm with a cozy, post-Depression vibe that adds warmth and character to its industrial-chic brewery setting. A true staple in Dunedin’s thriving brewery scene, this spot has quickly become the go-to for locals and visitors alike. Whether you're soaking in the unique ambiance or gathering with friends over a pint, Soggy Bottom is where history, community, and great brews come together. It’s not just a brewery—it’s a treasured hangout.
properties.name: Soggy Bottom Brewery

properties.blurb: It’s easy to get stuck in a routine, visiting the same old haunts. Why not try Someplace Else? This brewery-meets-arcade has new beer releases every Friday, plus a ton of vintage pinball games. Try the Alpine Loop Amber or Plane Shift Wheat Ale while you loosen up your flipper fingers. We should warn you though: once you’re here, you’ll never go anywhere else.
properties.name: Someplace Else Brewery

properties.address: 94 Cherry Valley Ave Unit C, West Hempstead, NY 11552, USA
properties.name: Somerset Brewing Company

properties.blurb: Corner tavern is run by a husband & wife team, one of which you’ll almost always find behind the bar. They boast a nice craft beer selection and the best frozen bar pizza around served up hot to pair with your brew. Sottile’s is the kind of bar where locals turn into regulars in just a few visits, and although only a few years old, they’ve got that decades old community feel.
properties.name: Sottile's Pub

properties.blurb: A farm-to-table brewery and restaurant that’s dedicated to providing beer and food that is made with the freshest seasonal ingredients? Say less. Except…okay we’re actually going to say a bit more. The food? To die for, to dream for, to live for - take one of everything. The beer? They’ve got something for everyone to enjoy, from your easy drinkers to your stout kickers, and they’re all worthy of a round or two. Who needs dessert when you could have an Oatmeal Peanut Butter Graham Crack Porter? (It’s okay if you also want dessert, we always support dessert.)
properties.name: Soul Squared Brewing

properties.blurb: Okay, okay, we know that you aren’t in Miami because you thought you’d come here and enjoy some nice underwhelming sights and times. You’re here because there’s a party to be had, and dang it, you’re not one to miss a party. Well, we just want to make sure you don’t miss putting this place on your rotation for ‘fun to be had while drinking delicious beer.’ Because it would be a shame to miss them. Don’t believe us? Just ask Forbes. Yes, the fancy magazine. Oh, and rumor has it one of the owners of this place is a real life prince!
properties.name: South Beach Brewing Co

properties.address: 1575 S Coast Hwy, Oceanside, CA 92054, USA
properties.name: South O Brewing Company

properties.blurb: The pins are set, and the good times are ready to roll! South Shore Bowl's restaurant is a haven for foodies and comfort food enthusiasts alike. Their menu boasts a mouthwatering array of pub favorites, from irresistible appetizers to juicy burgers, satisfying sandwiches, and the ever-beloved pizza, just to name a few. You won't leave hungry, that's for sure! But wait, there's more than just great grub. South Shore Bowl is a hub of entertainment, hosting a range of bowling tournaments that will have you showcasing your skills, open bowling sessions for casual fun, and the electrifying glow bowl events that add a whole new level of excitement to your night out. So, whether you're here to bowl a strike, savor delicious bites, or simply revel in the vibrant atmosphere, South Shore Bowl is your go-to destination for unforgettable moments of fun, food, and fantastic times.
properties.name: South Shore Bowl

properties.address: 532 W Bayfield St, Washburn, WI 54891, USA
properties.blurb: Here they believe in crafting beers that bring nothing but pure enjoyment, so you won't find any bummer beers here. Their commitment to quality shines through in every sip, with ingredients sourced from local farms and the pristine waters of Lake Superior. Since 1995, they've been brewing up tradition and serving it in every glass. With five flagship beers that have stood the test of time, you'll always have a trusted favorite to rely on. But don't be afraid to embrace the thrill of trying something new with their rotating selection of specialty and seasonal brews.
properties.name: South Shore Brewery Taphouse

properties.address: 9504 S Chicago Rd, Oak Creek, WI 53154
properties.blurb: Let’s just say that swinging double doors wouldn’t feel out of place at SouthBound Saloon, and neither would a Clint Eastwood lookalike in the corner. Don’t worry though—strangers are welcome round these parts. Tip your hat to the bartender as you order your drink of choice. They also have burgers, wings from mild to extra hot, and ribs that are a must-have.
properties.name: Southbound Again

properties.blurb: Do you even brew, bro? You can start at Southern Brewing & Winery: they offer over 100 types of grain, 80 types of yeast, and 50 types of hops for homebrewers all over the Tampa area. Even better, they have trained staff members ready to walk you through the process of building a grain bill. If your hands are sweating right now, don’t worry — you can also order beer, cider, kombucha, wine, and more right off the tap.
properties.name: Southern Brewing & Winery

properties.blurb: This lively establishment is your go-to destination for a delectable dining experience paired with ice-cold beers that will keep your taste buds dancing. The menu at Southside Bar & Grille is a culinary adventure waiting to unfold. From mouthwatering appetizers that kick off your meal to juicy burgers, crisp salads, flavorful handhelds, hearty entrees, and the beloved classic pizzas that never disappoint. There's something for every palate to savor. But the indulgence doesn't stop at the food. Southside Bar & Grille takes your refreshment seriously, offering a selection of ice-cold beers that will perfectly complement your meal.
properties.name: Southside Bar & Grille

properties.address: 3999 GW Bush Ave UNIT 101, Wellington, CO 80549
properties.blurb: So, there's this craft brewery called Sparge Brewing, and it's like a hidden gem just waiting for you to discover. Picture this: a cool army vet and his wife decided to bring their passion for brewing to life, and voila, Sparge Brewing was born! It all started in 2018 with big dreams and even bigger flavors. Fast forward to 2019, and they swung open their doors to share their fantastic creations with the world. Sparge is all about making beer that's super approachable and totally sessionable. That means it's perfect for everyone – from seasoned craft beer lovers to newcomers. So, grab your crew and head over to Sparge Brewing. Trust me, you'll be thanking me for this tip. Good times, great brews, and a warm, welcoming vibe – what more could you ask for?
properties.name: Sparge Brewing

properties.address: 8775 E. Orchard Rd, Unit 811, Greenwood Village CO 80111
properties.blurb: When was the last time you treated your tastebuds to a globe-trotting flavor party? If it’s been a minute, you’ve just found your new favorite spot. Spice Trade is pouring bold brews like a jalapeño‑peppered Mexican lager, a chai‑spiced milk stout, and their zippy Scarlet Giant hibiscus key lime gose. They’ve even got a Char Siu BBQ pork sandwich that takes your bite on a smoky, slaw-topped joyride. We have to stop now, or the drooling will become obvious.
properties.name: Spice Trade Brewery

properties.blurb: While others might claim to pour blood, sweat, and tears into their work, the folks at Spiral Brewery keep it simple. They brew with quality ingredients and plenty of love. Their taproom is built for connection, whether you’re striking up a conversation at the communal tables or “working from home” with a pint in hand. Don’t worry, we won’t tell your boss we saw you there.
properties.name: Spiral Brewery

properties.blurb: Look, we don’t want to brag, but we were mega fans of Spirit Hounds before they went and won a major award for the best whiskey in the world. It’s cool if you’re a bandwagon fan, though, no judgment here. The pride of Lyons offers inspired cocktails, a welcoming atmosphere, and did we mention the cocktails? This small batch distillery has earned every dang award hanging from its walls.
properties.name: Spirit Hound Distillers
Spirit Hound Distillers Highlands Tasting Room

properties.blurb: This hidden gem is about to become your new favorite spot! With beer this good, the word is sure to spread like wildfire. While the train might not chug its way here anymore, you'll still want to make yourself a regular. Hailing from an area rich in history and boasting good water and soil, it's no wonder that the timber industry thrived here, leaving behind a legacy of those famous timber trains. Here you'll find a warm and welcoming gathering place for friends and neighbors alike, honoring the deep roots of Mandeville's heritage and creating unforgettable moments together. So hop on board the good times express and let the journey begin!
properties.name: Spoke & Barrel

properties.address: 1470 E Southern Ave, Tempe, AZ 85282, USA
properties.name: Spokes On Southern

properties.address: 4810 E County Line Rd, Centennial CO 80126
properties.name: Sports Complex Restaurant

properties.blurb: You know, Loveland's roots are deeply tied to its first-ever train station, a charming red-brick beauty that tells tales of a bygone era. Back in the day, the Great Western Sugar Company swooped in and built a beet factory, which caused freight traffic to skyrocket. Fast forward to 1980, when the C&S Depot had to close its doors due to the rise of automobiles and a decline in freight traffic. But fear not – the legacy of this historic building lives on as Sports Station American Grill! Nowadays, Sports Station is all about serving up scrumptious food, refreshing drinks, and creating a welcoming space for folks to enjoy. So come on over, dive into a plate of goodness, and soak in the history – it's all here at Sports Station American Grill!
properties.name: Sports Station American Grill

properties.blurb: Some of our fondest summer memories involve our old bikes and Sprecher’s Root Beer. There was nothing quite like cracking a bottle open after a long ride. It just felt like those things went together. Now, can you imagine our joy turning 21+ finding out THEY BREW BEER, TOO. You can now find us hidden away through the double doors at the Sprecher taproom and indoor beer garden. We’ll be munching on some Root Beer Popcorn, a Huge Soft Pretzel, and a pizza with a Abbey Triple Belgian to wash it all down.
properties.name: Sprecher Brewery

properties.address: 1905 Ingersoll Ave Unit 106, Des Moines, IA 50309
properties.blurb: Get ready for a pedal-powered gastronomic adventure at Sprockets! The owner's love for cycling inspired the logo, highlighting the importance of a sprocket in a bike's mechanics. Just like that vital gear, they here to fuel your foodie journey with flavors that zoom! Dinner at Sprockets is like hitting the best trails on a bike. Whether you're in the mood for savory comfort food or exploring bold flavor territories. This restaurant is where friends become family, and every visit is a journey worth taking. Speaking of journeys, our beer selection is like a ride through a craft beer wonderland. Just like a bike ride through scenic trails, the beers are handpicked to offer a thrilling taste adventure. It's all about savoring the experience, one sip at a time.
properties.name: Sprockets

properties.address: 544 1st Ave N, St. Petersburg, FL 33701, USA
properties.blurb: St. Pete Brewing Co. is all about capturing the spirit of St. Petersburg in every pint. From the waterfront views to the sandy beaches, the city sets the scene and their beers bring it home. Crisp, flavorful, and full of local pride, this is the kind of brewery that makes you feel like you’re sipping the essence of the city itself.
properties.name: St. Pete Brewing Company

properties.blurb: Stadium View is more than just a sports bar – it's a haven of excitement where the menu rotates with the seasons, ensuring fresh and delectable offerings for all. From sizzling appetizers to hearty entrees, every dish is expertly crafted to elevate the game day experience. Of course, what's a game without the perfect brew? At Stadium View, the beer flows freely from a lineup of local and craft taps, quenching your thirst and adding to the celebratory atmosphere. Whether you're a connoisseur or simply looking for a cold one to enjoy, the bar has you covered. So gather your friends, deck out in your team colors, and head to Stadium View Sports Bar & Grille. It's not just a place to watch the game – it's where you immerse yourself in the heart of the action.
properties.name: Stadium View Sports Bar & Grille

properties.address: 6201 W Mitchell St, West Allis, WI 53214
properties.blurb: Opened by veteran bartenders, the people at Stalley Cats know what’s what. But forget about pricey cocktails with unfamiliar ingredients. They’re focused on what bars are really about: getting together to relax and have some fun. And it doesn’t get more fun than a Funyun Bloody Mary, their house special. Darts and pull tabs complete the neighborhood bar feel.
properties.name: Stalley Cats

properties.blurb: Starkweather Brewing isn’t just about pouring pints. Oh no my friend, it’s about bringing people together. Step inside and you’ll find that perfect blend of cozy charm and welcoming energy that makes it easy to settle in and stay awhile. Their lineup of finely crafted beers is always evolving, keeping things fresh whether you’re an IPA loyalist or a stout devotee. And don’t worry this isn’t one of those “just drinks” places. The full kitchen serves up delicious eats that pair perfectly with whatever you’re sipping. Great beer, good food, and even better vibes? Starkweather’s got it down to a science.
properties.name: Starkweather Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Stay Tuned Brewing is like a catchy tune you can’t stop humming, except it’s in beer form. From classic IPAs and lagers to quirky seasonal brews, each sip will stick with you long after you leave. Kick back, nerd out over movies, music, and TV, and let the vibes, and the beer take over. Trust us, you’ll be scheming your next visit before you even put down your glass.
properties.name: Stay Tuned Brewing

properties.address: 30 Lake Shore Dr E, Dunkirk, NY 14048, USA
properties.name: Steelbound (Dunkirk)

properties.address: 243 W Main St, Springville, NY 14141, USA
properties.name: Steelbound (Springville)

properties.address: 1225 Robruck Dr Unit A, Oconomowoc, WI 53066
properties.blurb: Steel Tank Brewing is beer bootcamp in the best possible way, if you ask us. Subtract the pushups, add the pints, and suddenly we’re first in line to enlist. Proudly vet-owned and stacked with military-inspired brews, this place drills down on bold flavor with a rotating lineup that demands your attention. The menu’s locked, loaded, and ready to refuel, and the mission is clear: kick back and enjoy. Craft beer cadets, your orders have arrived.
properties.name: SteelTank Brewing Co

properties.address: 746 N James Lovell St, Milwaukee, WI 53233
properties.blurb: Step into the captivating world of Stella's Cocktail Dive, where the boundaries between a stylish cocktail lounge and a timeless dive bar blur to create a unique and vibrant atmosphere. Whether you're seeking the sophistication of craft cocktails or the laid-back charm of a classic dive, Stella's Cocktail Dive is the ultimate destination to experience the best of both worlds.
properties.name: Stella’s Cocktail Dive

properties.blurb: Voted the best sports bar in Milwaukee, probably due to the 15+ HD TVs and 10-ft. projector. Or the famous Bloody Mary and craft beer list. Or the shuffleboard. Either way, there’s no reason to watch the Packers play anywhere else, unless that is, you have tickets to the game, in which case come for the pregame—there’s a shuttle waiting in the wings. Did somebody say wings? They're fantastic, too. Sneak some onto the bus!
properties.name: Steny's

properties.address: 1926 Winkler Ave, Fort Myers, FL 33901, USA
properties.name: Stet's Bar

properties.address: 215 N Henry St, Green Bay, WI 54302
properties.blurb: Founder Brad Stillmank started home-brewing in college because he couldn’t afford the exorbitant Colorado craft brews. Now, he brings his expertise (and prices) to the people of Wisconsin, with drafts like Killer Bees – a jalapeño-infused blonde ale with peppery aromas and mild spicy heat — and Door County Cider – raw, unsweetened cider pressed from apples grown in Door County. Stillmank also serves Wiscoseltzer in addicting flavors like Watermelon Gummies and Prickly Pear.
properties.name: Stillmank Brewing Co.

properties.blurb: Legends have spread beyond Denver about Stoney’s Wing Wednesdays, but there’s a lot more to love than just Buffalo’s finest export. The Inferno Burger with jalapeno and ghost pepper aioli,or the Denver Cheesesteak with shaved ribeye, mushrooms, and american swiss were two perfect tens. Evidence that ownership is paying attention to their tap list were the delicious Jai Alai IPA from Cigar City and a 90 Shilling Ale from Odell Brewing. Lively crowd indoors and great Denverite-watching from the outdoor patio.
properties.name: Stoney's Bar and Grill

properties.blurb: A welcome addition to the Stoney’s family, their Cantina boasts a staggeringly deep tequila and mezcal list, signature cocktails, and about eight tap lines. And it certainly wouldn't be a cantina without Tex Mex. The tacos here are worth the visit, my friend, all freshly served on griddled corn tortillas. The whole place still has that new car feel, with high marks given to how clean and kept the bar looked. Give us the game on the TVs paired with queso and guac and we’ll be happy all day.
properties.name: Stoney's Cantina

properties.blurb: They must have brought in some kind of geometry expert, because there's no bad angle to see the TVs. Positioned perfectly so you won’t miss a second, provided you’re not devouring one of their many menu highlights. Stoney’s is known for wings, but that Bavarian pretzel could have dented a Buick it was so massive. Signature cocktails and a nicely thought-out tap list added to our stop. We wanted to order the Princess Yum Yum from Denver Beer Co. just to say it aloud. Lucky for us, it was deliciou
properties.name: Stoney's Uptown Joint

properties.blurb: Spent all day on the slopes and need a drink and a good meal to recuperate? Spent the day relaxing in the quaint town and need a place to continue to unwind and maybe catch a game? Look no further, this is your destination. Sports channels? They’ve got them. Yes, all of them. This should absolutely be your Winter Park staple for all delicious eats and desired libations.
properties.name: Stoney's Winter Park

properties.address: 3121 A N, N El Paso St, Colorado Springs, CO 80907
properties.blurb: Storybook Brewing may be into fantasy, but they use real, fresh ingredients. This Colorado Springs-based nano brewery has 15 barrels and offers beers with whimsical names like The Last Straw…Berry, Little Red’s Rocking Ale, and Gnomish Beer Goggles. It also has a delicious food truck lineup. Sounds like something right out of the pages of a storybook, right?
properties.name: Storybook Brewing

properties.address: 1220 J St, San Diego, CA 92101, USA
properties.name: Storyhouse Spirits

properties.blurb: We wanted to tell you just how many beers Stout Street Social has on tap, but we lost count somewhere around 30. Take our word for it: Stout Street has something for you, whether you prefer beer, hard seltzer, or cocktails. The food is also top-notch, with stand-outs like the prime rib and oysters when you’re feeling fancy, or the giant soft pretzel when you need to feed a crowd.
properties.name: Stout St Social

properties.blurb: We love a bar that advertises Slider Night. Yes, please, three of those tiny burgers dripping with cheese and pickles. At Straight Shots, you can pair those sliders with one of your favorite local beers on tap, or maybe even a shot of whiskey. Once you’ve wrapped up with dinner, head on over to the pool tables - just make sure you’ve wiped your greasy slider fingers off before you rack ‘em up if you want a chance to beat your buddies at 8-ball.
properties.name: Straight Shots

properties.blurb: When you die and go to Whiskey Heaven, it may feel a lot like Stranahan’s. Some of the cleanest-tasting single malt whiskeys we’ve had dance on our palate in some time. Every small batch is cut to proof with Rocky Mountain snowmelt which feels like a little magic in a glass, honestly. Sip exclusive American Single Malts only available at their Denver distillery and cocktail lounge, and don’t forget to check out the patio while you’re floating on that whiskey cloud.
properties.name: Stranahan's Whiskey Distillery & Cocktail Bar

properties.blurb: Erik and Aaron, the brothers behind the name, may not always agree, but they sure manage to brew some tasty beers. With a focus on sustainability and locally sourced ingredients, Stubborn Brothers often switches up their tap list, so there’s always something new to try. Explore the taproom, housed in an old theater, while you sip a Sweet Peel American Wheat, Door County Cherry Sour, or whatever’s brewing that week.
properties.name: Stubborn Brothers Brewery

properties.blurb: Sudhouse is a low-key mom and pop bar that embraces the spirit of our nation’s capitol - freedom, equality, and ice cold beer (forgive us, it’s been a minute since U.S. History class). The freedom to choose your appetizers and draft beer is the kind of thing our forefathers fought for. Okay, that might be a bit of an exaggeration, but when there’s a giant mural of Abe Lincoln looming over you, it’s impossible not to engage in life, liberty, and the pursuit of happy hour.
properties.name: Sudhouse

properties.address: 1543 NE Douglas St, Lee's Summit, MO 64086
properties.blurb: Summit Pizza is for those of us who grew up going to that chain pizza joint with the salad bar and mini pizzas. If you’re nostalgic for creating a unique salad combination, go ahead and embrace your inner child and indulge in the lunch buffet - your more sophisticated palate will thank you for it. And as long as you don’t have to go back to work, or maybe even if you do, we’re not here to judge, you may as well indulge in a bevvie. Just a little something to wash that Summit Supreme pizza down.
properties.name: Summit Pizza Co

properties.address: 8665 Argent St Suite B, Santee, CA 92071, USA
properties.name: Sunny Grove Brewing Co

properties.address: 121 S Main St, Lake Mills, WI 53551
properties.blurb: Roll into Lake Mills and the first stop should be Sunshine Brew Company, a stone’s throw from Rock Lake. We had some of the freshest-tasting jackfruit tacos you can get east of the Mississippi. Brewed on site, their beers give everyone something to love. Friendly bar staff introduced us to a slamming amber with the name Wisco Sun as well as the crisp n’ cold Sunrise Reach pale. Very bright and fun decor almost has a tropical vibe. Perhaps as tropical as one gets in southeastern Wisconsin.
properties.name: Sunshine Brewing Co

properties.address: 1943 Fowler Street, Enter off, Hough St, Fort Myers, FL 33901, USA
properties.name: Swamp Cat Brewing Co

properties.blurb: If you are looking for a place with not only the best Iowa breweries on tap, but some of the best food we’ve tasted AND a place to play pool, look no further than Sweet Caroline’s. Might we suggest a Boone Valley Roxie Irish Red with their delicious homemade chips and ranch dip while you school your friend in a game of shuffleboard. Meanwhile, you can find us at the bar watching the Iowa/Iowa State games.
properties.name: Sweet Caroline's

properties.address: 122 S Main St, River Falls, WI 54022
properties.blurb: It’s a scientific fact that when the word “pub” precedes a food item, it’s going to be the most delicious thing you’ve ever put in your food hole. For example, pub pretzel. Or how about this? Pub nachos. Paired with an IPA or one of the other various yet equally tasty brews on tap and it’s simply *chef’s kiss.* Swinging Bridge Brewery knows exactly what they’re doing, offering up creative craft beers that will keep even the savviest beer drinker on their toes.
properties.name: Swinging Bridge Brewery

properties.blurb: Get ready to dive into the spirited realm of Syntax Distillery and Cocktail Bar, where real Colorado magic happens. They take the grain-to-glass craft spirits game to a whole new level. They've got their sources locked down, with grains handpicked from trusted local farmers within a 100-mile radius and sugar cane molasses snatched as close as possible - straight from the sunny shores of Florida. Now, let's raise a glass to their mind-blowing cocktails. Crafted with their very own spirits (of course!), these liquid marvels will have your taste buds dancing with joy. With a dazzling array of flavors to explore, you'll keep coming back for more, because life's too short to miss out on all the spirited fun at Syntax Distillery and Cocktail Bar!
properties.name: Syntax Distillery and Cocktail Bar

properties.address: 2190 S Platte River Dr, Denver, CO 80223, USA
properties.name: Table Public House

properties.address: 1676 Union Blvd, Bay Shore, NY 11706, USA
properties.name: Take Two Brewery

properties.blurb: You can easily spend the whole day at Takoma Beverage Co. and honestly, why wouldn’t you? Start with expertly crafted coffee and breakfast in the morning, then ease into the afternoon with fresh, flavorful lunch and dinner options. When the workday winds down (or even a little before, we won’t judge), you’ve got a solid list of beer, wine, and cocktails to explore. It’s the kind of spot that feels right from sunrise to last call.
properties.name: Takoma Beverage Co

properties.address: 4910 S Newport St, Denver, CO 80237, USA
properties.name: Tap & Burger Belleview Station

properties.address: 1565 N Raleigh St #100, Denver, CO 80204, USA
properties.name: Tap & Burger Sloan's Lake

properties.address: 515 Mouton St Suite 103, Baton Rouge, LA 70806
properties.blurb: Tap 65 takes its name seriously, with 65 whiskies and 65 beers, seltzers, and wines on their self-pour tap wall. They also serve upscale Indian fusion and have a full bar dedicated to hand-crafted cocktails featuring innovative recipes with an Indian flair. But they don’t have 65 of them. It’s okay, that would probably be overkill. Probably.
properties.name: TAP 65

properties.blurb: With a recent changing of the guard in ownership, Tap on the Rocks has won over the locals, and of course when you have nice pastoral views, stellar beer, and wood-fired pizzas, you’ll win over Pub Pass too. Rolling through Morrison around breakfast time makes Tap on the Rocks a savvy stop as well, with scrambles and burritos packed with tasty goodnes
properties.name: Tap On The Rocks

properties.address: 13000 W Indian School Rd suite a-6, Litchfield Park, AZ 85340
properties.blurb: It isn’t just a clever name, these folks really are Tap Savvy. With an ever changing tap list you will always be able to find something to please the palate here. With most taps being from the best local breweries we couldn’t help but settle in for the evening. Don’t worry, after a few we ordered some delicious snacks to keep us going.
properties.name: Tap Savvy

properties.address: 6047 U.S. Hwy 17-92 N, Davenport, FL 33896, USA
properties.name: Tap That Beer House

properties.address: 363 Delaware St suite 300, Tonawanda, NY 14150, USA
properties.name: Tap That Tap Room

properties.blurb: So you’ve checked out Tap Savvy before and you thought to yourself, I want this, but in Avondale, AND cushy seating… Well my friends, we have some great news. Tap2 is here for you. Owned by the same incredible team that is laser-focused on bringing you the best of the best tap beers, Tap2, after a few silly delays, is now open and ready to serve you! We thought the tap list was long at Tap Savvy, but buckle up my friends. You’re in for a treat!
properties.name: Tap2 Premium Beer & Wine Lounge

properties.address: 2000 El Cajon Blvd, San Diego, CA 92104, USA
properties.name: TapRoom Beer Company

properties.blurb: Tarpon River Brewing’s spacious taproom is the ultimate spot to kick back and indulge. Start with a crisp Native Lager and dive into their menu of flavorful brews. Whether you're pairing the Good as Gold Golden Ale with some Phish Tacos or matching the Inzane American Light Lager with their Loaded Nachos, every bite and sip is a win. With an ever-expanding beer list and a menu to match, this is one Fort Lauderdale hangout where you really can't go wrong.
properties.name: Tarpon River Brewing

properties.address: 715 Fourth Ave, San Diego, CA 92101, USA
properties.name: Taste & Thirst

properties.blurb: Architecturally modern, the Tavern Lowry is not your Uncle Frank’s sports bar. That place was condemned and we’re not allowed to talk about it, especially to Frank. But Tavern Lowry is sharp as a 3 thousand dollar suit. Highlights from the menu were  the  Volcano Burger with pepper jack, honey peppered bacon, fried jalapeño coins, chipotle BBQ sauce and the Beer-Battered Fish n Chips with coleslaw. Grab a brew out on the beautiful patio with a circular gazebo bar. Sorry Frank, but this is how it should be.
properties.name: Tavern Lowery

properties.address: 209 N Cleveland Ave, Loveland, CO 80537, USA
properties.name: TeeShots

properties.blurb: Calling all history buffs to come check out Ten Twelve Main. With good food and amazing drinks in this beautiful historic building, could you really want anything more? Once you step inside you’ll feel transported to a simpler time and with the cold beer flowing you’ll forget all those troubles. Not really into history? That’s okay, too. With an expansive and ever growing food menu there is something for everyone. And the drinks? Also always changing with rotating taps from the best of the local beer scene. Trust us, this is a must stop when you’re downtown historic Lexington.
properties.name: Ten Twelve Main

properties.blurb: At Ten10 Brewing Co., the taps are always flowing with fresh, rotating brews that keep things interesting and keep you coming back. It’s all about small-batch flavor and laid-back neighborhood vibes, the kind of place where one pint quickly turns into two. Pro tip: Say the words "Jumbo Smoked Wings" to your server. Trust us, your taste buds will thank you.
properties.name: Ten10 Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Tennessee Brew Works “works hard to create high quality craft beer that makes Tennessee proud. Our culture places importance on family, friends, and community, and we hope you’ll be a part of it.” and let us just say, we absolutely want to be a part of it. They understand the importance of brewing with integrity, only using natural ingredients and are sourcing them from local farmers whenever possible. On top of the quality Tennessee Brew Works also gives back through their State Park Blonde Ale which benefits the TSP Conservancy. We could go on and on about their expansive beer and their incredible snacks and entrees, but you’ll just have to go experience it for yourself as we are running out of room…
properties.name: Tennessee Brew Works

properties.blurb: Prepare to be transported by Aztec-inspired brews without needing to sacrifice anything—except maybe your previous beer loyalties. This San Marco favorite, named after the Aztec god of jaguars, offers a rotating selection of easy-drinking cervezas, ensuring there’s always something on tap for everyone. Pair your pint with their mouthwatering tacos, nachos, or esquite, but make sure to leave room for their epic chicken and waffle burrito with hot sauce-infused maple syrup. And don’t even think about skipping the caramel-stuffed churros con chocolate—they’re worth every bite.
properties.name: Tepeyolot Cerveceria

properties.blurb: At Textile Brewing, they're brewing up a storm right in the heart of their building's basement. Picture this: you're sinking your teeth into a massive Bavarian pretzel or munching on some pretzel bites, all while sipping on their exclusive brews. And guess what? These brews are like the hidden treasure of the beer world, only found in their taprooms. Whether you're dining in, grabbing takeout, or swinging by for curbside service, they've got you covered. Oh, and did we mention they've got a dog-friendly Biergarten? Yep, it's decked out with umbrellas and firepits, making it the paw-fect spot for you and your furry friends to chill.
properties.name: Textile Brewing Co

properties.blurb: "30 is the number of beers on tap at The Abbey. It’s also the number of burgers you’ll want to order as soon as you take that first juicy bite. De Pere’s “Original Neighborhood Bar & Grill” also offers pizzas, wraps, sandwiches, and salads as well as bar classics like the Blooming Onion and Loaded Baked Potato. Now we’ve gone and made ourselves hungry. "
properties.name: The Abbey

properties.blurb: Does your soul long to be comforted by the classic hospitality of an Irish pub? But do you also find yourself with a hankering for a tasty quesadilla or chicken wings? Well here you’ll find the best of both worlds. Whether it’s fish & chips, shepherd's pie, or pork green chili fries…they’re serving it up hot and tasty for you. And who says you can’t have a perfectly poured Guinness while you’re eating a baja fish wrap? We certainly didn’t.
properties.name: The Abbey Tavern

properties.blurb: Intimately sized, the Alley packs a lot of punch into their square footage. Live music and even open mic nights dot the weekly calendar, all of which is proudly free of a cover charge. And while they have a half dozen taps of Colorado cold ones, they kill at the margarita game. That should go hand in hand with the Mountain style Mexican food packed with smokey, cheesy goodness. This is the best alley we’ve ever blindly walked into.
properties.name: The Alley

properties.address: 316 Centre St, Fernandina Beach, FL 32034, USA
properties.blurb: They don't just hold the line with their commitment to doing it right, they raise the bar! This place is a masterclass in doing everything to a high standard, and they don't cut any corners – from the brewing process to the restaurant and the outstanding food. It's a true labor of love, and they pour their heart and soul into every glass they serve you.Small batch brewing is their jam, and let us tell you, these brewers have got some serious talent! Each sip is a testament to their passion and dedication. The tap list is a delightful dance of flavors, so make sure to visit often, as it's always changing – just like your cravings for their fantastic brews!
properties.name: The Alley by AIBC

properties.address: 15350 E Smoky Hill Rd, Aurora, CO 80015
properties.name: The Angry Clover

properties.address: 606 Lime Kiln Rd, Green Bay, WI 54302
properties.blurb: Imagine being so confident in your bar that you can just name it The Bar. It’s not cocky if it’s true, right? The Bar offers an extensive lineup of beers, with locals from the likes of New Glarus on draft and plenty more to choose from. The menu options are plentiful and the folks at The Bar know what Green Bay likes to eat - wings, burgers, and buffalo mac and cheese. Okay, maybe the last one is specific to our PubPass taste buds, but whatever. The Bar is The Place to watch the Packers take down their rivals.
properties.name: The Bar

properties.blurb: A hand-picked tap list that runs both deep and thoughtful awaits your arrival at The Barley Oak! You might just walk away with a new favorite beer or two. So much to explore from across Mandeville or across the globe. Better get some food to fuel your investigation. We started with the Cajun Sausage Platter (that creole mustard sauce… damn!) and a local Hazy as we tried to decide between the Brisket Sandwich or a Reuben. Trick question we split both. The sustenance helped us delve even deeper into our delicious beerducation.
properties.name: The Barley Oak

properties.blurb: The Bearded Brewer describes itself as “focused on creative and aggressive styles.” And it is aggressive. Aggressive with its stellar brewing technique.
